We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
So, here’s the part where I ask: **[_Can you make a split contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and my campaign to meet our mid-month goals and hold our Senate majority? Your donations keep me fighting for regular folks in Washington and will help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73166067/437607100/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=17.77&refcode=jtk298-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDljOWUwZjMtMjU4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VtBMSDqx12S8fcQ5c5kAuNf_aqC83zoZcOobOfnikEQ=)**

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Our Veterans earned it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
As a combat and peacekeeping Veteran, I understand the many problems and opportunities Veterans confront on a daily basis and throughout our lives.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73166379/437620621/-1863925838?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_231111_1_1&refcode2=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=kg+W7fuDeYMdiTM6K/WuO4m/UUD8vMpTPCQsc/hmxul9Dlq3Uc8Rzdwngv2TnEe8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDM4MTU2ZS0yYTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0O-V1nOVy-XNZbX_Dijv7SXmJPIKtnxQKi_iEBNFf4=&emci=cd0d744e-2780-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=24669367)
When I returned home, I had the support needed to live a well-rounded life and build a career in education and community service. But, too many veterans don’t have access to the same resources and opportunities.

Homelessness, addiction, and lack of access to health care are intolerable among those who count on us to match their commitment to America with our own commitment to their health and prosperity after their service.

**We must do everything possible to uplift our veterans and deliver the care and benefits they earned. As the chairman of a non-profit helping our veterans, I’m doubling down on this commitment.** [With your help, I’ll do the same while serving you in Congress. Please add your name if you’re with me:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73166380/437620622/1034469836?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_231111_1_1&refcode2=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=kg+W7fuDeYMdiTM6K/WuO4m/UUD8vMpTPCQsc/hmxul9Dlq3Uc8Rzdwngv2TnEe8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDM4MTU2ZS0yYTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0O-V1nOVy-XNZbX_Dijv7SXmJPIKtnxQKi_iEBNFf4=&emci=cd0d744e-2780-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=24669367) | | **[SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73166381/437620623/1034469836?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_231111_1_1&refcode2=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&contactdata=kg+W7fuDeYMdiTM6K/WuO4m/UUD8vMpTPCQsc/hmxul9Dlq3Uc8Rzdwngv2TnEe8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDM4MTU2ZS0yYTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0O-V1nOVy-XNZbX_Dijv7SXmJPIKtnxQKi_iEBNFf4=&emci=cd0d744e-2780-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8438156e-2a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=24669367)**

Thanks for standing with our men and women in uniform.

– Rick

clean_body: | As a combat and peacekeeping Veteran, I understand the many problems and opportunities Veterans confront on a daily basis and throughout our lives. When I returned home, I had the support needed to live a well-rounded life and build a career in education and community service. But, too many veterans don’t have access to the same resources and opportunities. Homelessness, addiction, and lack of access to health care are intolerable among those who count on us to match their commitment to America with our own commitment to their health and prosperity after their service. We must do everything possible to uplift our veterans and deliver the care and benefits they earned. As the chairman of a non-profit helping our veterans, I’m doubling down on this commitment. | | Thanks for standing with our men and women in uniform. – Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: Jon Tester
subject: our first TV ad

body:
| Folks—

I wanted to make sure you saw our new TV ad, but we need YOUR help to get it running across Montana.

[**Can you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us keep it on the air?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56903?t=6&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56903?t=7&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56903?t=8&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
---
Generations of my family have farmed the land I work on today just outside of Big Sandy.

I know the Montana that’s worth protecting, because I’ve lived it every day.

**Where we look out for each other, and our word is our bond.**

But like so much of our state, things are changing. Things are too expensive, some folks are forced to sell their family farms, and we’re losing access to our public lands. _Hell, even some of our favorite bars are closing._

The truth is folks back in Washington don’t care what’s happening out here, but I’m defending our way of life with everything I’ve got.

**A big chunk of our advertising budget comes from emails like the one you’re reading—so we’re counting on you to chip in today and help us get our message out.**

[**Click here split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help us spread our message across Montana and win this thing »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56903?t=9&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56905?t=10&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56906?t=11&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56907?t=12&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56908?t=13&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56909?t=14&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK)
—Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11710%2E878179%2E5Z5sBK) to request fewer emails. Joe Manchin just dropped out of the race for U.S. Senate, but don’t get too excited. **Democrats have raised over $81 million** to protect blue Senate seats, and they aren’t quitting even if Joe did.

**Manchin just left this race wide open for Chuck Schumer to hand-pick a brand new, ultra-liberal Democrat to run in Manchin’s place.**

_This fight isn’t over - it's just beginning._ We can’t risk a more challenging Democrat opponent from entering the race and blocking us from flipping this seat.

Democrats held this seat because they spent millions deceiving voters into thinking they represented their values. And they’ll do it again if we don’t stop them.

Our team has to send a strong message to the Democrats today, and we need your help. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

* * *
_**We don’t need to tell you what’s at stake in this election:**_
_Trump allegedly:_

\- **Incited an insurrection** against our government
\- **Mishandled and shared** classified documents
\- **Attempted to knowingly overturn** legitimate election results
\- **And falsified his business records** to pay Stormy Daniels hush money

Is this really the man Americans want to be President??? _**Surely not...**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: From One Veteran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12774154?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=1d1b135fb0&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
Friend,

Did you know California has the largest veteran population of any state in the United States? Veterans Day is special to me and the thousands of other military veterans living in our Central Valley. It was a pleasure and privilege to serve this great nation, and I am so honored to have worn the uniform, as did my parents and grandparents before me.

Too often, politicians just pay lip service to the needs of veterans. Many don’t understand the unique needs and mental health challenges from our service, and the continuing struggle to get continuity of care through veteran healthcare.

NO elected veterans are serving in Congress that represent California’s Central Valley. For the rest of California, only a handful served in the military. One of the reasons I’m running for Congress is to provide better representation for my fellow veterans here in the Central Valley.

This campaign won’t be easy, but the military taught me _there isn’t anything worth having that is easy_.

If you can, [please help my campaign today with a $5 or $10 gift.](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=0a9ff386e1&e=1722d05e10)
---
| [$5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=2cb2ba4804&e=1722d05e10 "$5 FRIDAY")
---
| Your donation will help us change the direction of this country and provide better representation for all of our veterans.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._
---
| | | | | | | [](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=b258aa4231&e=1722d05e10)

Peter -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=56b96a7098af45c198a90789a3d543b8&_e=6ljz5nVZWgX-uMXRIOXyJ8oS1Y9N8wL1OBaByCWBm8Tlh5nhKmH5MCR27xiNuTSYw2RRadeeZEZ2ML-IoutY0-ayyTcIKm1Ah58vJNy7ArQFICxYlPxhXeMHftqO5WFgimPuT3qe7Iko_IdKXtCMBgg1UajYBjKndXrRWmXFDnfTjr4iRq9uqPDoJdY7WSQkt4yAoAoX20opekiXnoLWKC5uHETxqiZkoaYKMm5SEwjB1KODl3DRJRLJlSSXv23fx_J8sYXAH-UsUYNTiPnMof6YTFBl9X9i7pJsPnhpoBAXA68KdjqMfbJ5i3EsMesMyexmVpN8mtT50RiuCm7vCHFXySf7YbA3Stoo37ixWmVFNOmuuydaA83zA3jpNTyY3XpassoxoSrD6GAqkwxD3sy8NULkBdIMfEGxE6bJAYM%3D)

Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=56b96a7098af45c198a90789a3d543b8&_e=6ljz5nVZWgX-uMXRIOXyJ8oS1Y9N8wL1OBaByCWBm8Tlh5nhKmH5MCR27xiNuTSYw2RRadeeZEZ2ML-IoutY0-ayyTcIKm1Ah58vJNy7ArQFICxYlPxhXeMHftqO5WFgimPuT3qe7Iko_IdKXtCMBgg1UajYBjKndXrRWmXFDnfTjr4iRq9uqPDoJdY7WSQkt4yAoAoX20opekiXnoLWKC5uHETxqiZkoaYKMm5SEwjB1KODl3DRJRLJlSSXv23ffgPf8YknQUldYQsI_lSWGuab3_oho-JBQn3K60xvU_Q7CKIi7yPUqIaApDAjLZQNCW408hIYodLhQfc6JSeUIpLvvSP33imYBZZJPORQNdZo8Mih_JBDcX8g8saTsMi-q6yw-LQnpULv1roCljnRplLYzEUc-05OaDtEW-UXM5w%3D)

As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=56b96a7098af45c198a90789a3d543b8&_e=6ljz5nVZWgX-uMXRIOXyJ8oS1Y9N8wL1OBaByCWBm8Tlh5nhKmH5MCR27xiNuTSYw2RRadeeZEZ2ML-IoutY0-ayyTcIKm1Ah58vJNy7ArQFICxYlPxhXeMHftqO5WFgimPuT3qe7Iko_IdKXtCMBgg1UajYBjKndXrRWmXFDnfTjr4iRq9uqPDoJdY7WSQkt4yAoAoX20opekiXnoLWKC5uHETxqiZkoaYKMm5SEwjB1KODl3DRJRLJlSSXv23fORHLOM7oYd1K2N8fkA09w73dI7IySpbV4INtxSL8wYIStGHTISBZuXMbr7Ht0kW_bgshca7n__063gkXlOZ7TOXk0rtZA9bxbqUUbjHfrh032Vo9lj8X5rjlbS3FaUyG4HC2CFviUvrHyacOO2p7Eud8rToCJFI2WoiNkMKsbjM%3D)

name: Team Schiff
subject: “Schiff polling neck and neck in California Senate race” — LA Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| We just got some breaking news from the _Los Angeles Times_ with less than 100 days until early voting begins, folks: **_“U.S. Senate race remains wide-open affair as candidate field expands”_**
_— Berkeley IGS/LA Times, Friday, 11/3_ **With Adam’s race “nearly a dead heat” and around one-third of likely voters still undecided, we have to build our resources _right now_ to help Adam win on March 5.**

According to the _San Francisco Chronicle,_ **“it costs roughly $4 million a week to air TV ads statewide. The Los Angeles market alone could run a candidate $2 million.”**

[This could be the most expensive U.S. Senate race in the country — and because Adam isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money, he needs your help to hit tonight’s emergency $100,000 midnight goal so we can reach the undecided voters we need to win. Will you rush a split contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign of $10 or any amount you can afford today?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56965?t=6&akid=11705%2E878179%2EcKoGx4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56966?t=7&akid=11705%2E878179%2EcKoGx4)

Adam has always counted on this grassroots team’s support, and he needs it now more than ever. Thanks for stepping up with whatever support you can give — it means the world to him.

— Team Schiff
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11705%2E878179%2EcKoGx4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11705%2E878179%2EcKoGx4).**

The Los Angeles market alone could run a candidate $2 million.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | Adam has always counted on this grassroots team’s support, and he needs it now more than ever. Thanks for stepping up with whatever support you can give — it means the world to him. — Team Schiff | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: We’ve got to grow this team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_t=UzUWZoXslTbpAWoYR2LWmWPMv02JFViir3AaO4yNN95pmrP_Y0_01ghZxFQx91b0PvXlSS7_Bvu_mRqclQHaFtpPN3Z-LRdwsFrFtZSZRqo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_t=UzUWZoXslTbpAWoYR2LWmWPMv02JFViir3AaO4yNN95pmrP_Y0_01ghZxFQx91b0PvXlSS7_Bvu_mRqclQHaFtpPN3Z-LRdwsFrFtZSZRqo%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_e=gsZ5YhVlZkJJzZgbcuFVc4NJuige0lviPTM7Fi49TEX7Xxv9vEXyzEkhO8s-kTYOL00sV2Iqc2Sm6apyJWmZBsm_gB_lWabc-BDSYln_fE-94l2yZ7o0R-eQ0y8gmRMnMfXeKK1hd0JIjhsSepevJ-4wU2pqbxjueTweuiyxe5goiZQjFzXT3_k6f1E3iQBpzl8M_fT6JI73uncP-hBjPcT1UrYugpzvIoGpxt3hFwk1BWGAZ8EC-lr-PCN8cUQoC6EsXtCEG57PPK6xS90nUu5en5ojZC8x4fJVrVMxfBkM8sOZMko7NyS0iWkBNZPqhGgYBuei61X2mnC0YP4oeKtyOBRIjhLkmueQvx1fXT6z5WROQ8J5cvCLWo5Dte1lav3In4LnqJMwOO5b7Wgf-qpOWQsYb72RQ6cWXPEjf8E%3D)
---
Fellow American -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_e=gsZ5YhVlZkJJzZgbcuFVc4NJuige0lviPTM7Fi49TEX7Xxv9vEXyzEkhO8s-kTYOL00sV2Iqc2Sm6apyJWmZBsm_gB_lWabc-BDSYln_fE-94l2yZ7o0R-eQ0y8gmRMnMfXeKK1hd0JIjhsSepevJ-4wU2pqbxjueTweuiyxe5goiZQjFzXT3_k6f1E3iQBpzl8M_fT6JI73uncP-hBjPcT1UrYugpzvIoGpxt3hFwk1BWGAZ8EC-lr-PCN8cUQojTW7WkFKDrvcpjvfqBX-lPnuy6_2HIJtoC6v9p0QaqnfIUAKR3tXmx6mdYJC-BFGQHUApBRy8YxTOVhsDyoNo64na5lkGzlAiv7jKKhJrSUjLFxz_mOLDHIqxB9kIkbbUlHwwecnUJKdcxdyG_F3Fa_ynx_V2n4DTUbiMNe7fLw%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_e=gsZ5YhVlZkJJzZgbcuFVc4NJuige0lviPTM7Fi49TEX7Xxv9vEXyzEkhO8s-kTYOL00sV2Iqc2Sm6apyJWmZBsm_gB_lWabc-BDSYln_fE-94l2yZ7o0R-eQ0y8gmRMnMfXeKK1hd0JIjhsSepevJ-4wU2pqbxjueTweuiyxe5goiZQjFzXT3_k6f1E3iQBpzl8M_fT6JI73uncP-hBjPcT1UrYugpzvIoGpxt3hFwk1BWGAZ8EC-lr-PCN8cUQoitb0QdR5cxI_o4yjdNbxySFazF7FJYq485MR4YxiVWroddBGgUZp-YPwata47TVsk2KQGPfkfHMS2zT_1rEoRiwPx49lev0uYc38UHUXdUfQOu3bNnijeiVXIam8dkcRfbwD0e3HajL5VqMAIW2Ah9gnGRlRbR4uewnzEP91JZM%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f066b351ff674448b63faf2836ac4e80&_e=gsZ5YhVlZkJJzZgbcuFVc4NJuige0lviPTM7Fi49TEX7Xxv9vEXyzEkhO8s-kTYOL00sV2Iqc2Sm6apyJWmZBsm_gB_lWabc-BDSYln_fE-94l2yZ7o0R-eQ0y8gmRMnMfXeKK1hd0JIjhsSepevJ-4wU2pqbxjueTweuiyxe5goiZQjFzXT3_k6f1E3iQBpzl8M_fT6JI73uncP-hBjPcT1UrYugpzvIoGpxt3hFwk1BWGAZ8EC-lr-PCN8cUQook3fM7TIgFCk61hOe9O6BzxgcZFUWRepU_GBWj6jb1BfiU8rHbSacrucMNKeN6Ng6YS2JboTyflfJs-fYX8JHvhRt2pRVR801IjtsObwAlg_nL7zNlBUy_yYP9lSlunN4c8IucGQQF-hAcJDmDaM6cZyLtq0fgehqd3R4GQGIw8%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. clean_body: It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | | Fellow American - I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well. Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give. Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed. Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, I am going to need every patriot to step forward. So please, With respect, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. | **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

clean_body: This just changed the entire race... | | Peter, Joe Manchin just dropped out of the race for U.S. Senate, but don’t get too excited. Democrats have raised over $81 million to protect blue Senate seats, and they aren’t quitting even if Joe did. Manchin just left this race wide open for Chuck Schumer to hand-pick a brand new, ultra-liberal Democrat to run in Manchin’s place. | This fight isn’t over - it's just beginning. We can’t risk a more challenging Democrat opponent from entering the race and blocking us from flipping this seat. Democrats held this seat because they spent millions deceiving voters into thinking they represented their values. And they’ll do it again if we don’t stop them. Our team has to send a strong message to the Democrats today, and we need your help. Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

subject: Long Island's Red Wave
body:
Peter,

I'm excited to share the incredible strides the Republican Party has made across Long Island. Our recent victories in Nassau and Suffolk Counties indicate our growing strength and influence.

In Nassau, we maintained a solid majority on the County Legislature, flipping seats from Blue to Red. Republicans took control of the City of Long Beach for the first time in decades as well as a majority in North Hempstead - the first time since 1989. In Suffolk, Ed Romaine's win as County Executive mark significant achievements.

Republicans now largely control nearly all of Nassau's towns and cities, a testament to our party's strong presence and effective leadership.

HELP US WIN, AGAIN → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Long+Islands+Red+Wave+Email]

As we face important races ahead, your continued support is crucial.

Your donations will help us maintain our momentum and meet challenges head-on.

We will keep this seat in strong REPUBLICAN hands, but I NEED your help. Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Long+Islands+Red+Wave+Email]

name: A New Direction
subject: Honoring those who served
body:
[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,Our veterans embody the very essence of courage, selflessness, and resilience. They have defended our freedoms and protected our way of life, often at great personal cost. Their unwavering commitment to the principles of liberty and justice has shaped the course of history and allowed us to live in a nation of unparalleled opportunity and freedom. On this Veterans Day, let us come together as a community to recognize the immeasurable contributions of our veterans. We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never truly be repaidWe encourage you to take a moment to reflect on the sacrifices our veterans have made and continue to make. Reach out to the veterans in your life and let them know that their service is not forgotten.We wanted to take a moment to express our deepest gratitude to all the brave men and women who have served our nation in the armed forces. It is an honor and a privilege to commemorate this special day and pay tribute to the sacrifices made by our veterans. We are grateful for the opportunity to serve our community, and we look forward to working together to support our veterans and their families.Thank you,A New Direction [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-j/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-i/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xludjit-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xludjit-dihkkhuuli-h/)
---

name: Jon Tester
subject: Not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Hey there, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you.
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $5 or more donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans.
That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country.
— Jon
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjqelkekua165nnotutch1mgfln1l8hgmm7ers6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdie6o76chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3qfnd7ne2ro131vsit03npr4dtcgbhi2ia7s5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdie6o76chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znducc012e9ofi15bt0k6dgbo1nu44qt7hr4ob5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdie6o76chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Trump Train News

name: American Patriot Daily

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: What I’m about to ask you is different than all those endless fundraising emails in your inbox. I promise.
body:
My full statement enclosed.

| |
---
| | | Look - I know you're probably drowning in a sea of emails, but what I'm about to ask you today is different than all those.

This is Kevin McCarthy.

With the holidays rapidly approaching, House Republicans are starting to strategize their game plan ahead of 2024.

Next year's election could change history: right now, the Liberal mob has power in both the Senate and White House, and they're clawing with everything they've got to take our Republican House Majority.

Friend, we're the only thing our Conservative agenda has at the moment, so it is imperative that we are all on the same page.

Majority Whip Tom Emmer just launched his _**[Official Year-End Majority Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg4vqvms4ij59vmknf1ag48rpbag9rn1s9mcbmco_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs "Official Year-End Majority Survey")**_ to better understand what is needed from House Republicans to do our job for the American people and hold the line to protect our Majority.

**So, with all due respect, would you please record your responses?**

---
| | [TAKE THE OFFICIAL SURVEY](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2rj2kvm9smjuls6otkasjlgkj420mcnp4mv4c00_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs "TAKE THE OFFICIAL SURVEY")
---

I will personally be flagging the responses of Conservatives who respond to the official survey within the next 10 minutes for the Majority Whip, so suggest getting yours in at your earliest convenience.

_**[Take Whip Emmer's Official Year-End Majority Survey using the secure link attached here.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8rrkasa2p4v2semv6uu61n5pnc6q8dsrgv258o0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs "Take Whip Emmer’s Official Year-End Majority Survey using the secure link attached here.")**_

Thanks for all you do,

Kevin

---
|
---
| | Paid for by Team Emmer, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Emmer for Congress and Electing Majority Making Effective Republicans (Emmer PAC)
---

Suite 101
Athens, GA 30605

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RZtbAFQWJiZ%2bIHM2Q8bhtA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DPNq1YHs4cIWTgGGq8gfKg&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673925%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MwuJYDASVtwBV3AbPwy0ng&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673926%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o7rVA13iOnBXmLoGqjEcOQ&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqbfm1mo60bf70dag2v7q9ncrp7r4fgegqeuak5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze6pt798c904gvsfrfa1021ci396d724cl64jjm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlafs9ra2sfcc5fegf1cimi0qcukp4gmlvie39sg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj1skte70qf57sij5ikiq5moucg1hq4uhh8v79s0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)
---
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing—in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch—citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ecjrfct7korvbjr78v97h9kqoff944t9he50do_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)**_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfert5sfuiviek7gec2q98hrjgj1spmqorklo64o_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses—free of charge. We already reach millions—we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K–12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY—to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd0iopbvja5c9h2hp0o39cr5k6itlfoh0vb9fau0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.”** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvmd8k15ak8sad4sdi29nbdqtjq2tuvtb7md8j4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z984olfbqatfm9n9toebud4m49q7u17169ca5ne0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdjpu9g6lnrskeas8t989ko9fpru4huv163ko2ao_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi3uaii5m6rcu14nrnap2kgelj6g5daiqro7p9co_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Harmeet K. Dhillon
subject: It only took one appointment to ruin her life
body:
One appointment was all it took.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl57c432negpshk9o2pajugfobl0kcio6ld24qo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5c5h2bs)
---
Friend,One appointment was all it took.**After one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic, doctors fast tracked a 16-year-old girl into a double mastectomy.** _Not because she had aggressive cancer, and not because she had some rare condition that made it necessary..._ But because like so many other girls with mental health comorbidities, Luka Hein had been convinced she was a man in a woman’s body. And instead of giving her the mental health counseling she needed, doctors scheduled her for a permanent, painful and life altering procedure that she’d never recover from.Now, I don’t know how much you know about transgender medical “treatment.”Because of the multiple cases we’ve taken on in the past two years on this issue, I know a lot more than I ever thought I would.But even by transgender activist standards, a double mastectomy, as the first form of “treatment,” is careless and dangerous.Almost every hospital that offers what the Left calls “gender affirming care” insists on prescribing patients with puberty blockers, hormones, or some combination of the two for at least one year before putting them under the scalpel. **But the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic showed no regard for Luka’s wellbeing –[and that’s why we’re suing them.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpsdkf0271vo2c1n99u9tv1pj1oqpeogbj6qkl20_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5c5h2bs)**Because this is bigger than Luka, and it’s bigger than the University of Nebraska Medical Center. Our children are under attack.>From our hospitals to our schools to our government to our media, kids are bombarded with transgender propaganda.If they show any signs of distress or deviation from the status quo, trusted adults and authority figures tell them that their real problem is being born the “wrong” body and there’s a simple solution. They tell young, impressionable kids that they can change their name, change their gender, get some new clothes, get medication, have a few surgeries and it will fix them.And they tell them everything is reversible if they change their mind later. They tell parents that they can either have a “dead daughter or a live son” – meaning that if their children aren’t allowed to transition, they’ll eventually kill themselves.But none of that is true.The truth is, so many of these kids end up more broken, suicidal and depressed AFTER transitioning than they were before. The truth is, they’re setting these kids and their families up for a lifetime of medical complications and ailments.And the truth is that if patriots like you don’t step up now, it’s only a matter of time before this evil reaches your loved ones. **[That’s why I hope I can count on your generous, tax deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty, to fund our lawsuit on behalf of Luka Hein and cases like hers.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zombjfgtj12h2ese5b8qj05svjfd15619vjg0k28_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5c5h2bs)** Luka is one of three detransitioners we represent in landmark lawsuits against the hospitals and doctors responsible for mutilating their bodies as minors.We’ve taken on case after case because we know just how important it is to protect vulnerable children.I’ve sat face to face with young women that have had their lives and their health stolen from them. **_I can’t change what’s been done to them – but with your help, I can make these gender clinics pay._** And if we can win this case, we can send a loud, clear message to hospitals nationwide that our children are NOT lab rats.They aren’t science experiments, they aren’t blank checks for Big Pharma, and they aren’t political pawns for the radical Left.If we win this lawsuit, we could set a precedent nationwide and save thousands of children from Luka’s fate.But as a nonprofit organization, that won’t happen without patriots like you.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Luka needed a psychiatrist, a counselor or a therapist. But instead, “doctors” gave her a radical double mastectomy – and her life will never be the same. **[Please give a generous, tax-deductible donation today to fund her lawsuit, hold her doctors accountable, and fight to ensure no other child has to go through what she went through.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37rd2d23e4nkalitgaaqj4uopn472t8fqfjv3n0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5c5h2bs)**
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2cujpsm80o349tvi875sogkhfddatdqa9m5u2s8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5c5h2bs)
---

And if we can win this case, we can send a loud, clear message to hospitals nationwide that our children are NOT lab rats.They aren’t science experiments, they aren’t blank checks for Big Pharma, and they aren’t political pawns for the radical Left.If we win this lawsuit, we could set a precedent nationwide and save thousands of children from Luka’s fate.But as a nonprofit organization, that won’t happen without patriots like you. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Luka needed a psychiatrist, a counselor or a therapist. But instead, “doctors” gave her a radical double mastectomy – and her life will never be the same. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6uqb23uu7c31avcf58jv703rngatg0dq1q7hev0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zksmmq0jqc7f6124a0c5urj1k3rif7p08460ms80_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znvi38cgplhrvl6u1g8hfd0o49q14hdjjgv0sgg0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znh8fa667f52vtabauuutb2497248mr35bkjrlv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg60ob5clh2bs)

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35300%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=my7lrqPg3B7EOE5OvyIEwQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35301%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zGpfdH18cdwEv08OSGyzGg&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35301%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zGpfdH18cdwEv08OSGyzGg&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: Team Dean
subject: honoring our veterans this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** In honor of our nation's veterans, we wanted to extend our gratitude to all our former service members — your dedication to our country and commitment to service is inspiring, today and always.

Of course, it’s not enough to just say “thank you.” Congress has the responsibility to support the brave men and women who have sacrificed so much – both in service and defense of our country.

**In Congress, Mad is committed to standing with our nation’s veterans – no one who has honorably served our country should feel like they have nowhere to turn.**

Whether through federal grants for veteran response teams in Montgomery County or legislation to protect service members and their children from dangerous exposure to PFAS – _Mad is working to keep the promise of sustained support for our veterans. They deserve nothing less._

**If you or a veteran you know is in need of support, the Veterans Crisis Line is accessible 24 hours per day, every day of the year. Just dial 988 & Press 1. [You can learn more and access additional resources here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73168468/437642479/-1944813199?refcode=11102023_md_veteransday_en_1&refcode2=93f71eed-5f80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Y3MWVlZC01ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LsiSKtqXr7wFcw6WJl3dzHWVXf1IP5_JcoUT_3w7zi8=&emci=3862f85f-4d7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=93f71eed-5f80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=36373569#:~:text=For%20more%20help%2C%20call%201,or%20elsewhere%20in%20your%20community)**

With gratitude,

Team Dean
* * *

clean_body: ** In honor of our nation's veterans, we wanted to extend our gratitude to all our former service members — your dedication to our country and commitment to service is inspiring, today and always. Of course, it’s not enough to just say “thank you.” Congress has the responsibility to support the brave men and women who have sacrificed so much – both in service and defense of our country. In Congress, Mad is committed to standing with our nation’s veterans – no one who has honorably served our country should feel like they have nowhere to turn. Whether through federal grants for veteran response teams in Montgomery County or legislation to protect service members and their children from dangerous exposure to PFAS – Mad is working to keep the promise of sustained support for our veterans. They deserve nothing less. If you or a veteran you know is in need of support, the Veterans Crisis Line is accessible 24 hours per day, every day of the year. Just dial 988 & Press 1. With gratitude, Team Dean Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. name: American Defense News
subject: The Dying Citizen
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr7cn54em1o7ovc578kfto0en6dq1ad4vjfsctso_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)
---
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing—in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch—citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4vkvvi7f4hlgibapoh484mr79ek7bdi28bni1u8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)**_
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp038qmisrulhnb9jojutjqc03sc9094nf4uvejo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses—free of charge. We already reach millions—we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K–12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY—to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf4budorgoqrma12pv9rkc22h91cpr07vtqaea1g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.”** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1j8nhc714trcsdlpoggl4bnhc9v0ra19g5cihgo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5eirka1k4g1dbhhtlmoorfcq4pkobehmr89bgmg_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chiecpb3c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp9sgb1a2u8itda1htvarkln5uc951lbq5heacu0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zadrgqb76an0vo8va9i3rh9ff3nejm7n3u81pmp0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4sjjm0ob0cpj649fg)
