name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkre6c64hg9iedb5bfvescr98a2vkd9bve62v8b8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ml9q3ecdle93tu35vdhg7d00c6v5j6n0p3btt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvurbkvpkcde3juu5jrcg933d0e7oor02bb2re4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl2iag3bq6be7oui2099h64cpobdn20h0af8dbd0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jg4ns184f6hrisme0u2n07rshb84975goa3990_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqucf9n77qcqdjlc0cmhj9v3bb2i3j6r3tb0omc0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

1600 Daily
---

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zev97ppicnohrpm4pgt0ukv1pgjcdvccinivv29g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zph9rj5dacjnboo3geq5ulp8ep19boahi9jprpn8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o36cph2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvti7o65n5kmec41sngu80fcsonk4rpfs8nfr67g_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrg8ttlvq3ph9vj7jto5ndp82uqvo6h7iicu668_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z79u54prqr7ri5d4lguf7obicur72nn5qvpb00ig_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg62o32cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr7v3uk2v6k0k20rm6ls8liqglcrciahsufeg0eo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor4cdh2bs)
---
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing—in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch—citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze6elfdj0mc1mpompk20g4qgu562hj7665115lr0_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor4cdh2bs)**_
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zga1i42ftq6sfa6hhh6332n99c9l1t663isqigt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor4cdh2bs)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses—free of charge. We already reach millions—we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K–12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY—to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvi2v8d63hcmlk6d9jq00tstbtq2j267nodkqbpo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor4cdh2bs)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.”** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd0rmsjsdaliditacbds7hk94enstlg0ckg7srk8_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor4cdh2bs)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8v8o889snbuh8fli4rrmth7nkddf5eig90o3h10_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor2clh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zepmldhl7ctjt9ctflg1rv920taut2mepvbk5rpo_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor2clh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57hu9qd1mh1e83v0kb80sff11aele33ptqvhr70_rp22sh2s8i66p74stg6eor2clh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: Volunteer Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Keeping You Posted on Mark's Campaign for U.S. Congress
| | | |
---
VOLUNTEER NEWSLETTER

Hello volunteers!
Before you know it, the year-end holidays and 2024 will be here. Mark's Congressional campaign for Nevada's 1st District will shift to full speed in the new year, and we definitely need your help. We will continue our grassroots efforts toward winning the primary on June 11, then, defeating Dina Titus and taking over her Congressional seat in November.
We will begin holding Meet & Greets and other events in January, and Mark hopes to speak to as many people as possible--that includes all of you who have volunteered your help and added supporters as well. If you have questions/comments for Mark or wish to simply tell him of your support, did you know you can schedule a time to talk with him by phone?
Use this link: [https://calendly.com/robertson-for-congress/phonecall-with-mark](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jK9oYO9BQ3mcwkoTqpGNoeKSQU30-EaMPdoMwQweOOVzOMFio1lHpcBxgwH2mjGPw7UhQ7BvEauXwdDQ5UbwwAVW-pICj3OpC4eEbJVnA2c9z4iYMUENgaW8U65rxOSD33hepFsp5z6b1JkGSeA4cMcUE7SM0oKcRNjHieNLUyR--oZoisgytErewqwYHUvd8UGbkMP6iy4=&c=vH-mVIk8GMaxp0WJnJyPIW7urPTLe9FbtQfr_X7JBoLoo3aOvJLG-Q==&ch=8IJC36iQKvGQL_5Lej-fRB0snDDXwWhjbb7v9sZmy8ad153wbDdOSg==). You can easily schedule a call with Mark at a time that is convenient to you. It's your chance to ask him questions and find out what you can do to help him win.
If you have any questions or suggestions or would like to become more active in Mark's campaign, please feel free to call me, Beth Weddle, Communications Director, 702-526-5934, or just reply to this message. Thanks for reading!
We need your help to beat Dina Titus and make Mark our Congressman from District 1 in 2024.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors.
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsFY7cLiNe

Mike Johnson for Congress

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of
God.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osFY7cLiNe

Friend -
I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no
secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our
nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created
equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the
government.

The
founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national
identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and
morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so
many American households through the generations, in our house,
we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and
serve people.

I know
our country is in desperate need of prayer.

Today I
am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our
nations, you'll join us.

We cannot
allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was
founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up
for our Republic.

STAND
WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON

God
bless,

Mike
Johnson
Speaker
of the House

MIKE JOHNSON

Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a
constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career
to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values
that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?

PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: =?utf-8?B?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: Did you donate eight thousand times?
body:
Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.

Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673922%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W5%2fnp77dI4%2bmgyPIZeKd3w&sysid=1)

Dear Friend,

Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.

But I recently did that to an unwitting and kind lady, Mrs. Gina, who was on record with the Federal Elections Commission for making thousands of donations through the Republican donation platform, WinRed.

Mrs. Gina was kind enough to invite me into her living room to discuss her supposed donations, which shocked her.

**[Watch her reaction here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673923%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nbfL72wh7KusVyz%2bSvyqKw&sysid=1).**
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673924%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aeYP39x3KEdMqndIb272Bw&sysid=1) Our investigation of WinRed is a follow-up to **[our report on ActBlue](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673935%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M1k0pDDfAY9Sc62hNqhr4g&sysid=1)** - the democrat counterpart to WinRed.

Both organizations are Political Action Committees and the largest source of funding for both political parties and ALL campaigns . . . by miles.

While the Republican outfit WinRed has its issues with so-called "Dark Money," OMG has found that democrats have disproportionately benefitted from the unverified small donations through ActBlue.

Where is the money coming from if Mrs. Gina isn't donating over a hundred thousand dollars in nickel-sized transactions?

OMG has consulted with experts who have weighed in on the possibility that illegal foreign donations are the likely culprit.

For instance, Swiss billionaire Hansjorg Wyss is prohibited from donating directly to American candidates, PACs, and parties. Still, he has legally donated hundreds of millions to democrat and progressive causes, specifically organizations set up as 501(c)4s with the IRS.

And guess what? C4s can make unlimited donations to SuperPACs.

We’ve had scandals like this in the past. Remember China Gate?

In the 1996 elections, journalist Bob Woodward exposed a scheme where the People's Republic of China was caught red-handed, funneling money to support Bill Clinton's campaign.

Charlie Trie, Johnny Chung, John Huang, James Riady, and others were convicted of various crimes related to the scandal that funneled millions of dollars to democrat candidates and the Democrat Party.

Now, 30 years later, are we repeating the history of foreign nationals and governments influencing our elections?

**[With your support, we will find out.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673936%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AsvlPPcoBse%2bwgtFrin0lQ&sysid=1)**

OMG’s investigations have been fast, in-depth, and coming to the public rapidly - but that comes at the toil of our dedicated yet small staff.

Our journalists, researchers, and production staff have worked tirelessly seven days a week, and we need to staff up to provide reliable reinforcements for their hard work.

**[Will you donate as much as possible to help OMG grow and keep up the pace?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673937%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9qqfmKJ%2bHbbWPR96run3fA&sysid=1)**

And don't worry; your donation will go through a donation processor we trust who maintains transparent operations.

Every dollar helps, so please **[donate today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673938%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HFMToZidpvUXv47tpqy%2fGQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks again for your time reviewing our report, and I greatly appreciate any support you can offer.

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Honor Our Vets! Support VOTER ID !
body:
Stop & Shop in Stoneham Saturday 10 am to 12 pm
| | | |
---
WE HONOR THOSE WHO SERVED Today we take the time to honor those who have served. What better way to honor them than to make sure our votes count.
---
---
| [Visit the VOTER ID Website for Weekend Signing Locations Near You ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EqSKQxDeWd9MyouXoYGUnbfZOQd8fwJ5w5q_B_iKUF0m7uXTuWMtbXPLSvmdNE4sTWhj2iXLu2PX88vGmEwdJUSdMvazljzfueHwHcSSUY8ZjsKoul5VZswyXU2rs52rHgDmGmPGbudZTVjhNYOmv798q3q3hjTBEa56QVgH1Sef_gXK4I7mFrP6orth0zonhg590fwRwq4hIrGqZNbClI_sg-3-tSHwZHJBM8-46mJSMc2UDIZ6-BhrzP8fXhw3&c=SSczRbyqr7ANV8Q66SWBO0jQwzIKmbz-nDfTnpEoN35pRV6r4IsdyA==&ch=7k9k-lXAzKe61_-3eIen8CD1HqkmJFflEkFT1t7Y5tveD7N-ckbixg==)
---
|
---
Friends,
On this special day that we honor those who have served, let us remember that brave Americans gave their lives so we can be free. At the core of that freedom is the right to vote. Help us make VOTER ID a reality in Massachusetts by signing our petition this weekend. We need 74,516 certified signatures by November 22, 2023. Our goal is to collect 90,000. You can help with our effort!

Today and tomorrow, we will be out collecting for the VOTER ID ballot initiative in your area. We need a big weekend this weekend because the rain has hindered our efforts almost every weekend so far.

We will be at various locations throughout the state but for folks in the Stoneham area we will be at STOP and SHOP in Stoneham from 10 am to 12:00 pm today Saturday November 11th and would love to have your signature.
Please check out the website to locate a signing event in your area! We must keep standing up for election integrity, voter ID is a huge step in that direction.
Don't forget to thank a VET today!
PLEASE STOP BY DATE: Saturday November 11th Time: 10:00 am to 12:00 pm Where: Stop and Shop Main Street Stoneham
Thank you, Caroline Colarusso
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, Ma, MA 02180
---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 11.10.2023
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xzjta-didthutlhu-jt/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-r/) **November 9, 2023** Friend -We hope you're staying warm as the winter season approaches. Cozy up and read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP | On October 30, the Republican Party of Wisconsin [filed a complaint ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-y/)against Stevens Point City Clerk Kari Yenter. Yenter has capitalized on her position to unlawfully add qualifications and disclosures for prospective poll workers. While Yenter may try to hinder Republican access to the polls, the Wisconsin GOP is here to fight her every step of the way. We value election integrity and will not cease until we can ensure our places of voting are safe and secure.
Read [here ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-j/)for more information and a message from our Executive Director. Republican legislators passed two constitutional amendments that will appear on the ballot in 2024, and passed the first consideration another on voter ID. These amendments will make our voting process safer and more secure. These amendments include:
* [Assembly Joint Resolution 77](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-t/) will bar the state from receiving private funds to administer elections. This resolution will go on the ballot in April
* [Assembly Joint Resolution 76 ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-i/)will prohibit all non-citizens from voting in Wisconsin elections. This bill will be under review in November.
* [Assembly Joint Resolution 78](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-d/) will require that all citizens show proof of identification prior to using the ballot box.

---

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-h/) The November 30 deadline for poll-worker sign-ups is quickly approaching. Make sure to sign up to be one of our Republican nominated poll workers, and put yourself on the frontlines in our fight for election integrity! This is the most important way to protect the Wisconsin vote in upcoming elections.
[Senator Ron Johnson](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-k/) has already encouraged Republican leaders to step up to the plate and serve as poll workers in the upcoming election season - stay tuned for more messages from our amazing leadership! [SIGN-UP TODAY](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-u/) The Republican Party held its third Primary Presidential Debate on November 8 in Miami, Florida. Chris Christie, Nikki Haley, Ron DeSantis, Vivek Ramaswamy, and Tim Scott appeared on the stage. The debate was full of exciting moments, and we appreciate the intellectual diversity and astute capabilities that the candidates bring to the Republican Party!
The Fourth Presidential Primary Debate will be hosted on [December 6](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-o/) in Tuscaloosa, Alabama. Make sure to tune in!
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[ICYMI: WisDems Choose Political Cronyism over Wisconsin Students](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-b/)**
In case you missed it, Democrat State School Superintendent Jill Underly handed out a six-figure position in the Department of Public Instruction to a notorious left-wing political operative, Sachin Chheda.
**[ICYMI: WisGOP Files Complaint Against Stevens Point Clerk](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-a/)**
Today, the Republican Party of Wisconsin filed a complaint with the Wisconsin Elections Commission against Stevens Point City Clerk Kari Yenter for her unlawful imposition of additional qualifications and disclosures for prospective poll workers.
**[Another Jobs Report, Another"Bidenomics" Nightmare](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-f/)**
The economy added just 150,000 jobs in October - the second worst jobs report of Biden's presidency and well below economists' expectations.
**[A Vote for Democrats is a Vote For...](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-z/)**
It's Election Day in 37 states -- and the choices have never been clearer.
The simple reality is Democrats are inextricably linked to the failed policies of their party's leaders, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.
**[The Republican Point: Five Takeaways From This Week](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xzjta-didthutlhu-v/) **
1. Biden's China Cash
2. 60 Minutes of Disaster
3. More And More Border Lies
4. Republicans Stand With Israel
5. Bankrupt "Bidenomics"

This week proved yet again that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris can't defend their record, so they lie about it instead. In contrast, Republicans are delivering solutions, transparency, and accountability.

# **Worth the Read**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Peter, Today, we honor the countless sacrifices of America’s veterans. Because of the selflessness of our veterans and their loved ones, America is the freest, greatest country in the world. Serving my country was the greatest honor of my life, and I will never take our freedom for granted! I hope that you will join me in thanking our veterans for their service and honoring those who paid the ultimate sacrifice. Their devotion and dedication to our freedom will never be forgotten. name: Russell Prescott
subject: On this Veterans Day
body:
Let us all stand together in support of our veterans. |
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChwGNhshk1PFwhlUA2jXCUaYYNOvkTCJgzvoC5tvcLAteyufCjzdsJdDczyv3KLlPsYKx2TrTPAN8V2hW04auazydXP6GpVgGg-7Pgr7DhhVM&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==)
---
| Peter,
On this Veterans Day, I want to extend my deepest gratitude to the brave men and women who have served our great nation. Their sacrifices and dedication to preserving our freedom are truly commendable and deserve our utmost respect.
As a candidate for Congress, I am committed to advocating for policies that prioritize the well-being and support of our veterans. It is our duty to ensure that they have access to the healthcare, education, and employment opportunities they deserve upon returning home.
Let us not only honor our veterans on this special day but also remember that our commitment to them should be ongoing. Together, we can make a difference in the lives of those who have sacrificed so much for us.
Thank you for your continued support, and let us all stand together in support of our veterans.
Sincerely,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChwGNhshk1PFwhlUA2jXCUaYYNOvkTCJgzvoC5tvcLAteyufCjzdsJdDczyv3KLlPsYKx2TrTPAN8V2hW04auazydXP6GpVgGg-7Pgr7DhhVM&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==)
---
| Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-1
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChwGNhshk1PFwhlUA2jXCUaYYNOvkTCJgzvoC5tvcLAteyufCjzdsJdDczyv3KLlPsYKx2TrTPAN8V2hW04auazydXP6GpVgGg-7Pgr7DhhVM&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==)

|

---

| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChw_DcuH2GNELPawhnzI0sNeNgnrW9yxq3-IgOSbxxqV40Oc6vwLedBiGk0R5SwcFOQzvr4bcApKtONUjYHPlVtXKYcnrUDgq9qohqrhhw3u8&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==)
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---
|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChw_DcuH2GNELNbGXXcccpC7PLhaGwnWHfkTiEs9Rx1vT0X463-poxeoztZxrf5IO8pETsW37QKrzQtEBYnDgz6BawXClDkfQOjHfGq6LmW3h015rLwHe4ik=&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChw_DcuH2GNELLBa8j7592Fu2cpBcFcWTUPOKpEZ7DwgUGA7R6myzTobZjCmclWF7U5N4kaUUbDooIT2Wzv6B2F4H4t0nKP6ExRG14b4veqHo&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DIfGCXNWpjSIg5LbN_9gL-fGvMuP0rzF-xOATJsfIW6WuHLgMEzChw_DcuH2GNEL2OVMw5XZTbVtCo5XVB4FselTdPcqoHO2kvgpiJX0A9-hbldhEMMGs3MD_PCIiw_Y0qJd0HpIHiTwd4nChkUW1OE5wXvmcS7D0UbQIFzMso7n2qbfMF6hbQ==&c=2WNQhuVRaMltKBusQn2Nm-ezXXTDjGE1CCYkjVtWxSpni7EYWhUGlA==&ch=7SteQlhRuKNtUqMiLlWrh4qCFKeYy8eL1noikib_jyk8iqmfYKW86Q==)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I wore the cloth. And there is no greater honor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=738f148f0f500e9dcd09dd3bc2c8bb10b6f493fc9856ebddf99cbe5b591527eadcbd1e9c0ff530f4cc8dce28ddde18aef0041a4add2765ceaa5959a092acdc8989ca02496834321fa1bf0da90c51ca1c

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2

Friend,

I will never forget the day, sixteen years ago, when I deployed to Iraq with U.S. Navy SEAL Team One. In the wake of our nation's freedom coming under fire, I put on the cloth of my country, I shipped out with a sense of confidence, conviction, and patriotic duty to our nation, and I experienced the honor of my life. To the other candidates in this race, this Veterans Day may be symbolic. To me, it's personal.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2

As the only veteran in this race, I have a different perspective. The gravity of the situation we're now facing is nothing short of dire.

Our nation’s once-proud fighting force has been infected and paralyzed by a political agenda, our military recruitment levels have reached an all-time low, and yet we are expected to salute our "Commander-in-Chief," Joe Biden.

Not only is this a slap in the face to the veterans across this country, but it is an insult to every soldier who has come before our time:

-
Those 56 men who pledged their lives in Independence Hall in 1776 so that they could create a new nation conceived in liberty.
-
Our nation's first Republican President who stood at a cemetery in Gettysburg and pledged this nation to a new birth of freedom.
-
That band of brothers who stormed the beaches of Normandy, defeated the Nazis, and saved this world.

As a veteran, as a former Congressman, as Governor, and as a father, I have remained steadfast in my devotion to reminding those who will listen of the words of Ronald Reagan:

Freedom is one generation away from extinction; it's not passed along in the bloodstream, and it must be protected and cultivated.

Today, I am humbly asking you for support to help me fire Joe Biden and restore this mission and this sanity, pride, integrity, and capability to the chief office of our military.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2
Support my campaign for President

And friend, I am also asking you for one more thing. Please, especially today, think back on the freedom you've had the privilege to enjoy in this nation, thank a veteran in your life, and choose to stand on the side of freedom today, and always.

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd4854ccc3daeb0d17877e5b27549108e8e4bd2d87d1b8c070d95da1c160f7c167157a846ec9e1c1a66b7a4ab3fd68a4648eff895fdf8f9dfa

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbdee853b560c119612be997a2fc8dd2f9930d0b767f6d8e8f8936a6e7680b5cd448fd1f9ec437eebd42bff603ad8434b89db5aa9c7fb0a912c
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd3463419b48da3eb5cb98c205152d248a7d036959cc6b38fe21cfe027ec435f50744bee133fd2ba07c529c96c09b8a612efc66fb8381e99af
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=40a1f245185f4dbd85acead5bd55d3f326c23cb2d9a6ba2b05863c74e7c928b150410d04df536e7b5a910724bb0b09d81f6cb2b75a42b581ad573627f41ed7c2

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, I will never forget the day, sixteen years ago, when I deployed to Iraq with U.S. Navy SEAL Team One. In the wake of our nation's freedom coming under fire, I put on the cloth of my country, I shipped out with a sense of confidence, conviction, and patriotic duty to our nation, and I experienced the honor of my life. To the other candidates in this race, this Veterans Day may be symbolic. To me, it's personal. As the only veteran in this race, I have a different perspective. The gravity of the situation we're now facing is nothing short of dire. Our nation’s once-proud fighting force has been infected and paralyzed by a political agenda, our military recruitment levels have reached an all-time low, and yet we are expected to salute our "Commander-in-Chief," Joe Biden. Not only is this a slap in the face to the veterans across this country, but it is an insult to every soldier who has come before our time: - Those 56 men who pledged their lives in Independence Hall in 1776 so that they could create a new nation conceived in liberty. - Our nation's first Republican President who stood at a cemetery in Gettysburg and pledged this nation to a new birth of freedom. - That band of brothers who stormed the beaches of Normandy, defeated the Nazis, and saved this world. As a veteran, as a former Congressman, as Governor, and as a father, I have remained steadfast in my devotion to reminding those who will listen of the words of Ronald Reagan: Freedom is one generation away from extinction; it's not passed along in the bloodstream, and it must be protected and cultivated. Today, I am humbly asking you for support to help me fire Joe Biden and restore this mission and this sanity, pride, integrity, and capability to the chief office of our military. Support my campaign for President And friend, I am also asking you for one more thing. Please, especially today, think back on the freedom you've had the privilege to enjoy in this nation, thank a veteran in your life, and choose to stand on the side of freedom today, and always. Yours in Freedom, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35318%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cJBWBOGrRWsgEz7DcLdAxQ&sysid=1)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35319%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YfLlQ8uYr8ZvSOhcrBUvEw&sysid=1)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35310%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=es85As0HhjYre8O6UU7DFg&sysid=1)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Your America News
---

subject: Did you donate eight thousand times?
body:
Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.

Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35326%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vk%2bVNi5iN4ox015j1Zy7ug&sysid=1)

Dear Friend,

Imagine if I knocked on your door and asked you if you made 8,000 donations to political candidates for a total of $154k . . . you would likely be on the verge of passing out.

But I recently did that to an unwitting and kind lady, Mrs. Gina, who was on record with the Federal Elections Commission for making thousands of donations through the Republican donation platform, WinRed.

Mrs. Gina was kind enough to invite me into her living room to discuss her supposed donations, which shocked her.

**[Watch her reaction here](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35327%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8OnGH%2fxNHbHrRB%2fpxMi2nQ&sysid=1).**
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35328%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b3oka5icxnm2G8PbewILEA&sysid=1) Our investigation of WinRed is a follow-up to **[our report on ActBlue](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35329%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=deSHDxEx4MDEu2GIT5Q0Vg&sysid=1)** - the democrat counterpart to WinRed.

Both organizations are Political Action Committees and the largest source of funding for both political parties and ALL campaigns . . . by miles.

While the Republican outfit WinRed has its issues with so-called "Dark Money," OMG has found that democrats have disproportionately benefitted from the unverified small donations through ActBlue.

Where is the money coming from if Mrs. Gina isn't donating over a hundred thousand dollars in nickel-sized transactions?

OMG has consulted with experts who have weighed in on the possibility that illegal foreign donations are the likely culprit.

For instance, Swiss billionaire Hansjorg Wyss is prohibited from donating directly to American candidates, PACs, and parties. Still, he has legally donated hundreds of millions to democrat and progressive causes, specifically organizations set up as 501(c)4s with the IRS.

And guess what? C4s can make unlimited donations to SuperPACs.

We’ve had scandals like this in the past. Remember China Gate?

In the 1996 elections, journalist Bob Woodward exposed a scheme where the People's Republic of China was caught red-handed, funneling money to support Bill Clinton's campaign.

Charlie Trie, Johnny Chung, John Huang, James Riady, and others were convicted of various crimes related to the scandal that funneled millions of dollars to democrat candidates and the Democrat Party.

Now, 30 years later, are we repeating the history of foreign nationals and governments influencing our elections?

**[With your support, we will find out.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35320%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sfW3lBVXcMXN6qzQ3ZltHw&sysid=1)**

OMG’s investigations have been fast, in-depth, and coming to the public rapidly - but that comes at the toil of our dedicated yet small staff.

Our journalists, researchers, and production staff have worked tirelessly seven days a week, and we need to staff up to provide reliable reinforcements for their hard work.

**[Will you donate as much as possible to help OMG grow and keep up the pace?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35321%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xUgkjP0u7B%2boYLGO0nnadA&sysid=1)**

And don't worry; your donation will go through a donation processor we trust who maintains transparent operations.

Every dollar helps, so please **[donate today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35322%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yNH6S%2fqqTcbSQ2lITq8oow&sysid=1)**

Thanks again for your time reviewing our report, and I greatly appreciate any support you can offer.

In Truth,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35326%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vk%2bVNi5iN4ox015j1Zy7ug&sysid=1)

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: Please let me hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It's been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you're not on Team Johnson yet. We're emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd57ca63813f44a8bec763e71d95b998&_e=LQe4Py7pD1vlHjH-y7KjRpgCuC5v1zyszr08E4RWq2l-tFLcLdh4QveqyudriNxCPLcoaFc-jKqORaBuptC9Rq3lrf5F-rwqJMAavArpTGKycTHR3TalGO3ADL0Ax4thaDCZXXOGrP8e1cqUYamnYA-iqWO3BxihwfVpbMs6uQ4suEac9yJlvHJexM3iX3r7BMJ9PgfMfsnubv45Yq-ADPP18ZwIkvUDcqJGV-fvYulcBel8qax4iMmBiYdhbl3Tn0hSPX2kCn63QvH658aLIA0ASfc6t6YpWhkew3dYGIoHVPkv8ekSSIjxn3yZgx4vGmh7FWeeMM6al1eqgXOZsTYCt1ZJwvVpBTf8MWP07N8SwTQp9xYrigiANGETgIW0YOAaEra8B9XmeqyFtg_PPnqQjqulyZYjqz1AEL8SpA4%3D)
---
Fellow American -

I'm still settling into my new office - both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I'm going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur - but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn't a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we've been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that's what I intend to give.

[**I 'm reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd57ca63813f44a8bec763e71d95b998&_e=LQe4Py7pD1vlHjH-y7KjRpgCuC5v1zyszr08E4RWq2l-tFLcLdh4QveqyudriNxCPLcoaFc-jKqORaBuptC9Rq3lrf5F-rwqJMAavArpTGKycTHR3TalGO3ADL0Ax4thaDCZXXOGrP8e1cqUYamnYA-iqWO3BxihwfVpbMs6uQ4suEac9yJlvHJexM3iX3r7BMJ9PgfMfsnubv45Yq-ADPP18ZwIkvUDcqJGV-fvYulcBel8qax4iMmBiYdhbl3Tn0hSPX2kCn63QvH658aLINsJV8od-zs1mMaRS5x7fwo9cFbXPI-iqCtz1sVPi9Ur7RHWf0okoPM_2rVitwkNeXAQFgHe2696DB8Mp1kb5oEYLs6naKGKoWAc16gJS5zWqOxEJasCZa8rtbjRrQLRSU2rSfmAqYUjv1Aa4zZ-F2s%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd57ca63813f44a8bec763e71d95b998&_e=LQe4Py7pD1vlHjH-y7KjRpgCuC5v1zyszr08E4RWq2l-tFLcLdh4QveqyudriNxCPLcoaFc-jKqORaBuptC9Rq3lrf5F-rwqJMAavArpTGKycTHR3TalGO3ADL0Ax4thaDCZXXOGrP8e1cqUYamnYA-iqWO3BxihwfVpbMs6uQ4suEac9yJlvHJexM3iX3r7BMJ9PgfMfsnubv45Yq-ADPP18ZwIkvUDcqJGV-fvYulcBel8qax4iMmBiYdhbl3Tn0hSPX2kCn63QvH658aLIKVXJ_5Y3tdktFub88OvNL9HDeMBk5D2gZC_FLhh95_Qex1-l52GWkoU8E3v3cgDRVNl_XgZGG7hFXv_tNPtK6WCBghbNbkwF1cUPbAU2GsdxYpF7QsVxU2hfm7BBkfVFh1TLHHJbVfHtnWzCQYU4es%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November's election is going to be a tall order - [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd57ca63813f44a8bec763e71d95b998&_e=LQe4Py7pD1vlHjH-y7KjRpgCuC5v1zyszr08E4RWq2l-tFLcLdh4QveqyudriNxCPLcoaFc-jKqORaBuptC9Rq3lrf5F-rwqJMAavArpTGKycTHR3TalGO3ADL0Ax4thaDCZXXOGrP8e1cqUYamnYA-iqWO3BxihwfVpbMs6uQ4suEac9yJlvHJexM3iX3r7BMJ9PgfMfsnubv45Yq-ADPP18ZwIkvUDcqJGV-fvYulcBel8qax4iMmBiYdhbl3Tn0hSPX2kCn63QvH658aLIHnRimzSE1Apgiq8u8QMFiqS9hmT1yRwNU7R7I3avWle7WBELxe8UvTDh18S3xJJDFA5JDHtNxvRY0uX6J04tO2lV0MGk9kcFrhdKB2WsbUAXU7h8IxnMiqkiiLAszT-ZI6DAolcbYGOLzJpcS-hops%3D)

I'll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn't have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd57ca63813f44a8bec763e71d95b998&_e=LQe4Py7pD1vlHjH-y7KjRpgCuC5v1zyszr08E4RWq2l-tFLcLdh4QveqyudriNxCPLcoaFc-jKqORaBuptC9Rq3lrf5F-rwqJMAavArpTGKycTHR3TalGO3ADL0Ax4thaDCZXXOGrP8e1cqUYamnYA-iqWO3BxihwfVpbMs6uQ4suEac9yJlvHJexM3iX3r7BMJ9PgfMfsnubv45Yq-ADPP18ZwIkvUDcqJGV-fvYulcBel8qax4iMmBiYdhbl3Tn0hSPX2kCn63QvH658aLIC5K0Q0cHS6xmr2wNtWcedAh-atCDHwjkgswjQCKYsKAaEd-CYw_-1Cj1ydZoSYoCT555ppbc1LKi8cJxE7OMnPgdDw87li5mWnH_dy1VRCauE9PxUKyFKQ8d5WpI2yOVQO8xOO_UaL0hvwi9Q55z6E%3D)

clean_body: It's been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you're not on Team Johnson yet. We're emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | Fellow American - I'm still settling into my new office - both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I'm going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur - but productive and exciting as well. Believe it or not, there wasn't a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we've been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that's what I intend to give. Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed. Holding on to the House majority in next November's election is going to be a tall order - I'll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn't have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, I am going to need every patriot to step forward. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop oil and gas drilling on public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop fossil fuel companies from drilling on public lands and pumping greenhouse gas emissions into the air! >> [Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The Department of Interior is about to lease more than **2,000 acres** of our public lands to the fossil fuel company willing to put up the most cash. People, our wild places, and the climate are all at risk. **Nearly a QUARTER of all U.S. emissions comes from fossil fuel extraction on public lands.** Precious American landscapes are being razed to mine coal, drill for oil, and frack for gas. What do you gain from this? Scarred public lands, an increasingly heated planet, and fossil fuel companies’ hands. [**Tell the Department of Interior: don’t lease our precious public lands to greedy fossil fuel companies!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113241?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***Your Signature is Missing*** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113242?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s no exaggeration to say we are in a **global emergency.** This summer was our _**HOTTEST EVER**_ on record. Canadian wildfires chased millions of Americans indoors to escape toxic smoke. Many of us couldn’t even go outside without worrying for our health.
Let’s be clear: these disasters are worsening because of the very fossil fuel companies that want to pump even more emissions into the air by drilling on our public lands. Opening more of our lands to them will only make the problem even worse.
[**November 20th Comment Deadline: Your time to help CANCEL these lease sales is running out. We need 3,921 more signatures to help us hit our midnight goal. Sign now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113243?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113244?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

On the eve of the Michigan Wolverines' critical game against undefeated Penn State, the Big 10 conference suspended head coach Jim Harbaugh for three regular season games.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O2zAQhJ-G6mRoSf0WLAw46pwqQEqBpJbWBqQoUCvbefuD7q68LXfmGwzm7326Gwq0Pn6biJp9moxjeuIEUAKUUk11MWuPKFEVqKEdhq7qZF0Xi_YW-hatA2zl7FrbS2uxbcCrvgKLqiAtK6ngvKrpGnUZ_FB34JvemdoPBkVd4Uyc8uVfopUX9OF_emK-uBSLoBfmbRfqKuQo5GjTumLeMj0N44tW3E-bkCO-OWPE0gQmPmYsw3YSajw4Tns6skOhbn8WHL_ShWxPJeJMRxTqhtFQ-H46EzdDj1Wo2683XwMDgCqynrcXhUB724m6epzAZ0f-ebKPAAAA___xtW-3) | |
# Saturday, November 11th, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **Today is Veterans Day, and we're grateful for each of America's military veterans. [On this day in 1919](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjztuwzAQRE9DdhK4_FhmwSKNOqdNKWzIpbUBbQoSIUG3D-y0mWqAGeDhfd2mG3Lh5_0THxRarhPGxjtNAB1Ap81kZQqZSJORFODi_aAGba2cg6Os6Dsli-gMZbhGf80EzltLEAEkB620gVeUG5zpffZ2gOyuEW32SMIqStzq2v9UfraZcjnrTmsf60OWMLe2bMJ8CD0KPR7H0c-8tbqer13osdWF4yb0ONfCCc93_Xt0NXc7NVrxuXUJT7mGtBxcCm-XQVh1fyCXN6b9b_0bAAD__3xWWq8), one year after the signing of the armistice that ended the fighting in WWI, President Woodrow Wilson proclaimed the first commemoration of Armistice Day, a remembrance of those who died in WWI. In 1954, President Dwight D. Eisenhower signed the bill that expanded Armistice Day into a celebration of all American veterans.

Thank you for your service! ## Michigan Football Coach Suspended
On the eve of the Michigan Wolverines' critical game against undefeated Penn State, the Big 10 conference [suspended head coach Jim Harbaugh](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHSoyAURp9Gu-sAIobCYpt02XZL5yoXuBkQR0h28vY72fr_6q845_x5rA_kxEf4jZmW5suKe-M3rVKClKDGVfdu8USKxp4Waaydxay07uOyGWdpN3KWxltvUMvN3naLo7OEkzQ9L0qoUX4npnkaB-utnqWfbjtqb5E6LchxK9fwLHy0SD59ypuuYS-5T0ts7azd-KtT907d61muVocPxlK-h07dNw7Q6ID6qicdrsKTM0S8NnyFCCMEzFTBlwsy75EDHhUwJQrkoHI4oDbCrz3UPVImUGISShirh9hy6q_FnX85Ja5m7rQIGTn9Z2s_p_oXAAD__wPCbGY) for three regular season games. The suspension is a result of the ongoing investigation into Michigan's[ alleged scheme to steal play calls](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O5CAMgJ-GdIyCw4RQpLiGbq-9csQEQ7wiEAGT0bz9iZOuWxd24U_--f58Pb4sRUrhtz1wbT4_7NbowocQXAgO00MObvWIgNOAq5i1VqMCKYd9BRBeg9OLmJywM-IEsxQzajUtDpQbaIURJtFjvKv7dNNeSyX8fdms9NoikyM6arncvjOltqOPn3xhuW35GOK6t3ZWNv1iYBiY9_t98wXx7F0GprZcPr2eubTKwGw5RgzIwLwSXVgqtQ8_aNsp2NQH5HhhoYQd7pcxMEL0NDIw_0Huc25PGyOvFBKvDW33w7_p4LstT_sKOz9fieqOjj8p8IaJU7qwNgq2Ue67lJDLMms5joqBGcrqzjfFSHVWTI7hsBT_Pdl-dv43AAD___mLg0E) from opponents. The University of Michigan [immediately filed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSgyAQxvGnwQ5HFhQtKK6hy7VXOisuuhmUjJI4efubXH1f-2u--f_cxhty4n35xo1ciXnEUPhFo1JSKQl6NNXsIhGQrsipbhhsY8GYanVt3wSa-g4jqUDNpKwxne56xDigAVuxgwa0-qxpbavrIQ7Gqtj2AU0ckIRpaOaSj_qeeS8rxfTOLzrqkLcqubWUxyn0lwAvwF_XVdP52D8owIecEi0kY85lwpQE-LPk4y3AjwI8zwK87vvOWDAfy88j0CknXmShXU64y43Dygvu8s6bXPGY8LmsMjKluTrc_Lg4JT47K0yzbMjp71b5v9JvAAAA___OHGjo) for a temporary restraining order against the Big 10 commissioner's decision, and a Washtenaw County judge may lift the conference's suspension before today's noon ET kickoff vs. Penn State. Michigan football staffer Connor Stalions is accused of paying associates to attend the games of future Wolverine opponents and video their play call signs, and the ongoing investigation concerns Harbaugh's knowledge of the alleged scheme.

## Report: Billions in COVID Relief Funds Stolen
According to a new report, nearly 10% of the $4.3 trillion in COVID relief payments dispersed by the US government [were acquired](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuu2zAQRL9G6mjwKZIFizTunDalsCJ37Q2oByjGRv7-Qre-0w0GAxycP4_5AVx5e_6GFVOnfYbc-Y2zUkIpoc1sx5IIUaMZMakpRi-9tnZ8JVLeEoXFluKjXYr3QdqQHU6BlmjKyElLbdQV6bwzt0jRekUuZLAUAQcrsXDf2-3vzlt_IdX_-xvbLe_rWNOr9-MczK9B3wd9h2PDz3lNV2mdc8VB3w_YCq6cBTX4V8SzMXWxcq28b6c4Gr-ho-CzwlYESOkwUzZaT2QRnFS4RKdzwKwg0NhSOT7X-Zz8YOVzBa7fNP1nOV8BAAD__72-Zjs) with fraudulent applications.

Taxpayer dollars were used to purchase a private island in Florida, a $58,000 trading card, and an oil field in Texas, among other things. Almost 3,200 people have been charged with fraud, and about $1.4 billion of stolen relief funds have been recovered. The Justice Department has created "strike forces" to help catch all the thieves, but officials doubt that [all COVID fraudsters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAUhZ8GOwwXcJTCYhu72XZLw8BF7w7KBFAzb79x6_-U5yQnX74_z_lpKdK-_LYbjjWk2bpKJ84AHIBLNevGjwFRompwhIcxveil1s06CgCHYUCtnBleaB9BdWCMhCEIH7RqaJRCKrgjur5TrQlG9xC6wVkdjEWmBXqqKbd_E-11xRC_6cTcurQ1cVxr_RSmfjE5MTld19W-XT27e2Vyur-ZnACYnMTA5BRS3jDzt-Ovo9COpWx255-I1he-HBTrlwfrKFK1lfaFh2wPz4tbccPC_ZHv0qWTPAfD5NTk0X8uipHKo2daLJul-J-t_qzqXwAAAP__jCRqlA) will be caught.
## Nuclear Stealth Bomber Takes Off
The B-21 Raider has [taken its first test flight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2SnDAQhJ9GZEOhQfwFBE7I1qlDahAjGFugLUm71L69i6sLr4NOOuju789jfpB4ObffdPCYXZjJZnnzrDVoDVjPplhHx4xcFzzqdhi6qkNjin0kR7VeyQ5oqbHYN51eWu7bqueFl94UMmKFtb5VNV1Tl4MbTKdd01sybiBWpuJVcojl3yBn3tn5T3hzLG04Cj_uOT-Tqn8pnBRO13WVkV-ZY7pzhdPySnJySgon4hjSkyzDyo7PxAqnVwKSCC5EywlOvmAB1BBJVo7g_EfODa7blnAsHCHTP07gJKYMzsu2Z_guhPvIDURXCqcijuvzEu8ltZ0y1XaQ-K_N-WeE_wMAAP__4Ql0Zw). It took off from Air Force Plant 42 in Palmdale, California, and landed safely at Edwards Air Force Base 90 minutes later. It's the first new American bomber produced in over 30 years. Almost every aspect of the new aircraft is classified, but it's thought to have much greater stealth capability and range than its predecessors, and it will be able to fly without a human pilot. [Images and video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GNltwnIMZGLp4S9eOFsFHfBU2Fkax-vdVOvfNT096X_f5Hjjz_vwMG_mWyhxi4xfNWndad2BmlItPREBGktc356yygChXP6J2cbHRjBgfyT7GW7RutFarATBqlOxBgdFv1GAH07vk0Oo0jDFgcoEEKlq4ldp_F97bSin_lBfVPpZNZr-2dpzCfAiYBEzXdfWBa9iX8wiRUqmRzrcpYHqA7hLXs3Up83NtAiZZ_XJcnDOfNytQPbfA-S_c_v_8DQAA__-eLVOy) of the B-21 taxing and taking off started circulating on Friday morning. The Air Force plans on buying at least 100 of the new advanced aircraft.

clean_body: On the eve of the Michigan Wolverines' critical game against undefeated Penn State, the Big 10 conference suspended head coach Jim Harbaugh for three regular season games. | | | | | | Saturday, November 11th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! Today is Veterans Day, and we're grateful for each of America's military veterans. , one year after the signing of the armistice that ended the fighting in WWI, President Woodrow Wilson proclaimed the first commemoration of Armistice Day, a remembrance of those who died in WWI. In 1954, President Dwight D. Eisenhower signed the bill that expanded Armistice Day into a celebration of all American veterans. Thank you for your service! If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that -. Finally, we have a new sponsor today. Don't forget to check out . | Michigan Football Coach Suspended On the eve of the Michigan Wolverines' critical game against undefeated Penn State, the Big 10 conference for three regular season games. The suspension is a result of the ongoing investigation into Michigan's from opponents. The University of Michigan for a temporary restraining order against the Big 10 commissioner's decision, and a Washtenaw County judge may lift the conference's suspension before today's noon ET kickoff vs. Penn State. Michigan football staffer Connor Stalions is accused of paying associates to attend the games of future Wolverine opponents and video their play call signs, and the ongoing investigation concerns Harbaugh's knowledge of the alleged scheme. Bonus note from The Editor: Evansville University had some fun with this controversy at a recent basketball game.. Report: Billions in COVID Relief Funds Stolen According to a new report, nearly 10% of the $4.3 trillion in COVID relief payments dispersed by the US government with fraudulent applications. Taxpayer dollars were used to purchase a private island in Florida, a $58,000 trading card, and an oil field in Texas, among other things. Almost 3,200 people have been charged with fraud, and about $1.4 billion of stolen relief funds have been recovered. The Justice Department has created "strike forces" to help catch all the thieves, but officials doubt that will be caught. Nuclear Stealth Bomber Takes Off The B-21 Raider has . It took off from Air Force Plant 42 in Palmdale, California, and landed safely at Edwards Air Force Base 90 minutes later. It's the first new American bomber produced in over 30 years. Almost every aspect of the new aircraft is classified, but it's thought to have much greater stealth capability and range than its predecessors, and it will be able to fly without a human pilot. of the B-21 taxing and taking off started circulating on Friday morning. The Air Force plans on buying at least 100 of the new advanced aircraft. name: Kash Patel
subject: (Names Inside) We found an Iranian spy ring in the U.S.
body:
Let's start with the Iranian influencer installed at the highest ranks of the Pentagon.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3b7887d0f3a4bc99329236edeadfcd7&_e=Ul_Ab3FXafiwr73dn-4atqQu-YokHr-Q5GKXc8enFAcjKIM56CBgWhi94PeydZKfuTkRd-KAr1dSoFJbnuRRPPddxAyh4e3uvNfCSWppK54dFaIKRSnV6DHU_6GJiQNnWoZ5VVeuG6mpjXwcNVhNdRbjjtJbNLHdcJHDdqLaimCZUZ9vCzoJ7W2WNdBUJe7PBsUboFDlDnQvL5nqygleSI8GFAft820oQ5WiRIfCnnh45CHU-Z0qNCngz1WNtEEv)

Friend,

Iran has infiltrated the highest levels of the U.S. national security apparatus.
