disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_t=3ZyTciwmVRiNjSQyX7h7ttVh4vzo2-PxbwPR6WLvmYlgkRZbRKhJ6JVqMPSbYQRpacUlS3GB94QP1eIb6q9Pl3K1Dwq6DWJKncnwtdYJvm0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_t=3ZyTciwmVRiNjSQyX7h7ttVh4vzo2-PxbwPR6WLvmYlgkRZbRKhJ6JVqMPSbYQRpacUlS3GB94QP1eIb6q9Pl3K1Dwq6DWJKncnwtdYJvm0%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqkFJaTDYY7d8lHUezNmOEdX4l-MM8-b8HCtpIZFiZU3fYxtOKtcnHpVhZpkAzrB5IJR3poodbrtFT5RdMF3V3H6NyQwB-qK6KysxrO2NmjEF3n7xeCqU_BI6TG5Pim9_H5OaNCsCVJiDuG_I49Qx1XY%3D)

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqm1Bpdhhhjj7U4iR1dvtj6r7lNFWdPrSbL0EL88H11BjhpA16sgtmF8DpxRAE6thk59yDAhbig4SdbjHB3KwvTMWIJRQgW3EhusRkdA_c5jLu3-p35E4BnXCFs3HYT3LEoPrURCGldsZ-r87RZDZc_I%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqkXC7LW79kBQdpHOMiZD7G0nmy5bFzSUmqc8UJQogE4WOIxZ22HNZjyInVtCebErGWUJF9d__Jrm9UMKFgJciYjc467ZbFkmD2axxy5uMiTnHzFMNPxQGUHjI0e_Gmm2N41O5CKwaFC4Eb6_5Na9CZM%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. **But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqh-iwSPvILny3PyFBAedNg9Y0RNlk-TCwpyelR0eQaAj2aOsFnKuMsgXZWnzKzDn_OeCC6cBVVILqCvSsv6WKOhrpdiuVBQ84p8UPdUOIzxdwL0pbwSA9-bnhfeRROrNovPeh_FaGl2MCuPui19tTBE%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME WIN THIS RACE->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqoST_4izx-i8x_zwZ7QjMHD5WnuUz0_qnzN6iy_pSc6Cg459KJMPkN-TnxSn-x_nRizr9D3gCF0GHx_mB11OA4bococKhA15BQZq24T1ZjUjvFoz6f-aMt0wjgIKc_V11jYAxqR1oyfK1NZD_4dAkfA%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqlCsLrX3NavOIFJQzixyPbEBxcOlIlI8CMg699msl0ojquVsSlNO3ZQLiB79zqAO8yHTD76E7Ed2xtaDgqp448warUIba5tAiLlNX0J07Dr9oGQTE8kVHhuf7guOeyGFQUqmQa7qf8VYvsookJKcwds%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqs2Up2wMtwBXbJxv8ImfHoeQXPLyR7zV7-AFrWpk_uwiR5sVtZ3Tgup1Z8ibHho0NTPO-wh92Ub6eINFQCdNjxM7IxkoD80Acox9iQ9--iPh22mvi4GLfcJ7ne7Fe51s5FqjJRrQfAwxQVBvB3J5L1A%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT
ELECT A FIGHTER TO THE U.S. SENATE->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb3d02d495ad4056a206e6bae7c53943&_e=LeHCFSuO9Aa8IMGeB9vmAzbMujrjKpFGoVQ6VGM_PV-N116slkW1yfXI9gCNwpiSdTz1MKQ1RTyvUmWnlkW-monJsq0dIk0QaOcNt4wQ-Lm6u0rijYbLktm7t-cCSNdQcEFrONd0uE7exVOPtFs09VW14g53EY-Jo_NgGbfNtbHrBjyUO5Zh8CPOoeRtuxu5KtjxgDXi62LFZq6bzk56ADlCnSfSlZs5Wrl8x9sV94VrFnbBK-3xJlb060UiytAHfqIFMg94eGech4UWcOpZqq-NPQgWkmeAKlT08C7htDatXbtSI4b1dNWwmLZMmk8RRyKHKQN70eLy_oDokNVJL_dMpTKUTQj6KAy5O93qkt1bUIOFBBK0-P1XKLg1g23f_BNCREbe8q-9x-_TQGrxbxvU8nzjL3YnVC_9fbcBfHI%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. clean_body: The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell President Biden to cancel the Dakota Access Pipeline
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113245?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Shut down the Dakota Access Pipeline for good! Take action now! ** In 2016, water protectors were **brutalized by police** and **sprayed with water cannons in below-freezing temperatures** as they tried to stop construction of the Dakota Access Pipeline -- a reckless project to carry crude oil from North Dakota to Illinois through sacred lands and waterways that communities rely on for drinking water. The Standing Rock Sioux and Cheyenne River Sioux Tribes led the resistance, but the federal government sided with fossil fuel companies. In came trucks and excavation machines to tear through the Earth. Now seven years later, crude oil runs though Indigenous lands every day,**risking a catastrophic spill. ** But there’s good news. Because of the continued resistance of the Sioux Tribes, a court recently ordered a new environmental assessment from the Army Corps of Engineers, giving you **another chance to SHUT DOWN the Dakota Access pipeline! **This could be our last best shot, Friend,**_and the comment period closes in just a FEW DAYS!_ [Send your message to the Biden Administration and urge it to SHUT DOWN the Dakota Access Pipeline by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113246?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***GOAL: 112 more signatures from your area needed*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113247?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**17 million people drink water from sources downstream of the pipeline.** A leak would quickly become an environmental and health catastrophe for enormous swaths of the U.S. – from the nearby Indigenous people who are leading the pipeline resistance, to unsuspecting communities hundreds of miles to the south.
The pipeline raises major climate concerns as well. Continued operation would lock us into decades of increased oil extraction, which is incompatible with Biden’s climate goals. Your action to cancel the pipeline could help reduce emissions to the tune of **40 million gas-powered cars** per year!
Here’s the bottom line, Friend: the Dakota Access Pipeline is a health and environmental disaster waiting to happen. It’s already violated the sovereignty of Indigenous groups, and **they are asking for people like YOU to join them in fighting back.** [**Please, Friend, will you tell the Biden Administration to meet Tribal demands and CANCEL the Dakota Access Pipeline once and for all? Sign the petition now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113248?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113249?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior Petrochemical Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Thank you, Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress ](http://links
body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDkwNjEwNDYS1&r=MTYwNTE2ODc0MDk4OQS2&j=MjU4MTAwMzU3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | Friend - As a member of Congress, I never lose sight of the fact that _**our system of self-government had to be fought for.**_ And I will always be grateful to those who have defended our nation in uniform. That’s why one of my top priorities in Congress is improving the VA so that our veterans get the benefits, care, and respect earned through service. We have an abundance of veterans from all branches of the military living here in southern Minnesota, and nothing is more gratifying than delivering results for them. On this Veterans Day, I hope you’ll join me in extending heartfelt thanks to all Minnesota veterans. Whether it’s World War II veterans, or men and women just recently discharged from the service, generations of Americans have selflessly worn the uniform and protected our way of life.
Today, and every day, I stand with them, as I know you do as well.
With gratitude and determination, Brad Finstad

clean_body: Finstad for Congress If you are unable to see the message below, . | | | | | | Friend - As a member of Congress, I never lose sight of the fact that our system of self-government had to be fought for. And I will always be grateful to those who have defended our nation in uniform. That’s why one of my top priorities in Congress is improving the VA so that our veterans get the benefits, care, and respect earned through service. We have an abundance of veterans from all branches of the military living here in southern Minnesota, and nothing is more gratifying than delivering results for them. On this Veterans Day, I hope you’ll join me in extending heartfelt thanks to all Minnesota veterans. Whether it’s World War II veterans, or men and women just recently discharged from the service, generations of Americans have selflessly worn the uniform and protected our way of life. Today, and every day, I stand with them, as I know you do as well. With gratitude and determination, Brad Finstad | | | | | | ---|--- | | PO Box 923New Ulm, MN 56073 | | | | |

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: It only took one appointment to ruin her life
body:
One appointment was all it took.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5d35fb8ff1a431583ccf5f99cb2d806&_e=1ncxO0_AUHwb6y8UD6jPJ81uXKbRKnEvQJL5w5Y86AkGoyc7O3ErZISGCmSP20Hw2c0CWqTK5GryTx6S_v-h0gj7c2Puvam2sDOZUL9AFy7WGtCitGGLMsXaHFdG7m4tLg-T2Zjs7PoP54OoVGq8W7XZVM2HJRLMFbSH-m-k7HacAVYj8kTbsVhneWjkwm9z89A6RkugwikVljh_m_1ZDR0RU8mQwECqMX-3rQ1CgSc24sErsQOd7I44QoaYJmY0z0A0I_hoT2KQQfaOkihUPi_qlSWzOzs3uAD_WfaRdywaGckYm7BUSc9Y-Ym8dSJ0UmjrJiCfhc-Opn7kWVq5DpCmtDvb54k81w44Y23inI5w9C7c77vXDDfGi605e_oj)
---
Friend, One appointment was all it took. **After one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic, doctors fast tracked a 16-year-old girl into a double mastectomy.** _Not because she had aggressive cancer, and not because she had some rare condition that made it necessary ..._ But because like so many other girls with mental health comorbidities, Luka Hein had been convinced she was a man in a woman's body. And instead of giving her the mental health counseling she needed, doctors scheduled her for a permanent, painful and life altering procedure that she'd never recover from. Now, I don't know how much you know about transgender medical "treatment." Because of the multiple cases we've taken on in the past two years on this issue, I know a lot more than I ever thought I would. But even by transgender activist standards, a double mastectomy, as the first form of "treatment," is careless and dangerous. Almost every hospital that offers what the Left calls "gender affirming care" insists on prescribing patients with puberty blockers, hormones, or some combination of the two for at least one year before putting them under the scalpel. **But the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic showed no regard for Luka 's wellbeing - [and that's why we're suing them.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5d35fb8ff1a431583ccf5f99cb2d806&_e=1ncxO0_AUHwb6y8UD6jPJ81uXKbRKnEvQJL5w5Y86AkGoyc7O3ErZISGCmSP20Hw2c0CWqTK5GryTx6S_v-h0gj7c2Puvam2sDOZUL9AFy7WGtCitGGLMsXaHFdG7m4tLg-T2Zjs7PoP54OoVGq8W7XZVM2HJRLMFbSH-m-k7HacAVYj8kTbsVhneWjkwm9z89A6RkugwikVljh_m_1ZDRvJJ32xLXaY7IZfYuIeZgZ6UTbPCFG8yhGAV9SWyVLfQcqyLuTiN_YXNAGkUDo6zEeT6ABr0G0IJH0vWjWjO1tBDiJ8hHNFciq7rSBonchIN4CjRbSJ4mde_27qDmdVW5iEhcYGxSsuXuK83wao1KX8R6NkQNZUb2lUp3pG9nQz)** Because this is bigger than Luka, and it's bigger than the University of Nebraska Medical Center. Our children are under attack. From our hospitals to our schools to our government to our media, kids are bombarded with transgender propaganda. If they show any signs of distress or deviation from the status quo, trusted adults and authority figures tell them that their real problem is being born the "wrong" body and there's a simple solution. They tell young, impressionable kids that they can change their name, change their gender, get some new clothes, get medication, have a few surgeries and it will fix them. And they tell them everything is reversible if they change their mind later. They tell parents that they can either have a "dead daughter or a live son" - meaning that if their children aren't allowed to transition, they'll eventually kill themselves. But none of that is true. The truth is, so many of these kids end up more broken, suicidal and depressed AFTER transitioning than they were before. The truth is, they're setting these kids and their families up for a lifetime of medical complications and ailments. And the truth is that if patriots like you don't step up now, it's only a matter of time before this evil reaches your loved ones. **[That's why I hope I can count on your generous, tax deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty, to fund our lawsuit on behalf of Luka Hein and cases like hers.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5d35fb8ff1a431583ccf5f99cb2d806&_e=1ncxO0_AUHwb6y8UD6jPJ81uXKbRKnEvQJL5w5Y86AkGoyc7O3ErZISGCmSP20Hw2c0CWqTK5GryTx6S_v-h0gj7c2Puvam2sDOZUL9AFy7WGtCitGGLMsXaHFdG7m4tLg-T2Zjs7PoP54OoVGq8W7XZVM2HJRLMFbSH-m-k7HacAVYj8kTbsVhneWjkwm9z89A6RkugwikVljh_m_1ZDbyaJwF9Yph5RkfGe_U1YqB3hsoXbdyC7TsRNHakgDRNZyEcDvlLsutsfiUvQAm-N01QvHAv4O8pzxV_Lk-jjnYq-Sy3871tL4_UamAYdbhh11NszABtmYx1Nm8TvFYEzhKUwhvv0E_TEqxc-rTl0VoRCBcNXxgaOB-3yStldjVA)** Luka is one of three detransitioners we represent in landmark lawsuits against the hospitals and doctors responsible for mutilating their bodies as minors. We've taken on case after case because we know just how important it is to protect vulnerable children. I've sat face to face with young women that have had their lives and their health stolen from them. **_I can 't change what's been done to them - but with your help, I can make these gender clinics pay._** And if we can win this case, we can send a loud, clear message to hospitals nationwide that our children are NOT lab rats. They aren't science experiments, they aren't blank checks for Big Pharma, and they aren't political pawns for the radical Left. If we win this lawsuit, we could set a precedent nationwide and save thousands of children from Luka's fate. But as a nonprofit organization, that won't happen without patriots like you.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Luka needed a psychiatrist, a counselor or a therapist. But instead, "doctors" gave her a radical double mastectomy - and her life will never be the same. **[Please give a generous, tax-deductible donation today to fund her lawsuit, hold her doctors accountable, and fight to ensure no other child has to go through what she went through.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b5d35fb8ff1a431583ccf5f99cb2d806&_e=1ncxO0_AUHwb6y8UD6jPJ81uXKbRKnEvQJL5w5Y86AkGoyc7O3ErZISGCmSP20Hw2c0CWqTK5GryTx6S_v-h0gj7c2Puvam2sDOZUL9AFy7WGtCitGGLMsXaHFdG7m4tLg-T2Zjs7PoP54OoVGq8W7XZVM2HJRLMFbSH-m-k7HacAVYj8kTbsVhneWjkwm9z89A6RkugwikVljh_m_1ZDczuEFMJAZbN2uYFypQUOxlp7_pwjSi7DDCzuIb-HQAH7pkNZDGl95iSpEuoD3V8XoteFFMZIBXsor3Y1DYNLyv4lEhj99StoNBMBR77sTTGGfsRDiCoskkCMeCbw8gbx7iS5OLIbMYfgrgJgICnNSv9phOjjGh_w3y8QM21D7Nd)**

_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d627d055f284c09997eaddb14a85c9a&_e=hi8PwsMPZqhdsJK9Dvp9WPtp5enD0UU8-hFLIBSthzQD7fhF-hBsEf_jZ62G1iqLrjMLbv6TQxSVUHw9oCPkW-aA0Zolw7wBGusQrTtU6KoiA1-q6auwOk-zQBlIFa6Uu-krKRv6BeHX8CLWH9pjeqXYRE7_jp0RPHekmLf91mpkxN-YwxTtMvv6lR2AhnqLDq73gk8lerMrX1t0K2Xy5RrM4XrENDa15hn4i-6OIxZRxrINUnynHx-pp7EuYOYwS5bcnAxCQ2HUwNYrU8tJJh4ZNxdhBcOYQFKOEidimqOZAJAxGiExFegsBWaETq1w) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d627d055f284c09997eaddb14a85c9a&_e=hi8PwsMPZqhdsJK9Dvp9WPtp5enD0UU8-hFLIBSthzQD7fhF-hBsEf_jZ62G1iqLrjMLbv6TQxSVUHw9oCPkW-aA0Zolw7wBGusQrTtU6KoiA1-q6auwOk-zQBlIFa6Uu-krKRv6BeHX8CLWH9pjemQSS9f_UXCOfzG1HHSS0Ur5gVF7OI_Gu4Jo7uRUOXtxEfWcm3q93MFxfdQTwPLla15YHhejiN39NxS5G1kK4qjczzwymmJ22Gtekq_KAYK-7sqe-S0H1xh0VMdbX09YLKIf18Qw-ZvuSC7_uWaUEu6MlvDVHMhlgigVeVuR1hQj) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Fellow American,

It’s probably not news to anyone reading this note that American universities are fertile breeding grounds for the far left.

In the early 2000s, George Bush-hating, anti-war on terrorism protesters flourished on campuses across the nation.

And I don’t have to remind you how ugly things got during the Trump years; we all remember how vile college conservatives were treated by fellow students AND their instructors!

**We must find a balance between protecting free speech on college campuses while reigning in the “Hate America First” organizations, professors, and student groups who only serve as a launching pad for people who want to destabilize our nation. **

Many of us in Congress are considering legislation to revoke the tax-exempt status these universities enjoy AS A PRIVILEDGE because they are, in theory, helping to educate and enrich American students so they can be the next leaders, innovators, and entrepreneurs to drive our country forward. But now, many of these universities have become little more than extremist breeding grounds for hatred of America and our values.

[**Do you think we should introduce a bill in the House to strip the tax-exempt status of universities who promote and celebrate the atrocities committed by terrorists?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=967360b85b6342389b9748474dcfb18e&_e=lKTRsX5XewUcFuRmsk7gdlGvk_1t3nd9blYtGsbtoL3aL5TRvzjYqo5Ph-24gWWbhPd9S6rEuqu4sQU4e0cmPeE5kQhxWh6uoomNqhkqg6c0GryKZPw4CmaTs-J0nHDnbrYJumYQusq-iWToDew7JCh93uz56jGC23p2elRML8Wt0s9QNg-_emCgE9fy92ktP4lo9aH1-w_CwrEa6PmvPcKcOpdkulW9KmC2kBa_jcqtA8ky4pYJ3cCxL3shIpaptkHcZ-MAX5qaQ4HQyjQaYGY_CCeQG0fEOtY3Awax5Cvmsf2JuNYNgcB8qqWP2hvgbohYfOSvrbNLYKvDiBFv6y2ncWw5EX_kat7QpfZvaUIxoMgtKdKRttoTfX6p1xuZ2w0MK5vFC8-9lDRnHDqK9GeNZMF4RR1L0YZPH0Poo0n086lxCgXkVvpmSWRyt03U)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=967360b85b6342389b9748474dcfb18e&_e=lKTRsX5XewUcFuRmsk7gdlGvk_1t3nd9blYtGsbtoL3aL5TRvzjYqo5Ph-24gWWbhPd9S6rEuqu4sQU4e0cmPeE5kQhxWh6uoomNqhkqg6c0GryKZPw4CmaTs-J0nHDnbrYJumYQusq-iWToDew7JCh93uz56jGC23p2elRML8Wt0s9QNg-_emCgE9fy92ktP4lo9aH1-w_CwrEa6PmvPcKcOpdkulW9KmC2kBa_jcqtA8ky4pYJ3cCxL3shIpap9Ow_Pl9gu9893Pc7Y45oqQdHTaj-4dPCK7aBjY4Ozojor1q2rpRYPdGLT8ujPotXDZgJa2DAShjj9rbrvoyr9QZZo7C1O34uI53mRnnpkBk6DLo9CnTOpnHrqnD6d-pytf7IMykzSe82CJyUpO5rbnonAAIsWZAaonWywxgXKdY%3D)

FBI Seizes Eric Adams’ iPad And Phones Amid Foreign Influence
Investigation Of His Campaign

The Federal Bureau of Investigation has seized mobile phones used by
Democratic Mayor Eric Adams of New York City as part of a federal
corruption investigation of his campaign, concerning whether it
accepted illicit donations from the Government of Turkey, according to
a report by The New York Times on Friday.

McDaniel Over Feud With Ramaswamy

chairwoman Ronna McDaniel over her feud with Republican presidential
candidate Vivek Ramaswamy Friday. McDaniel said Ramaswamy “needs a
headline” during a Thursday appearance on the network after the
businessman called for her resignation and blasted NBC News host
Kristen Welker during his opening statement.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JjUJVSAR2A8ocVd_CQuyIA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMiZAP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMTFXA3NwY0IKZUUjak9l-K0EeVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JjUJVSAR2A8ocVd_CQuyIA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMiZAP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMTFXA3NwY0IKZUUjak9l-K0EeVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JjUJVSAR2A8ocVd_CQuyIA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMiZAP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NjROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMTFXA3NwY0IKZUUjak9l-K0EeVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zzG2K9Wwo3mJkPEEYpTLmA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMiZAP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVFI2pPZfitBHlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VjVz6nG3m33v5JoeJCC0Hw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMiZAP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplRSNqT2X4rQR5UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: defeating Biden and Harris is possible | | | | | | Friend, FIRST: A poll was released showing that I am DEFEATING Biden by 6 points in the general election. THEN: A top Democrat strategist DOUBLED DOWN on the fact that I am Biden's biggest threat and said "Joe Biden would lose to Nikki Haley without a doubt in my mind." NOW: "I need your help to win this race and get our country back on track!" | | | Friend, defeating Biden and Harris is possible, but with the first votes taking place in less than 80 days, we need all hands on deck. "Can I count on you to chip in just $6 to supercharge our efforts and win this race?" It's clear I am the best candidate to defeat Biden and Harris. I've never lost a race, and I'm not starting now, Friend. I'm inviting you to join me in sending a powerful message by "contributing $6 or more today." "Your support today will help me have the resources to win and send Biden and Harris packing." Every contribution plays a critical role, and each dollar brings us one step closer to securing America 's future. Join me in this critical moment, and together, let's send Biden and Harris packing in 2024. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. This is our moment to take the power from the corrupt lobbyists and special interest groups COMPLETELY and give it back to the American people.

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I felt betrayed watching everything unravel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_t=-O_01LgGMQIixfnjQ1mmGvwF_Q6PuhJEHH7TAEoYCTI-11O0-Tb1X02OfEGIXYrUtWJG5pUSsLbWu0iFtRkElNuScve4zjDCysoryDZ4WMw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_t=-O_01LgGMQIixfnjQ1mmGvwF_Q6PuhJEHH7TAEoYCTI-11O0-Tb1X02OfEGIXYrUtWJG5pUSsLbWu0iFtRkElNuScve4zjDCysoryDZ4WMw%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_jSfXiGlxns1qtGnqWngMnHBv2okobflRZtAqmjJ34plWYBkqSfwcejGT8ZZIc6h5NdoovIgCdqcTSIVGVMatrvezThSlddnqVUST6gLrSgpAmlsCd9QeaVu3QHe-55S-apK0aah-WoiwhJ4MJIzHgPoq3oUWLksIIH5Iv2K47of)

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_tuZfneP68RlNYS78ykaQAgrk9uyw5M4T-J3HY5JNmiKAlIRR1oPWv6KZ7UBQks7gmxkod8yPrgA845ZUdjpTN-0kR3OWZujITEbrL4tlAYIC8L2oJt4NdC4V1bYlLMB0e2a5F6IwnWC0ph1Nwl2A2Snt_5KLnsVdV3qbNBjAtm3)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_iL-LUw4xfao8qoWr7pkVshPhrQM0J18M4HHvCn5-ivIqfuYTk0Q7xw35LMk-Vn02zsoWnSCCwLcMmXR73nLjVbCMaJfP1oIzlIttL2IAkoL16e9qbpO2msXxKPsKS0L8WA_9C-i-g7fNTaXU0yJDgX6OrXloU1GL9pq1LUoMow7)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. **But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_tkBSz-K2TBsyVOHufxaqFD8V0gc9SPY5OaY-UUY4SKoxCdHEtvWTFWzqermLB1FwFxmf2vIYMzySth5lxOLRrbt0nlLw6Y6akPdqCcplCGIhzObBM_1v8ICi2b7z0wPF8o4nx1FGRbTq9HwjPvIKwp2X_cFn8DP763ARpJRrUE7)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME WIN THIS RACE->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_mD5V_RwlUsqLR9VKg3Aly5hapKL6FgmxoNO6Snkz5hgg-C0V2rziD3xcU5H8SPh1p6Rlo23vmFo-9pvo50SkVpBt-ed2RKAcXWr5QwjcdsrlgPwTYJlmgCFp0w_ni06olu26uoo3a6-go1TYbSpG_MNtufJsaDxbty5xzK30IT7)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_nvEqw8K4gp9SmFRRoMJWUjfFS01uzSwPXrdsgJ5NnAkaALA3fa4CHfjupDKgKEQHz9QS4BgkmkeKMG19zYwBnEBspQs0dL5hC9KccY_c0Pc6ffQ0AHJQpq6yTyNaPSfl3lj5LEYDS_yiUzloJGpzPZhnHWtxmoYIG11vxN5p5KO) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_rTEiL4Kh6V6PmNzKXCAbkMKKIav8WQ9JhfezuT2iiNVQuGyg_fUlnbyuDWvlaci46fEwQGfmJjJ1RQ8F75SaoqMu8GzBwZiHZ68XRil9P5buSmgLsro8xW63uknm_KoHhns5n0XCtoM8QUyV3MIO5d2I7NG4tmPyeMTeO1KyXGH)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT
ELECT A FIGHTER TO THE U.S. SENATE->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e8abf9034f4f4c9385ec537eff3cc004&_e=PDahEV_xydfU6Fc7Ro_9AmTQx-BeVeEHUHRc2pn8Tn8EThb1eOKp9G36dEKc5QGm3QAObtKlSjUybukRN-gd7zurXIz_SjfxN0I9qSZ62MTG0ZWOfNf4agAUxRUCg2gTJ0FZtTWSNX-YxnX4Q_1Us4FZ-Dc-EZmKjr83IMkgjffArL-aA5Ul3y2dseEszBq9lKVPwves0MbZ4Gl9ZmE6ut8-ErH1bHkvL-BYEv1PYC7JeKiJuSqrNJiRGKyP-67FVTkUyC_NSkgjWAWFr8Dl_uGFGkiiLChAA4gYSFUBrF_MfYByaygKEOX_Y9FL5pFmKRD2fz60MAZl041ocNukSmGib9-qs2-3m_b7cz2AmIrQJIROIH7HTV7K2KxNFJs05eIx_PWDf-7UV-tukJ-jiI01z6DZu681FxYd5DKFaL4_VUIrKix4BkPAcHApJjcA)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Dying Citizen
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e05a6507229466ca7ccedcb7de03acb&_e=1V6lqjQ_V0NhqcNhkhw77pGTeVKtMupMfSzFyw0_AXHYJ2Ii7xCepoxLdTl1J43R0FApD-vIgvibMeMu4IvWOK6Am-z_2AyZVUD1oE8NnjZ1uI0yfY8u6iDU7_PnIY2rANm4ZwR1B7kvxvMxGvINpdP3C-ojSZGa1iiFvD-nHN5EsqHNR_MLZGPx9MVN7xv6wHNvlPkjBKz_aAImORWK2vBsWa_UtZbN_Dj0N2AiWdhD27phtUmUPFALNP6KksIn4T0sDs7G_AetEpr1z7uE7fOcYNmIaINkN9ElZG_pXAIwVq3QAzHSeGP_l4mFT7qHoHNyR-utsCiS92b2aXwjcDyQbXQCmSOd1pe9qphDAFfFxlVRHuwUowIpphJGH6iATvXzM65IN__5Z307PbmXKq-2ggOch3Ed9DXAE9oR_VnvEZdrO7up4qK05u81o85s)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e05a6507229466ca7ccedcb7de03acb&_e=1V6lqjQ_V0NhqcNhkhw77pGTeVKtMupMfSzFyw0_AXHYJ2Ii7xCepoxLdTl1J43R0FApD-vIgvibMeMu4IvWOK6Am-z_2AyZVUD1oE8NnjZ1uI0yfY8u6iDU7_PnIY2rANm4ZwR1B7kvxvMxGvINpdP3C-ojSZGa1iiFvD-nHN5EsqHNR_MLZGPx9MVN7xv6wHNvlPkjBKz_aAImORWK2vBsWa_UtZbN_Dj0N2AiWdhD27phtUmUPFALNP6KksIn4T0sDs7G_AetEpr1z7uE7eLv55LDzEMWlO6btiUyJ71v7O-1wKTLIPS44dvsMhIk3RhI-DSLHIGuUqmzKWvOucWC2OAZBVorsoLAZ4XolshJJO8f9g2usAwe6IliJZrjrMcpfFhJGcONyNktsdc1hEDTVbLid-dn6u9mMOV5OO1w8H9JrH_Dh6Lm3zRG5hWv)**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e05a6507229466ca7ccedcb7de03acb&_e=1V6lqjQ_V0NhqcNhkhw77pGTeVKtMupMfSzFyw0_AXHYJ2Ii7xCepoxLdTl1J43R0FApD-vIgvibMeMu4IvWOK6Am-z_2AyZVUD1oE8NnjZ1uI0yfY8u6iDU7_PnIY2rANm4ZwR1B7kvxvMxGvINpdP3C-ojSZGa1iiFvD-nHN5EsqHNR_MLZGPx9MVN7xv6wHNvlPkjBKz_aAImORWK2vBsWa_UtZbN_Dj0N2AiWdhD27phtUmUPFALNP6KksIn4T0sDs7G_AetEpr1z7uE7T5O5d9b1FY67b2bpwFsd3n7mbOG1YW-Jjpwydt_yOEZeJqyABswGNMe8o4j0X7jAe1zbVkxJBld-ZRHY8C4UlUhorO0KhWs9k1hXsqr-_83N3WPMvczmjYifPmiIe9BteKhfcJHM5vwbEu77J1coEoWS_GAxJwbz1kuZ7rJdna3)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e05a6507229466ca7ccedcb7de03acb&_e=1V6lqjQ_V0NhqcNhkhw77pGTeVKtMupMfSzFyw0_AXHYJ2Ii7xCepoxLdTl1J43R0FApD-vIgvibMeMu4IvWOK6Am-z_2AyZVUD1oE8NnjZ1uI0yfY8u6iDU7_PnIY2rANm4ZwR1B7kvxvMxGvINpdP3C-ojSZGa1iiFvD-nHN5EsqHNR_MLZGPx9MVN7xv6wHNvlPkjBKz_aAImORWK2vBsWa_UtZbN_Dj0N2AiWdhD27phtUmUPFALNP6KksIn4T0sDs7G_AetEpr1z7uE7Q6_lIabVU1xspewrUu4qOIkON4OLKdLXHW9Gd1y-nREmKwRHkPAHLHwvHCruSOYoNvKn7cyNFHVQDWsDCkh6c-JsG4a5ZGs2JEhvyUa2a9Tg493lFho-GUPyUocvo_SEkRgllf5x5DJKjyU0_O2zgMnLVl0NRt4gi4t18a_pQJ5)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. " ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e05a6507229466ca7ccedcb7de03acb&_e=1V6lqjQ_V0NhqcNhkhw77pGTeVKtMupMfSzFyw0_AXHYJ2Ii7xCepoxLdTl1J43R0FApD-vIgvibMeMu4IvWOK6Am-z_2AyZVUD1oE8NnjZ1uI0yfY8u6iDU7_PnIY2rANm4ZwR1B7kvxvMxGvINpdP3C-ojSZGa1iiFvD-nHN5EsqHNR_MLZGPx9MVN7xv6wHNvlPkjBKz_aAImORWK2vBsWa_UtZbN_Dj0N2AiWdhD27phtUmUPFALNP6KksIn4T0sDs7G_AetEpr1z7uE7fEJeBOBqru3BERCk8rmtsM40O2ROsDKRmS0BaFRUY_nsw-CrlRXFLErufTq4DsW0r_qkof84e-Y4pEn5XuzCw_Ok4fHg4-OOVda6KKDtidwmA4ufyLzmuMrlSCVPJrZdz0kHP7kRStNj_6cN3pNpybnbHccahllwsFtYaObw76y)**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89cdec2718a1482f9ce1851b8f43afb9&_e=pE1Tb-tDjFdw9wMrqOJNOtk27IjhgzcMTX6RQLiygo3Q9sWsE4mBV_4JV4IRlMjSzXm5h0wiH2qcecRZ4k8Xgor__mpI7VnNXoJORTBIyam78UsftIQlr2mn0XdtPD5iuqoMyyJGjW5zD1Jowvx9fnxG-n0vYMBvXPJ4GCygyTW0GB7jENu7C9hCozS3ltyOf8u4k0YBtXx0nKLPsFwdVE7wRCUEUVYZ5xDLI5fPNbpVfAyD3WCAoLfvghvS4c7XbwEutlkjHzW1EV6Ea-wW8jCbnE5FyXi7KL3dl2lBOhvesErk4kneABnhhVcO-IgF) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89cdec2718a1482f9ce1851b8f43afb9&_e=pE1Tb-tDjFdw9wMrqOJNOtk27IjhgzcMTX6RQLiygo3Q9sWsE4mBV_4JV4IRlMjSzXm5h0wiH2qcecRZ4k8Xgor__mpI7VnNXoJORTBIyam78UsftIQlr2mn0XdtPD5iuqoMyyJGjW5zD1Jowvx9fqb_Ux4a2IMLqAzcBYoNHjv3D8yE2g77QKccpmQ1UMER4d3MEg7mZBoZ9DkeOr6gOyp80olQop4C9nLCSI89ddV2qYW217pegF0z_g9hiaFFvawbxAdxE1MWubvgOAdMt0hrFTpRPF4hnP6o0dd2fDK4_Q9ENgxwT58KMIHosmvO) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89cdec2718a1482f9ce1851b8f43afb9&_e=pE1Tb-tDjFdw9wMrqOJNOtk27IjhgzcMTX6RQLiygo3Q9sWsE4mBV_4JV4IRlMjSzXm5h0wiH2qcecRZ4k8Xgor__mpI7VnNXoJORTBIyam78UsftIQlr2mn0XdtPD5iuqoMyyJGjW5zD1Jowvx9fl7hy61QS7u8BfeaeTEMWU60Ohdkhylbp7Di2cgo6V23LcnZsJUMYlvn3_R0iH7dfUdPm8_1yZwrrEBGDw9dSeKocvh9ufr7q5MDzV_RK8TEu_79RjdczxHut31cL7pH8OlWj7dcWu21_r57aT74JgSfrneJfsj_mxdjawHX65ef). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. Peter,

It’s probably not news to anyone reading this note that American universities are fertile breeding grounds for the far left.

In the early 2000s, George Bush-hating, anti-war on terrorism protesters flourished on campuses across the nation.

And I don’t have to remind you how ugly things got during the Trump years; we all remember how vile college conservatives were treated by fellow students AND their instructors!

**We must find a balance between protecting free speech on college campuses while reigning in the “Hate America First” organizations, professors, and student groups who only serve as a launching pad for people who want to destabilize our nation. **

Many of us in Congress are considering legislation to revoke the tax-exempt status these universities enjoy AS A PRIVILEDGE because they are, in theory, helping to educate and enrich American students so they can be the next leaders, innovators, and entrepreneurs to drive our country forward. But now, many of these universities have become little more than extremist breeding grounds for hatred of America and our values.

[**Do you think we should introduce a bill in the House to strip the tax-exempt status of universities who promote and celebrate the atrocities committed by terrorists?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cbfbaa03acd64f4ca3f68e7bf10337c3&_e=9Vj0eWZsaz5xN1CIYFzsIeas9Yc3kH7yoSOAOs_5nS6U0TXaGPc-V-ZWXvVx60lBRpRmfZV_s-mUkGK2-PKtQISv5O-tJnIXh2CJoZ6ICHU0GU70KTfCnf-SqbtIcAeVbf73w7IrZgdg811WrcfYtxrH7ikqk00WPC38C8zs-CjytQowdib2zojG4tfkihUTe4F95g94i3FgT41O4PxHLZtWZt1et3FyZ7KMFO4jS0aTJHf40kDqRYEPkTb6LkROXMgovQEAgA3MMTOp785FYaobyKHIeOQQPwu1UFgAAS8a_NJyIndLOFNUfJVFW6i8q05uQm64VfvvsDj6-Yo2q6ckLa0AYqxsppin1s8K_-PsdYwcU3QuwQxdJMjPCKkdgEL-W5p5DhFbowhkvMDcrIqvq8q1lo2p4fD9AH1Evq9n-H_o4FsS-4w3CVN5sJ_S)

As always, I appreciate your taking the time to let me and my team know where you stand on the most important issues of the day.

Sincerely,

Beth Van Duyne
Congresswoman (TX-24)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cbfbaa03acd64f4ca3f68e7bf10337c3&_e=9Vj0eWZsaz5xN1CIYFzsIeas9Yc3kH7yoSOAOs_5nS6U0TXaGPc-V-ZWXvVx60lBRpRmfZV_s-mUkGK2-PKtQISv5O-tJnIXh2CJoZ6ICHU0GU70KTfCnf-SqbtIcAeVbf73w7IrZgdg811WrcfYtxrH7ikqk00WPC38C8zs-CjytQowdib2zojG4tfkihUTe4F95g94i3FgT41O4PxHLZtWZt1et3FyZ7KMFO4jS0aTJHf40kDqRYEPkTb6LkRO7whorXmoznLcJIPGhc77t5KxIweYPL89dAdEmTd8x_nvJF0gScm3JKsduLRsPS6Mj3W-VLz-79lGcvORkV5LtSOuc9swSlVVpoV_uehYL-wAm6hbEbG87WXsKsTAguVUFqAv92WTMPyCu0xkGR2QHOwYDJD3kG3rSuV6FQZ05G4%3D)

subject: Mississippi conservatives have a super duper majority – let’s use it!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571370?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Tuesday was election day in Mississippi. **Congratulations to all those that were elected – and commiserations to those that weren’t! (In this day and age, it takes character to run for public office, so perhaps we should appreciate those that do.)

**Tuesday’s results give the Republicans a super duper majority - and the political capital to deliver major change should they decide to use it.** Let’s hope that they do!

All elected statewide officials are Republican. The State Senate has a 36 / 52 Republican majority. The House, a 76 / 122 Republican majority. **A coherent and compelling conservative policy platform would be unstoppable, and could put Mississippi on a path to prosperity. **

On everything from education freedom to economic growth, our state could become a leader, not a laggard. **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy looks forward to working with all of our elected officials to help make that happen! **

MCPP has good relations with lawmakers on both sides of the aisle. **Over the past 12 months, almost one in three of our state lawmakers attended an MCPP sponsored event.**

Here are some of the highlights from our recent policy events.

Douglas Carswell

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Honoring Veteran's Day 🇺🇸
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=40b722e650&e=0a12281e0e)
# Happy Veterans Day 🇺🇸
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=aa8844e696&e=0a12281e0e)
As we celebrate Veterans Day today, I am filled with pride and gratitude for having had the privilege of serving our great nation as a member of the United States Air Force. Today, I reflect on the values instilled in me during my time in service—integrity, discipline, and a commitment to something larger than oneself.
Having stood alongside many selfless men and women in uniform, I am reminded of the sacrifices made by many Veterans across our generations to safeguard the freedoms we hold dear. Veterans Day is a poignant reminder that our freedom is not free, and the debt we owe to those who have served is immeasurable.
During my years in the Air Force, I witnessed firsthand the strength and resilience of our armed forces. Even after transitioning from military service to civilian life, the call to serve our nation is something that I hold dear. It is not just a duty us Veterans can leave behind but a responsibility to continue contributing to the well-being of our fellow citizens.
Veterans bring a unique perspective born of experience, discipline, and a deep understanding of the values that make our country strong. This is why I believe it is of paramount importance to elect more Veterans to Congress.
In Congress, Veterans can bridge the partisan divide, drawing on our shared commitment to a higher purpose—the well-being and security of our nation. We understand the sacrifices made by our military families and can advocate for policies that support Veterans' healthcare, education, and job opportunities.
This Veterans Day, let us not only express gratitude for the sacrifices of our servicemen and women but also commit ourselves to ensuring that their legacy is honored in the decisions made by our elected officials. By electing Veterans to Congress, we can strengthen the foundation of our democracy and ensure that the voices of those who have defended it are represented at the highest levels.
Thank you to all Veterans that have served this great country, and we will continue to honor you today and always.
With gratitude,
Candidate for Congress, Maryland’s 6th District
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=fe8f130393&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---

name: American Patriot Daily

But then Ron DeSantis went on MSNBC and made one jaw-dropping comment about Donald Trump. subject: ▶️ Veterans Day: Honoring those Who've Served
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
Today, our hearts are united in honoring and expressing our deepest respect for the extraordinary men and women who have selflessly served in the... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=67b5826dc7&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# ▶️ Veterans Day: Honoring Those Who’ve Served

Today, our hearts are united in honoring and expressing our deepest respect for the extraordinary men and women who have selflessly served in the military.
This day holds profound significance for me, as it is an opportunity to reflect on the rich history of service within my own family:
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=b73ce2ae34&e=a2a46ff12c)

From my grandfather and great-uncles to my father-in-law and sons, their sacrifices have influenced generations—a legacy that will endure, never to be forgotten.
As we pay tribute to the veterans who have played a crucial role in shaping our nation's history, it is essential to recognize the sacrifices made by these individuals.
Today, I extend my heartfelt gratitude to all those who have served, acknowledging the profound impact they have had on our lives and the freedoms we hold dear.

*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Happy Veterans Day!

\- Laura
