name: Team DeSantis
subject: It's been 23 years since a veteran won this race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3419600fe470d52870c44423b9a4f8be04b16b5781fde03f8636a6b0be3a62f2cc511e28c99fdc5095ad7ea1654ff58e798fd16c852b855c99459717701e1a708faccd3e21ba269e7156c46214f5017d

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f667c6ad63a795b0037db876e664377cdc1d13190688c1e2d0d6ac73a2bc43e21d8dcdd394b18e4acf26b989d4ed1ddce1768d57452594a33

Friend,

On this Veterans Day, we're thinking back on the leadership we've seen Ron DeSantis guide our team with since the day we launched this campaign.

Especially recently, in the wake of the horror taking place in Israel right now, we've heard firsthand stories of his time serving after 9/11, and we've been so inspired.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f667c6ad63a795b0037db876e664377cdc1d13190688c1e2d0d6ac73a2bc43e21d8dcdd394b18e4acf26b989d4ed1ddce1768d57452594a33

We KNOW that what our country needs most right now is a President who is committed to protecting the citizens of our country, putting the mission first, defending our sovereignty, and fighting for our future. We know Ron DeSantis is the man for the job... because he's done it.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94fd109b0f827a72fadaa464c284e6dce9ff788156e4d5f55a4efc0ea6f87bb1ce0770e6691912d6472d4711c0ff67293ab51849b313fe8a5b5
Support Ron DeSantis with $30 today

Ron DeSantis is the only veteran in this race and would be the FIRST veteran to be elected to the office of the President since George W. Bush 23 years ago.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f667c6ad63a795b0037db876e664377cdc1d13190688c1e2d0d6ac73a2bc43e21d8dcdd394b18e4acf26b989d4ed1ddce1768d57452594a33

What has Biden done for the American people? He's failed to secure our border. He's failed to curb inflation. He's failed to protect kids. He's failed at every basic duty as President. We need someone with fight, and that's Ron DeSantis, NOT Joe Biden. We need your support to win next November, friend.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f09a7aec93378d7e137ba4761716becf10aba21a779646cc53bf0eab201e7d40b0abdddd450d3bffff2ef02654af35c4a7d03542b93c5f7ae
Chip in $20

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f9a74d5fe5a84834f3deb84adbebf09e0652529031197adbd22c0895f51d95fd34c8a1d04c483031710c0d827c492a4ef4c919b61b4d5d966
Chip in $40

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94fec3204ef97dff933ba6150995fa15becff1b0bb10f0c1bcc5f90191417dafa48ac3919373b9fd1856c19729511737bce493802347c34b09a
Chip in $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f9f06a994700394980ab49c5867cf1a9bf860615b8d94fcf5602ca0c5a9307701f372e89cde32d08e0440d201977597c34508835ad9f55f3a
Chip in $200

We believe it's time to support a Commander-in-Chief with a mission-first, service-over-self devotion to our country. It's been long enough. If you're with us, please chip in today to our campaign. We are FIGHTING for Ron DeSantis. Can you help?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f02e9c4484e29be32ede6fbae22dc978b070d560d48ba86ebef66ebd61277ea4c5fb24c5754348cc6ac1d3280f61c12055772149247998c8c

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f591383c19f1abecc477dbf320c067b9b5b0b82de9341a62a6f51ef00ebd49d7731f8c5b005db20bb0f69b50075ea48de05157a550ff9af37
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f7c94c4630465a4630518e6368069c2842a24cc3aab6c1c6de8ec3bbadea714abc3d46a441f99d00848bbe4d9f118d1f0c921d1a98c086399
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f667c6ad63a795b0037db876e664377cdc1d13190688c1e2d0d6ac73a2bc43e21d8dcdd394b18e4acf26b989d4ed1ddce1768d57452594a33

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b613eff8bedcc94f667c6ad63a795b0037db876e664377cdc1d13190688c1e2d0d6ac73a2bc43e21d8dcdd394b18e4acf26b989d4ed1ddce1768d57452594a33

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, On this Veterans Day, we're thinking back on the leadership we've seen Ron DeSantis guide our team with since the day we launched this campaign. Especially recently, in the wake of the horror taking place in Israel right now, we've heard firsthand stories of his time serving after 9/11, and we've been so inspired. We KNOW that what our country needs most right now is a President who is committed to protecting the citizens of our country, putting the mission first, defending our sovereignty, and fighting for our future. We know Ron DeSantis is the man for the job... because he's done it. Support Ron DeSantis with $30 today Ron DeSantis is the only veteran in this race and would be the FIRST veteran to be elected to the office of the President since George W. Bush 23 years ago. What has Biden done for the American people? He's failed to secure our border. He's failed to curb inflation. He's failed to protect kids. He's failed at every basic duty as President. We need someone with fight, and that's Ron DeSantis, NOT Joe Biden. We need your support to win next November, friend. Chip in $20 Chip in $40 Chip in $100 Chip in $200 We believe it's time to support a Commander-in-Chief with a mission-first, service-over-self devotion to our country. It's been long enough. If you're with us, please chip in today to our campaign. We are FIGHTING for Ron DeSantis. Can you help? In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. subject: You can change a veteran’s life today
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW31xfLidN

2023-11-10 The Fund

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW31xfLidN

Hi Friend,

This Veterans Day it is critical we honor the brave men and
women who at one point in his or her life, wrote a blank check
made payable to the United States of America for an amount up to
and including his or her life.

For nearly 20 years, Semper Fi & America's Fund has cared for
our nation's critically wounded, ill, and injured service
members, veterans, and military families. The Fund has provided
support to more than 31,000 service members. That is why this
Veterans Day we are asking for your STRONG FINANCIAL SUPPORT once
again.

There is still a need. Our service members need your support.
For many, the effects of their injuries last a lifetime, and we
are there beside them. We help with anything tied to their
injury, illness and recovery.

The Fund provides adaptive vehicles and adaptive home
modifications for those with the most catastrophic injuries, such
as those with paralysis and double amputees.

The Fund provides mental health support for our service members
and their children suffering from PTSD.

The Fund fills the gaps for our heroes, and helps them to live
their highest quality of life.

Support our heroes today:

Donate $20

Donate $100

Donate $250

Donate $500

The Fund continues to be named one of the nation's
highest-rated charities. Including:

A+ Charity rating from CharityWatch (1 of 3 veteran
nonprofits to receive this distinction)

4-star rating for 10 consecutive years from Charity
Navigator (Achieved by only 2% of nonprofits)

Support our heroes today.

Peter,

It’s probably not news to anyone reading this note that American universities are fertile breeding grounds for the far left.

In the early 2000s, George Bush-hating, anti-war on terrorism protesters flourished on campuses across the nation.

And I don’t have to remind you how ugly things got during the Trump years; we all remember how vile college conservatives were treated by fellow students AND their instructors!

**We must find a balance between protecting free speech on college campuses while reigning in the “Hate America First” organizations, professors, and student groups who only serve as a launching pad for people who want to destabilize our nation. **

Many of us in Congress are considering legislation to revoke the tax-exempt status these universities enjoy AS A PRIVILEDGE because they are, in theory, helping to educate and enrich American students so they can be the next leaders, innovators, and entrepreneurs to drive our country forward. But now, many of these universities have become little more than extremist breeding grounds for hatred of America and our values.

[**Do you think we should introduce a bill in the House to strip the tax-exempt status of universities who promote and celebrate the atrocities committed by terrorists?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=629546cbc0d342a2a1bf4a0bd25c67f4&_e=ejlTNBYca7W0mxdAiC-aZUgBgtWiFTC6sy-i0kEGAnFe6XGGWS8ILBGsjYXzTrLP9rOOJi3Zx6FQ52Ka3AeP7k67obf630pYpwURtWWtvnxxVVYs-jZRzcl3eJYT3hLnMwD_cIu1TwX9Wm27c7AO2oU6Yh19kgX9EZYSymov7-f8_bBVhT908pE-cKYDCpnK3aw0ZmMf3no2-iqASGoN1mNtw8ic3GrsI6Eg3k8cCm4hB-2eAcdfnREIDVLfvf2xq8lEOAYVM66vROi8DiUruXvwZ8NnG-633J5V2NkxeLCgHcvaCfKQo4AHT7Zhwd7bt6QN_c-0qm2W48HFM--JijapW6haPcNQQSsf2uU9WsFo3cNs_YCl5z8X5JJr-2714O1GfRz9ZFrl6Tc0IOsALcnCBrou8w33tJXeC5bu9XRXUuoXFESlmRCC39Af2eNI)

[ ** LET ME KNOW ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=629546cbc0d342a2a1bf4a0bd25c67f4&_e=ejlTNBYca7W0mxdAiC-aZUgBgtWiFTC6sy-i0kEGAnFe6XGGWS8ILBGsjYXzTrLP9rOOJi3Zx6FQ52Ka3AeP7k67obf630pYpwURtWWtvnxxVVYs-jZRzcl3eJYT3hLnMwD_cIu1TwX9Wm27c7AO2oU6Yh19kgX9EZYSymov7-f8_bBVhT908pE-cKYDCpnK3aw0ZmMf3no2-iqASGoN1mNtw8ic3GrsI6Eg3k8cCm4hB-2eAcdfnREIDVLfvf2xq8lEOAYVM66vROi8DiUruXvwZ8NnG-633J5V2NkxeLBO2N-t9-dgk_UsulAgVJ-9Xgk4JcJ_LqUIzLTSNUqf7amXjizyYGG0sWzikC7ue8JYJPqOFGYXLi8Yt35fUlK6OYpTGQjVoPBAHgyG9hr58dWTEoCMaKsF7t1JklNI9kqowRrECeKFCWJXyV3eqAHf)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=629546cbc0d342a2a1bf4a0bd25c67f4&_e=ejlTNBYca7W0mxdAiC-aZUgBgtWiFTC6sy-i0kEGAnFe6XGGWS8ILBGsjYXzTrLP9rOOJi3Zx6FQ52Ka3AeP7k67obf630pYpwURtWWtvnxxVVYs-jZRzcl3eJYT3hLnMwD_cIu1TwX9Wm27c7AO2oU6Yh19kgX9EZYSymov7-f8_bBVhT908pE-cKYDCpnK3aw0ZmMf3no2-iqASGoN1mNtw8ic3GrsI6Eg3k8cCm4hB-2eAcdfnREIDVLfvf2xNPnBF32yFaFWVRbeJhdFvHSAfhC-8KugMe_eVV2quYHfuEvAEfq6YX15yx3VHrQ7ZcpkpliYQMry3cU0UNvwNwtVh6Z_ETjr4Zh0MENYeKbMwwih-mgNQzwIIB7gE1QqOj6-_t0-DdVY2AH6I5FuvOWlrnjqYOHK8T6Kah1dYas%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b234f458cf3e43ae83942490ab359506&_e=wV5aT3H81wR_SvBud3E9_Fx20-VweSQI-kfQoaFiEAu29ZIfgZ2UxWc9f4xh0mYvEvwK5X1tYp-KPjOALM9GbOVUSM0DdacpYJ3wjr9pWGthn-z4LnUASSIzxHTRyRk9hBRXkIdBdM0dCZjfeiStfo6D2EyUocFDT85InPLyURcWOr8qGB5YN3AYy8AWKwDKOtgd3Imob3wrMBKICkCYmCc3yqaqLkahm3YanUAQPYIhMhYUE5RY8xpGgtpDpOjRkufTvkeNFd7KrUoExHpFJsRA3xG4xbLyqhlXEGMuY95oDs82pEKXlWn4rQuq4nA5). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b234f458cf3e43ae83942490ab359506&_e=wV5aT3H81wR_SvBud3E9_Fx20-VweSQI-kfQoaFiEAu29ZIfgZ2UxWc9f4xh0mYvEvwK5X1tYp-KPjOALM9GbOVUSM0DdacpYJ3wjr9pWGthn-z4LnUASSIzxHTRyRk9hBRXkIdBdM0dCZjfeiStfqlDNHGkKPEA7Yt1E1Mw51PmWgpPhFYGcqQpaMLqbWnSL_63cHjfQiGdJCGedlKzWYWhskEbiZAEL6_LRvG5MiI6UhKyGP3MkOYrUZ5MdERZgSHnEDJ9VHXxPbUZ0aOCAhttfGn5xPV4lDXZtt90lTWYxXHICgFrcEJA5mR3RwBp) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. clean_body: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| Whether you're saving for retirement, considering major purchases, planning your estate, or just want a second set of eyes on your investments, hiring a financial advisor who you feel best suits your needs could be key. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who [work with a financial advisor](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f545d2235e18450cacb2600db8f45c59&_e=ahxy5-XgSoNOPzCg0428yvVLmvYiT9XFGpR6DpVG24FeqCKYYbjZoC-7eFV3ATm3rx1fNa3YUQzCxWyVkLqnLJW1SaMzphukxYQHWiKUtUA_s9dITd5iIS_FO7I5wqr3U3JNkp9uE-ffqDcEB4UnNYn1fCixxKHUwq7VnpRyI2UUZhrY0QBpt8ZLc82mlkxQ1zN9Qtz4kmtiBAgh4AOFjs8ySaqhzhvmKrp1-eKSM-9-6eym-_k89S7uy0zClt-awGNCL7SfLyTuwp0RDAFawWYf-IFHjZDuC2cnEZv32WbJkJm3uni2kxHXovkk9mPLNfrymv7aNGGRYEdW9wZvsvMv9pb9TNXf_QgO4YZoTuUk9-kYAFvGBtSDXtJJ_athDU1x0FsP6DuYqcpc27t8latc-awQWAKV49jEJdSHrJftfwVnzK1y7kkMuZLOuxzEzQeZ8Psuifqb5TmAa9cD6A%3D%3D) feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it's important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you're hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals.
### **5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor**
**1\. Are You a Fiduciary?** Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. SmartAsset's [free tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f545d2235e18450cacb2600db8f45c59&_e=ahxy5-XgSoNOPzCg0428yvVLmvYiT9XFGpR6DpVG24FeqCKYYbjZoC-7eFV3ATm3rx1fNa3YUQzCxWyVkLqnLJW1SaMzphukxYQHWiKUtUA_s9dITd5iIS_FO7I5wqr3U3JNkp9uE-ffqDcEB4UnNYn1fCixxKHUwq7VnpRyI2UUZhrY0QBpt8ZLc82mlkxQ1zN9Qtz4kmtiBAgh4AOFjs8ySaqhzhvmKrp1-eKSM-9-6eym-_k89S7uy0zClt-awGNCL7SfLyTuwp0RDAFawWYf-IFHjZDuC2cnEZv32Wbl_ivXJ7ls0MJoXWsApmYit4Slv3j2-X4hqCczexc2YsgjKgHU1w_T0XKX1mjNZioYzVzyN8nb4FkE-WP-taKnv8TlLY1FSGdbqXFpTq2KmmAWAggS0pMPld2gQ5YzW-dtWd95l-noemIvuB-F4maMFz7lfez7Ugy0THS5eXFLxg%3D%3D) will only match you with vetted fiduciary advisors. **2\. How Much Experience Do You Have?** In addition to asking about their professional certification, it can also be a good idea to ask a prospective financial advisor about their overall experience. Generally, the more experience they have the better, especially if your financial situation is complicated. You should consider asking about their education, previous employers and track record of success. You might also want to consider performing a background check to find out whether they've ever been convicted of a crime or been involved in a criminal investigation by a regulatory or trade group. Don't be afraid to ask for references from current or previous clients, and be wary of a financial advisor who seems reluctant to provide this information. **3\. What Type of Services Do You Offer?** Some financial advisors offer a range of services, while others specialize in niche aspects of financial management. For example, some advisors may only handle investments, while others take a more comprehensive approach, including retirement, estate planning and tax planning, along with other services. Ideally, you should look for an advisor whose range of services most closely fit your current and future needs. It's also helpful to ask whether they specialize in a specific type of client. Some financial advisors may cater to retirees while others may prefer to work with families or divorcees. Some advisors cater to high-net-worth clients. [Choosing an advisor](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f545d2235e18450cacb2600db8f45c59&_e=ahxy5-XgSoNOPzCg0428yvVLmvYiT9XFGpR6DpVG24FeqCKYYbjZoC-7eFV3ATm3rx1fNa3YUQzCxWyVkLqnLJW1SaMzphukxYQHWiKUtUA_s9dITd5iIS_FO7I5wqr3U3JNkp9uE-ffqDcEB4UnNYn1fCixxKHUwq7VnpRyI2UUZhrY0QBpt8ZLc82mlkxQ1zN9Qtz4kmtiBAgh4AOFjs8ySaqhzhvmKrp1-eKSM-9-6eym-_k89S7uy0zClt-awGNCL7SfLyTuwp0RDAFawWYf-IFHjZDuC2cnEZv32WZveLYyINI9GOjcPXx71AtdSVQCApSRA65_7saypcmZ055AnMBY3pIIlSG7wQLlxdd6JTFUL3eG6RWUAbw88J5_T90Th7rQLoN_kzppTmxbuPDQBOMsCXD7F-kc0R3EteU9Z554kXal5Jh_ZTLpkwKyNA4xXY2Bbs7npcKFGoQKvg%3D%3D) who works exclusively with clients whose situations are similar to yours means they could be better equipped to offer the type of guidance and advice you may be seeking. **4\. What 's Your Fee Structure?** Before you sign on the dotted line, you need to know how much your prospective financial planner will charge for their services. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it's important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you're hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals. 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor 1\. Are You a Fiduciary? Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. SmartAsset's will only match you with vetted fiduciary advisors. 2\. How Much Experience Do You Have? In addition to asking about their professional certification, it can also be a good idea to ask a prospective financial advisor about their overall experience. Generally, the more experience they have the better, especially if your financial situation is complicated. You should consider asking about their education, previous employers and track record of success. You might also want to consider performing a background check to find out whether they've ever been convicted of a crime or been involved in a criminal investigation by a regulatory or trade group. Don't be afraid to ask for references from current or previous clients, and be wary of a financial advisor who seems reluctant to provide this information. 3\. What Type of Services Do You Offer? Some financial advisors offer a range of services, while others specialize in niche aspects of financial management. For example, some advisors may only handle investments, while others take a more comprehensive approach, including retirement, estate planning and tax planning, along with other services. Ideally, you should look for an advisor whose range of services most closely fit your current and future needs. It's also helpful to ask whether they specialize in a specific type of client. body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsKqrMLiNk

The very first television ad of the Ron DeSantis campaign has hit
the air. We want you to see it... and we want you to help us keep
it on the air!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osKqrMLiNk

Friend,

This is one of my favorite announcements yet. Our very first
television ad has hit the air weeks earlier than we anticipated,
and it's all thanks to the generous donations of this team.

Pitch in $25 to keep our ad on air!

We're keeping our head down, focusing on what matters, and
getting the job done. We're not just letting the media spread
their false narrative and poke at our campaign with baseless
attacks; we're meeting them on their own playing field.

We're in this fight, and we're taking the attacks head-on. Other
campaigns are pouring millions into attacking us because it's
clear that we're the threat to beat, and we're not slowing down.
Our new ad proves that. I would really appreciate your help in
keeping our new ad on air. I want to reach every corner of the
United States with our message, but I can't do it without you.
Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today? And be
sure to check out the new ad below!

Yours in Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

--------Forwarded Message--------

From: Team DeSantis

Subject: Will you watch?

Friend,

"Fight. Win. Lead." That's the theme of the FIRST Ron DeSantis
for President television ad! 📺

Be the first to view the ad!

Ron
DeSantis has FOUGHT for the American people. Refusing to bend the
knee to unelected bureaucrats, the pressure of the radical woke
mob, and even Republicans telling him to stand by and wait while
America slips into further decline.

He
has WON time and time again-as Congressman and as
Governor-turning a former swing state bright red and delivering
victories for the people he serves.

He
has LED while other politicians have sold out, sat by, and
dropped the ball on protecting Americans.

We
want to bring this message nationwide, but we need your help.

This first television ad is a huge moment for our campaign,
friend. Because of the support of our grassroots donor team,
we've gotten to get this ad on air weeks earlier than originally
planned. Your support is truly what drives our every success.

Can
we count on your support to help us keep this ad on air until
election day?

Send in
$25

Send in
$47

Send in
$100

Send in
$250

>From sending planes to Israel to bring Americans home safely to
rebuilding bridges in the days following a hurricane, Ron is the
leader we need during a crisis, and no one in the country has a
stronger record of securing victories. Ron DeSantis will fight
for the American people, win, and lead our nation's comeback-he's
counting on you and me to back him today.

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Our new ad proves that. I would really appreciate your help in keeping our new ad on air. I want to reach every corner of the United States with our message, but I can't do it without you. Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today? And be sure to check out the new ad below! Yours in Freedom, Ron DeSantis --------Forwarded Message-------- From: Team DeSantis Subject: Will you watch? Friend, "Fight. Win. Lead." That's the theme of the FIRST Ron DeSantis for President television ad! 📺 Be the first to view the ad! Ron DeSantis has FOUGHT for the American people. Refusing to bend the knee to unelected bureaucrats, the pressure of the radical woke mob, and even Republicans telling him to stand by and wait while America slips into further decline. He has WON time and time again-as Congressman and as Governor-turning a former swing state bright red and delivering victories for the people he serves. He has LED while other politicians have sold out, sat by, and dropped the ball on protecting Americans. We want to bring this message nationwide, but we need your help. This first television ad is a huge moment for our campaign, friend. Because of the support of our grassroots donor team, we've gotten to get this ad on air weeks earlier than originally planned. Your support is truly what drives our every success. Can we count on your support to help us keep this ad on air until election day? Send in $25 Send in $47 Send in $100 Send in $250 From sending planes to Israel to bring Americans home safely to rebuilding bridges in the days following a hurricane, Ron is the leader we need during a crisis, and no one in the country has a stronger record of securing victories. Ron DeSantis will fight for the American people, win, and lead our nation's comeback-he's counting on you and me to back him today. In Freedom, Team DeSantis Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Honoring Our Nation’s Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Friend , Today is Veterans Day – a special day of recognition to honor the courage, heroism, and sacrifices made by our nation’s veterans.

**We want to express our heartfelt gratitude to all those who’ve served, especially our veterans here in Indiana. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/862c1ba6c8d450af3947229f28c3afba/69348c37f5fc7414c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
From the American Revolution to the recent wars in Afghanistan and Iraq, our soldiers, sailors, airmen, and Marines have sacrificed so much to keep our country free.
We owe our nation’s veterans a debt of gratitude that can never be fully repaid.

Today, let us show them our appreciation, and celebrate all they’ve accomplished to defend our liberty and way of life.

\- Indiana Republican Party
---

Friend,

**FIRST:** A poll was released showing that I am **DEFEATING** Biden by 6 points in the general election.

**THEN:** A top Democrat strategist **DOUBLED DOWN** on the fact that I am Biden's biggest threat and said "Joe Biden would lose to Nikki Haley without a doubt in my mind."

| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b9nJTCUDKjzVLIO2phUk0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMkJgP4RiAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/b9nJTCUDKjzVLIO2phUk0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMkJgP4RiAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Fair Fight
subject: This Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
This Veterans Day, we must recommit ourselves to protecting the right to vote for those who’ve served our country. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73176988/437654936/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231111_f_veteransday_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYyZDBjMC05YTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BpZO4zn9qO2xkoBLEJ8xz7M8Mx9s426ZIi6QJr3lLoQ=&emci=aeb4bb91-4b7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f1f2d0c0-9a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | From the moment they take their oath to support and defend the Constitution, members of our military make a commitment to serve our country — often at great personal cost. But too often, those same veterans face barriers when it comes to making their voices heard in the very democracy they swore to defend:
* In Ohio, county-issued veteran ID cards are no longer allowed as a valid form of identification at the polls.
* A Wisconsin lawmaker sued to temporarily block military ballots from being counted in 2022.
* Long lines to vote can preclude veterans from casting their ballots due to combat-related health issues. For example, Lakeisha, a West Virginia voter who served as an Army combat military police officer, relies on voting early or by mail instead of joining the crowds on Election Day because of PTSD developed from her military service.
* Mass voter eligibility challenges can particularly impact people who’ve experienced homelessness, a group that disproportionately includes veterans — like James, a Georgia voter who served in the Gulf War. He recently spoke with [**Capital B News**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73176989/437654937/-1151989585?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231111_f_veteransday_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYyZDBjMC05YTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BpZO4zn9qO2xkoBLEJ8xz7M8Mx9s426ZIi6QJr3lLoQ=&emci=aeb4bb91-4b7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f1f2d0c0-9a80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1037277) about how he successfully defended his eligibility at a hearing so he could vote in this year’s elections, but worries others won’t be able to do the same.

**This Veterans Day, we must recommit ourselves to protecting the right to vote for those who’ve served our country — veterans like Lakeisha and James. At Fair Fight, we will continue pushing back against all forms of voter suppression attempts — including mass challenges — and make sure voters have the resources they need to make their voices heard.** \- The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73176990/437654938/-1609390824?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231111_f_veteransday_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYyZDBjMC05YTgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BpZO4zn9qO2xkoBLEJ8xz7M8Mx9s426ZIi6QJr3lLoQ=)
---

|

clean_body: This Veterans Day, we must recommit ourselves to protecting the right to vote for those who’ve served our country. | | | From the moment they take their oath to support and defend the Constitution, members of our military make a commitment to serve our country — often at great personal cost. But too often, those same veterans face barriers when it comes to making their voices heard in the very democracy they swore to defend: In Ohio, county-issued veteran ID cards are no longer allowed as a valid form of identification at the polls. A Wisconsin lawmaker sued to temporarily block military ballots from being counted in 2022. Long lines to vote can preclude veterans from casting their ballots due to combat-related health issues. For example, Lakeisha, a West Virginia voter who served as an Army combat military police officer, relies on voting early or by mail instead of joining the crowds on Election Day because of PTSD developed from her military service. Mass voter eligibility challenges can particularly impact people who’ve experienced homelessness, a group that disproportionately includes veterans — like James, a Georgia voter who served in the Gulf War. He recently spoke with about how he successfully defended his eligibility at a hearing so he could vote in this year’s elections, but worries others won’t be able to do the same. This Veterans Day, we must recommit ourselves to protecting the right to vote for those who’ve served our country — veterans like Lakeisha and James. At Fair Fight, we will continue pushing back against all forms of voter suppression attempts — including mass challenges — and make sure voters have the resources they need to make their voices heard. \- The Fair Fight Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A quick story
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8jHRr5fuyOQODdJjtOOQ4F3clZ-Sx7jkyrBOzQoE_4lXaighRd6DPJKg896gW2nv6sQy7GCWVNYDw5Dm6tZVIH0hnQLA1zbCb7FdLIxTNSPYKTiMInvIHJl7bDxb3d5qVRAtcfWFRuyG1xcbLgZLi_1b6bNRUn54M4xWeEIs7yoAw/417/j-XBApBmReGXVj39OpV7CQ/h0/9Q0fI9FojWoI0p19wmLks70wuQecbr-QDpgrtuZeiYE)
---
Hi Peter,
The other day I was leaving the grocery store in Moline, and as I made my way to the parking lot I spotted a young worker pushing carts, before he locked eyes with me. The young man hesitated for a moment, then mustered up the courage to speak, "I didn't vote for you," he admitted, "but can I ask you a question?" I smiled. Bridging the gap between differing perspectives is an essential part of my job. "Regardless of voting for me, you're a constituent," I replied. "Of course, what's on your mind?" He admitted, "I don't really know what's going on with Senator Tuberville and the military holds." "I'm glad you asked," I began, "It's an unprecedented step that's hurting our military readiness." I went on to explain the situation further: Senator Tuberville's decision to block military promotions and raises was due to a military policy related to reproductive care and abortion access. It's a nuanced issue, and I made sure to provide context. After I had explained more, I turned it back to him and asked, "What do you think?" He was clearly surprised that I was interested in a 19-year-old's perspective on the matter as he thought of his response. In the days since, I've reflected on the conversation and know that this young man knows I'm there for him. This interaction was a testament to the importance of engaging with constituents, helping them navigate complex issues, and showing them that their voices matter. And a reminder that, today, and every Veterans Day, I will continue to fight for the support of our service members over partisan political points. We've got a lot of work ahead of us over the next year, but know that the people of IL-17 have someone in Congress willing to listen and work for them. More soon, \- Eric
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: A Veteran's Day Message
body:
West Michigan deserves a fighter. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/a-veterans-day-message?e=16d812e81c)
---
| |
---
|
# WEST MICHIGAN DESERVES A FIGHTER
---
|
---
Today is Veteran's Day. It is a day to honor all of the military veterans who fought bravely in the armed forces. I fought for and protected West Michigan through years of military service. Now I am running for Congress to do the same.
| [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=8083010f6c&e=16d812e81c "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN")
---
| **It is our duty to do everything we can for our veterans** , **as they gave everything for our country. As the ONLY veteran in this race, I know how to support our veterans and fix the defense budget. ****In Congress, I will fight for MI-04's over 62,000 veterans by: **
* Securing more funding for the Battle Creek VA System and improving veterans services to the edges of District 4.
* Hiring more staff across the VA and be more proactive in keeping that quality staff needed to take care of our veterans.
* Putting the defense budget to work for the troops, not for war profits that cost taxpayer money, time, and our country’s people.

---
| **To all of West Michigan's brave veterans—I promise to fight for you every day in Congress.**

---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT: DONATE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=159df72276&e=16d812e81c "JOIN THE FIGHT: DONATE TODAY")

clean_body: West Michigan deserves a fighter. | | | | | | WEST MICHIGAN DESERVES A FIGHTER | Today is Veteran's Day. It is a day to honor all of the military veterans who fought bravely in the armed forces. I fought for and protected West Michigan through years of military service. Now I am running for Congress to do the same. | "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN" | It is our duty to do everything we can for our veterans , as they gave everything for our country. As the ONLY veteran in this race, I know how to support our veterans and fix the defense budget. In Congress, I will fight for MI-04's over 62,000 veterans by: Securing more funding for the Battle Creek VA System and improving veterans services to the edges of District 4. Hiring more staff across the VA and be more proactive in keeping that quality staff needed to take care of our veterans. Putting the defense budget to work for the troops, not for war profits that cost taxpayer money, time, and our country’s people. | To all of West Michigan's brave veterans—I promise to fight for you every day in Congress. | "JOIN THE FIGHT: DONATE TODAY" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Alfonso for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35e75991acb543acbea3c1eb610da797&_e=v36FTuPunQ4Ov8nT_s2yFKTpqSaH3KYNQQ_cZlQJWpW6MtJ2wFl3vJBS4BKhHG44D6jyKZO-YoFd9z4dT2lTIXJJhRKPuETCMNqseOXWjslwP9pXtpfBIIuaLMIQnrjB24UxvHbHParZMTRDpERt-VUTIJGEo-60TtVBJTnI-Cw7qxP05ptNwv2KYlVT2WV-mc7eor5Bddco-hVa9rvx4BKIqwtugXbotzAtL9rZ8Ur59oWDr10pbu6xQKK6Dth5DtqcUDX8vNPurR_GwegLIfxpz7wTXDUfrc1TNlfrcsZSdSHirA8scTkUgPvwyieF). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35e75991acb543acbea3c1eb610da797&_e=v36FTuPunQ4Ov8nT_s2yFKTpqSaH3KYNQQ_cZlQJWpW6MtJ2wFl3vJBS4BKhHG44D6jyKZO-YoFd9z4dT2lTIXJJhRKPuETCMNqseOXWjslwP9pXtpfBIIuaLMIQnrjB24UxvHbHParZMTRDpERt-b822DuxQR5ZgtVaC5CLa2SQ1taRO6BNVxDpAnCZfKCqFVEn5YSHX73GODnMd-Si45RR5OGi4IuLW-VpZFznYXei2N5IaaPNMpw_8qi7GmzG0ybn1Jj7XCaoPXr6POtg2EQmfSAEPR-wpEXFU_YttO-64dWYgPxOtObErI3w_O4_) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35e75991acb543acbea3c1eb610da797&_e=v36FTuPunQ4Ov8nT_s2yFKTpqSaH3KYNQQ_cZlQJWpW6MtJ2wFl3vJBS4BKhHG44D6jyKZO-YoFd9z4dT2lTIXJJhRKPuETCMNqseOXWjslwP9pXtpfBIIuaLMIQnrjB24UxvHbHParZMTRDpERt-epih7Tb8lgSAUxLyUf7TyDUkg5yBO6wGOkiLvD0eCzCLdESlHoVjolQGy2A0cUJFmXvZOSqq99rXXstuvCGyLibCmqljGxu62Z2bnig5_z5D7IrB4WZZnBc3eHhQLLyA76hiSumzZI3sdnBOzOcHQzSmihJC2m5-LnBOY1lcr7f) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: VoteVets
subject: Thanks on Veterans Day from VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We want to extend our heartfelt thanks to you for your support.
#
Derek,
VoteVets is an organization founded by Veterans, for Veterans.
We work to get Veterans and National Security experts elected at all levels of government. We show up for Veterans and Military Families, support them, and advocate for them. And at every opportunity, we fight back against the narrative that the GOP has a monopoly on service, on patriotism, and on pride in our country.
The United States is our home. There’s a place for all of us here. We’ll always fight for this country.
And today, on Veterans Day, we want to extend our heartfelt thanks to you for your support.
None of the work we do is possible without the support of a huge team — thousands and thousands of Veterans, hundreds of thousands of Military Family members, and millions of supporters.
**[So today, we’re asking if you can sign on and endorse the VoteVets mission. If you’re a Veteran, let us know on the form. If you’re from a Military Family, let us know.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231111_vv_sign/?source=em231111-1-30?refcode2=19013.3013755.zz93Bg&akid=19013%2E3013755%2Ezz93Bg)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231111_vv_sign/?source=em231111-1-30?refcode2=19013.3013755.zz93Bg&akid=19013%2E3013755%2Ezz93Bg)
---
It might seem like a small act, but adding your name and endorsing our mission says a lot about what we’re trying to do here. We’re building a national organization, and every person we have behind us has a role to play.
Thanks again. And if you get the chance, thank a Veteran for their service today.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=19013%2E3013755%2Ezz93Bg).

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Honoring veterans in Southwest Ohio and across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73178861/437662573/-1268629450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGM0NWFkOS05YzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7_yPooiQ8MWPkPFpv7qS8rWpTtxVIizS180ZVlQ_6RA=&emci=42f7d53c-0680-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=04c45ad9-9c80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=10283101)
---
Team –

On Veterans Day, I wanted to take a moment to express my profound gratitude for the brave men and women who have served in our nation's armed forces.

Our veterans defend our freedom and values through their unwavering commitment, selflessness, and dedication – and to all of the veterans in Southwest Ohio and throughout the country, _**thank you**_.

Veterans Day is not only an opportunity to celebrate our veterans, but also to celebrate their families who have sacrificed so much while their loved ones serve our country – and once again, I say _**thank you**_.

I hope today you’ll join me in honoring our veterans, and I wish you all a safe Veterans Day weekend.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 68033, Cincinnati, OH 45206

clean_body: | Team – On Veterans Day, I wanted to take a moment to express my profound gratitude for the brave men and women who have served in our nation's armed forces. Our veterans defend our freedom and values through their unwavering commitment, selflessness, and dedication – and to all of the veterans in Southwest Ohio and throughout the country, thank you. Veterans Day is not only an opportunity to celebrate our veterans, but also to celebrate their families who have sacrificed so much while their loved ones serve our country – and once again, I say thank you. I hope today you’ll join me in honoring our veterans, and I wish you all a safe Veterans Day weekend. Appreciate you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. One of the very best things about Ryan is that when he sees something that needs doing, he just does it.

**Ryan stepped up to run for Governor because he truly believes that Montanans deserve better than high property taxes, limited access to our public lands, poorly funded schools, and — most important to me — my right to make my own healthcare decisions.** He stepped up, and I couldn’t be more proud.

Maybe you’ve never followed politics closely. Maybe you’ve never donated to a campaign. [**Well, I’m here to tell you that the time is now. If you’re a woman reading this, Ryan (and I) are in the fight for you — for your choices and your privacy. name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: reflecting on Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Team, as our nation celebrates Veterans Day, I would like to honor our nation’s veterans and active duty military for their service and heroism.

These brave men and women who have dedicated their lives to protecting our freedoms and way of life deserve our collective thanks, not just on Veterans Day but throughout the year. I salute their service to our country.

Today, I also reaffirm my commitment to fighting for our veterans. They deserve accessible and effective services when they return home — our obligation as a nation. Health care, secure housing, and good jobs are all areas where we must do better for our veterans.

**To our veterans: Thank you for your service, and I promise to continue my work in Congress, honoring your service and ensuring you receive the care and benefits you’ve earned.**

I hope you’ll join me in thanking our veterans, service members, and military families today.

Thank you,

Jared

clean_body: | Team, as our nation celebrates Veterans Day, I would like to honor our nation’s veterans and active duty military for their service and heroism. These brave men and women who have dedicated their lives to protecting our freedoms and way of life deserve our collective thanks, not just on Veterans Day but throughout the year. I salute their service to our country. Today, I also reaffirm my commitment to fighting for our veterans. They deserve accessible and effective services when they return home — our obligation as a nation. Health care, secure housing, and good jobs are all areas where we must do better for our veterans. To our veterans: Thank you for your service, and I promise to continue my work in Congress, honoring your service and ensuring you receive the care and benefits you’ve earned. I hope you’ll join me in thanking our veterans, service members, and military families today. Thank you, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. He’s letting cartels, fentanyl, and violent criminals run through our border like it’s the finish line of a marathon.

He’s green-lighting the release of violent criminals back into our streets.

And members of his party are ENDORSING and APPLAUDING terrorism!

We can’t trust Democrats to keep us safe anymore. Republicans have to stand strong as the party of law and order.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Courage, sacrifice, and bravery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
https://www.depasqualeforag.com/ [https://www.depasqualeforag.com/] Team, today is Veterans Day, and I wanted to take a moment to share my thoughts on this important day.

As the son of a Vietnam War veteran wounded in combat, I've seen first-hand the bravery and the sacrifices made by our heroes in uniform, and their families. They've risked their lives fighting for freedoms that we too often take for granted.

To all those who have served, thank you . Your service has upheld the American ideals of justice, liberty, and equality across the world — and we’re forever in your debt.

We are safer as a nation because of the commitment all service members have made to our country. It’s thanks to their courage, sacrifice, and bravery we all enjoy the freedom upon which this nation was founded.

Today, let’s thank the veterans in our lives — and commit ourselves to uphold justice, liberty, and equality for all, just as they have.

Thank you for reading,

– Eugene DePasquale

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Honoring our veterans today and everyday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180691/437670190/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY3MzczNS05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxry-D4-2tU0olVbkIPxVjcWwlBvcFkwcyMLyfQ2CBY=&emci=0cb3e6cb-767f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=c4f73735-9f80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=11703046) Dear Peter,

Today is Veteran's Day, when we come together to recognize and honor the brave men and women who served our country.

Now is a time for us to reflect on the sacrifices made by our veterans and to recognize their unwavering commitment to protecting our freedoms and democracy. And as your voice in Congress, it is also a time to reaffirm my commitment to caring for our veterans and their families, who have provided support and understanding throughout their loved ones' service.

Our veterans have shown dedication, courage, and resilience in the face of adversity. Their selfless service is a testament to their commitment to our country, and their patriotism should act as an inspiration to us all.

To all of the veterans in Northeast Ohio, especially those in Ohio’s 13th Congressional District, and across the country, _thank you._

Wishing you a safe and happy Veterans Day,

_Emilia Sykes_
---
| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180693/437670191/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY3MzczNS05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxry-D4-2tU0olVbkIPxVjcWwlBvcFkwcyMLyfQ2CBY=&emci=0cb3e6cb-767f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=c4f73735-9f80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=11703046)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: What's the real reason for historic inflation rates?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsj-dzLiJN

Inflation rates began their rise to historic levels in 2021, and
the effects have been painful.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osj-dzLiJN

Dear
Friend,
Inflation
rates began their rise to historic levels in 2021, and the
effects have been painful.

From the
cost of gas to the cost of food, prices are hurting families
across the U.S. while the economy experiences inflation rates not
seen since the 1980s.

None of
this is news to you.

Many
policy makers and economists have weighed in. Some have blamed it
on supply-chain issues related to the COVID-19 pandemic. While
others have argued that corporate greed or geopolitical crises
are to blame for this historic inflation.

And many
suggested that the problem was temporary. But over a year later,
inflation still remains high in the United States.
So,
what's really happening?

To answer
this question, the Hoover Institution gathered together our top
economists to examine the real culprits behind this rising
inflation.

Now, this
research has been compiled into an interactive eBook: A Guide to
Inflation and Government Price Controls. And I want to make sure
you get your free copy today.

When you
read this eBook, you'll discover answers to questions like:

What
causes inflation?
What role
do central banks and money supply play?
How do
government policies affect prices?
What
tools can restrain inflation?
And
more…

Please
use this link to get instant access to your free copy of A Guide
to Inflation and Government Price Controls right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development

Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Unless it's an apology, I don't want to hear a damn word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180732/437670570/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231111_fr_veteransday_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjNmNWRlYy05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYz2MmUvCju8lXDhO2bXkskNoN6IOXavUw9iLSlt05Q=)
---
Usually, I try to keep my message on Veterans Day positive and nonpartisan. Talk about what it meant for me to serve and how my country provided a path for me to achieve the American dream. But not this year. Instead, I'm thinking about how Brian Fitzpatrick will do what he always does: Say one thing and do another. Because until Brian Fitzpatrick apologizes to veterans for voting to slash the VA budget by 22% – something that would effectively destroy the health care of men and women who put their lives on the line for all of us – I don't want to hear a damn word from him. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180733/437670571/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231111_fr_veteransday_cand_mf_30da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjNmNWRlYy05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYz2MmUvCju8lXDhO2bXkskNoN6IOXavUw9iLSlt05Q=)
---
I joined the Army at just 17 in search of stability and a way to afford my education. What I found was a sense of purpose and unity. I had my troops’ backs, and they had mine. I became an Apache pilot, and suddenly my whole job was protecting my brothers and sisters-in-arms on the ground.
I expected the same protection from our so-called leaders. But instead of protecting veterans who risked everything for his freedom, Brian Fitzpatrick stabbed all of us in the back and played politics with our health care.
That's why I’m done with Brian Fitzpatrick and why I'm determined to beat him at the ballot box.
Because my fellow vets, the working families of PA-01, women, LGBTQ+ kids, seniors – we deserve a representative who will protect us in the halls of Congress. **That's what I'll do if I beat Fitzpatrick, just like I did for my squad from the cockpit of my Apache helicopter.**
[Whether or not that happens depends on raising the money we need to win from supporters like you. Can you pitch in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180734/437670572/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231111_fr_veteransday_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjNmNWRlYy05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYz2MmUvCju8lXDhO2bXkskNoN6IOXavUw9iLSlt05Q=)
Thanks for being in this fight with me,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73180735/437670573/-826917173?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231111_fr_veteransday_cand_mf_30da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjNmNWRlYy05ZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYz2MmUvCju8lXDhO2bXkskNoN6IOXavUw9iLSlt05Q=)
Ashley

clean_body: | = Usually, I try to keep my message on Veterans Day positive and nonpartisan. Talk about what it meant for me to serve and how my country provided a path for me to achieve the American dream. But not this year. Instead, I'm thinking about how Brian Fitzpatrick will do what he always does: Say one thing and do another. Because until Brian Fitzpatrick apologizes to veterans for voting to slash the VA budget by 22% – something that would effectively destroy the health care of men and women who put their lives on the line for all of us – I don't want to hear a damn word from him. | = I joined the Army at just 17 in search of stability and a way to afford my education. What I found was a sense of purpose and unity. I had my troops’ backs, and they had mine. I became an Apache pilot, and suddenly my whole job was protecting my brothers and sisters-in-arms on the ground. I expected the same protection from our so-called leaders. But instead of protecting veterans who risked everything for his freedom, Brian Fitzpatrick stabbed all of us in the back and played politics with our health care. That's why I’m done with Brian Fitzpatrick and why I'm determined to beat him at the ballot box. Because my fellow vets, the working families of PA-01, women, LGBTQ+ kids, seniors – we deserve a representative who will protect us in the halls of Congress. That's what I'll do if I beat Fitzpatrick, just like I did for my squad from the cockpit of my Apache helicopter. = Thanks for being in this fight with me, = Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army.
