subject: Thank a Veteran Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
To our Veterans: Thank you for your service

Thank you, Veterans

To our Veterans: Your service and sacrifice have ensured that the torch of freedom continues to burn bright. On this Veterans Day and every day, thank you for bravely defending our cherished liberties.

Not all wounds are visible. For many of our Veterans, mental health challenges persist long after they have left the battlefield. Take a moment today to check in on a Veteran in your life. We all play an important role in ensuring our Veterans have the support and care they need.
Read More: This Veterans Day, everyone is a partner in veteran suicide prevention ()

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: confirm military appointments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
As we observe Veterans Day, I want to share a few updates on Senate Democrats’ recent work for veterans and service members.
#
Peter,
As we observe Veterans Day, I want to share a few updates on Senate Democrats’ recent work for veterans and service members – and ask you to lend your voice.
First, a year ago, we passed the _PACT Act_ , which expanded health care and benefits for veterans exposed to burn pits, Agent Orange, and other toxic substances, and gave more than three million veterans a chance at a healthier life. Now, my office is working to help Illinois’ veterans claim the benefits they earned and deserve.
Second, the Senate recently passed a spending bill that funds key military construction and veterans’ affairs priorities. Now, we need the House to act on our bipartisan legislation.
Finally, swift military confirmations are essential to ensure our military remains strong, well-prepared, and fully operational. Just last week, we confirmed three top military officers, including the first female member of the Joint Chief of Staff.
However, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville is holding up hundreds more confirmations over his personal, partisan opposition to military policy that enables our service members to make their own reproductive health care decisions.
****[These partisan games are affecting our military readiness and putting our national security at risk. Will you add your name now to support swift military confirmations?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73194791/437715652/862194437?refcode=dd_em_231111_1&ms=dd_em_231111_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJiNzZiZi1iMzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDt0Rnl-k_UAHx5FVOcyweatrYP1AudPpQsndjNu7GY=&emci=ff84e3ea-507f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=752b76bf-b380-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=2727974)****
Our veterans and troops serve our country honorably and they deserve leadership that serves them well in return. Thank you for speaking up.
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: In honor of Veterans Day
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73194856/437715707/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjJiNzZiZi1iMzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SioZDX-8Cdu5yNrvKzEmgCJ-l-YoYoCDTdf2SRpTkk=&emci=6754693d-227f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=722b76bf-b380-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek, happy Veterans Day!

If you’re in uniform now or have had the honor to serve, I’d like to extend my gratitude to you for serving our country in this way. Thank you.

As the daughter and granddaughter of Navy veterans, and a veteran of the Air Force myself, I take my responsibility to deliver and advocate for our men and women in uniform and our veteran community very seriously. That’s why, every year on this day, I take some time to reflect on how I’ve fulfilled this responsibility – and what more I can do in the year ahead to continue to honor you and serve you.

Last year, when I learned that the Coatesville VA Medical Center was facing closure, I knew that it was my duty to fight for this critical source of care for veterans across the region. In the following months, I published an op-ed making the case for keeping Coatesville open, held roundtables to amplify the voices of local veterans, and hosted VA Secretary Denis McDonough at the Center to meet with VA employees, veterans, and local hospital administrators.

**With the support of this incredible community, we won our fight to keep the Coatesville VAMC’s doors open – and now, our veterans can continue to access the high-quality care they deserve.**

In the years to come, I plan to continue advocating for our veterans and service members through my work in the For Country Caucus, a bipartisan caucus of military veterans in Congress which I co-founded in 2019. And, as always, I welcome your honest feedback as to how I can best deliver for those who serve our country.

I’m so grateful that you’ve elected me to serve you.

I wish the best to our service members, veterans, and their families – today and every day.

There’s work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

subject: I felt betrayed watching everything unravel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_t=oxmT71eMIbMCFInnBY2Md1s0hMDLC2d2ddQgxE-HgyHqIgeHeQL7RXMQLsvP3BmHAmwAVnA_CubcThSZjX6j1hhaC40ufY5oS-ANIv8FHNs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_t=oxmT71eMIbMCFInnBY2Md1s0hMDLC2d2ddQgxE-HgyHqIgeHeQL7RXMQLsvP3BmHAmwAVnA_CubcThSZjX6j1hhaC40ufY5oS-ANIv8FHNs%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKgFPj1W4xd4BKtLK23s9wzuo1twXD4rjABcsjf64EBRjQVUv95oySPttZLxtw1dWbCPL5PVhDi44X_Fu2s1UwLbQd9yt3DiyDlyAbGgydrgM1tn0y2rZ-8lLWDtyC8sRnIstvfPOZsfSJcWOehSxpgU%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKgPun50KNj6mJ1EvZMq1UacLOXpdqUBz328rrLKyaAfg2AXcsten1OUZe5qPYquyXGBrj4GYFDMadOy788DwPwzjVMjOxPv4iwlMCVcGQpLlxsgWvWZ53b9ZnXpR-KVf1jUtWPh7VhOJoAPD08gYDqs%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKrdpmEmJLFjRE-avhenxbfdAHNL0hNqGyiInY9WFchoik4EaIZjDCooK7YAGaPCtxjNrU9UJalrCruQ-kFNTzU2R-iPFk8k9UIrGEKyBXsJiKUI0ihOmzlSg0xSYfHxWcVSFrQTw6eUiKmyWPUu3J_E%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. **But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKsXb9t9sboM1FVKWPbU5jq7fkXbFraNEpYHiW5qOiUwxhZ37OaHi-nAwOapd0EVHjEHT1Wj9uvSrYKDT2vUgFFnb3PCm8VEWKquJ_eIbTd3RRZVNi8zwLx_v9mmd7JIKCFRNChcy7HPAT8ssAaHmBP8%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME WIN THIS RACE->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKtheA9SalZiw3jbhOrKxOgYsbFUecLE374f-sqeDoDrRhiP_2QrX9UJxn9RVECtrt38BT_0jUsB7lsAClZU6iOFIYdPu6ixCcdsNNwu6MEmMJKfSEwCa0gFFVNL535XjAFJTKSD4wsh-KngKEWMlStc%3D)

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1a51c779d3054f9590b98ce17da5daa4&_e=iqHJJgbxgSzBLu9qyNgVy71uNEy2eq9cIo-GWjWfr6YV5-Sd4iKcfpIvSOp6VqcVczCzIPlvxFwuBD3VDeZxWz_L3oINaZprqDp2eGDWO07VnL0_Oy3NeK8JQa3cHrJ81wFUkdeV4UrhwTsGvAikrcL6rls-h3U7xPXzppgvaTJb72WAMwpeyaY5RE8TO2dx6ttTpIe1AfyI7yA65yo6lAAzpL5g8b883XvQHKwAqfNB9oT7uLQq-mzIEfTVBbgxSJ7afFOK8jPqQcP6nStpKj2Yx6j8SFWoocrHM7N8zAuuOkhl2X3Bew-xs4Ivyjq_iBcst0DXAw8xH6EtOVP7ahEee_mUf50NtobStckS7ZrVmiiSi6SYjdwZ81lEOoereskd66hTa_5aKJ4CKUzNC2CzsRDHgfSVl9t9-pIj8OM%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1508%2E35263%2EBlDlUV)
Peter— I wanted to make sure you saw our new TV ad, but we need YOUR help to get it running across Montana. **[Can you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help us keep it on the air?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231111_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1508%2E35263%2EBlDlUV)** [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231111_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1508%2E35263%2EBlDlUV) | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231111_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1508%2E35263%2EBlDlUV)

Generations of my family have farmed the land I work on today just outside of Big Sandy.
I know the Montana that’s worth protecting, because I’ve lived it every day.
**Where we look out for each other, and our word is our bond.**
But like so much of our state, things are changing. Things are too expensive, some folks are forced to sell their family farms, and we’re losing access to our public lands. _Hell, even some of our favorite bars are closing._
The truth is folks back in Washington don’t care what’s happening out here, but I’m defending our way of life with everything I’ve got.
**A big chunk of our advertising budget comes from emails like the one you’re reading—so we’re counting on you to chip in today and help us get our message out.**

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: We owe an unpayable debt of gratitude to our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Treating our veterans with the dignity and honor they deserve is one of our foremost responsibilities. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73199611/437721968/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTVkZjU0Ni1iNjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NwF4oJc8ATQIs7y-_ZRAy-Sm1SUNRcT0AFaqj84Xp3Q=&emci=d201706b-467f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=395df546-b680-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7878003)
Team, The men and women of our armed forces make invaluable sacrifices for our country. They put their lives on the line every day — not for personal gain, but so that we can enjoy our constitutional rights to life, to liberty, and to the pursuit of happiness. Today, I want to personally thank our veterans and their families for their service. The significance of their courage, sacrifice, and devotion to this country cannot be measured, and cannot be sufficiently honored with one day. **But nevertheless, it’s still an important opportunity to show our gratitude.** Veterans and their families represent the best of America. They show tremendous bravery and valor in their willingness to enter foreign territory under the most harrowing of circumstances. They show unyielding commitment to our country’s founding principles. And they show an incredible ability to make a real difference in our communities and worldwide. Treating our veterans with the dignity and honor they deserve is one of our foremost responsibilities. _No one_ who has made such immense sacrifices for our freedom should ever have to wait for care or for a check. **That’s why I’m always fighting for better healthcare and better jobs for our veterans and their families.** I hope you will join me in honoring our veterans and their families today and every day. — Eric Swalwell
|
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 1.8 million California veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I wanted to take a moment to acknowledge the service and sacrifice of our nation’s 16 million veterans.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4441%2E5257348%2EBV4tSY)
Derek, this Veterans Day, I wanted to take a moment to acknowledge the service and sacrifice of our nation’s 16 million veterans. And to say thank you.
As a member of Congress, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution.
As a former chair of the House Intelligence Committee, I often received classified briefings about intelligence that would put those who swore an oath to defend our Constitution in uniform in harm’s way.
**My gratitude for our veterans carries through to this day.**
With California the home of 1.8 million military veterans — the most in the United States — it is my solemn duty and obligation to ensure that as California’s next U.S. Senator, I do everything in my power to ensure that our government holds up our end of the bargain when they return from service:
To fully fund and resource the Department of Veterans Affairs and VA hospitals, clinics, and support staff.
To ensure that veterans and their families have access to affordable housing, job training, and education opportunities to transition to civilian life.
To guarantee that every veteran has the opportunity to enjoy the freedoms they put on the uniform to defend.
That is the sacred contract we have made in this democracy, to build a more perfect union.
And that’s what I will always work toward.
I’m grateful to have you with me.
— Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

body:
This is what unites America.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=fa6cd03026a4447498af900f795a3af0&_e=HgrhLl_P6s0ohrc9uip3XzbbrE_87Dr0a06MrJTw5_NONIppPDQdAdYA85F6H1pZgtETLXJaqG-cAJ8CczpEr1gacrNWb0-vx5XN-Nu_ayLbv7xal4LfMvRkQ2C9AhRqnZZQRnY9vL2WP0v4fUidATUhmtinUpaQk78o16_6I92nK4jyeyp7TY-s4FWdAwsZXbNByyUMNbDF4IhWjbgC6Mtq7Xq1NoUeDUUbgMpVLVVeiTBZQYg2rG4fsuEVlqOcC_DY7fF3vKpno33Xe7TYqONoGtB4ghP3xZBADYoEBPvwG8SCV13vaMrHLygNa9Xkk-k9-DKCxJEc5XNzW5kCtXjaKkipg19nrnMab2ZMkrxNtvvmonGFkXcFaq9HzKm8ESEk8Ojd1PV3w9Mm67R_9P5PkJbCtkXUl5CqT5VvJZJ_83m6xKBR1L1mF4ywrPBjW6mmld35JT_rC-1SRCtB7Ab7NNymoqwrlY8-Gr_iyKp6iZTAHoxCwjIYy_hWUezl)
---
| | Patriot,

---
There is nothing more American than an absolute hatred of tyranny.
---
So, it’s no surprise that Crooked Joe’s weaponization of the legal system to try and throw me in jail for the rest of my life as an innocent man has **UNITED** Americans from all political parties and all walks of life behind _our_ movement:
---
**“EXCLUSIVE: A leading pollster has said Donald Trump is winning support where no Republican has won before because of the 'weaponization' of the legal system.”**
[Source: _Daily Express_]
---
The people get it. The people see right through the lies, the attacks, and the disgusting abuse of our legal system.

---
In a free and fair election, we would win in an ABSOLUTE LANDSLIDE.

---

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Our Veterans Deserve Better!
body:
| | | |
---
|
# Our Veterans Deserve Better!
---
---
| | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v7rHlEMNMvirQ-VpC5XJmbacEc1OMrfskyv2SM5u8DjB1XnkNXiFpOKslc6Rj1E4PTVFmJRpew7VNJ85aq96ujKnnQYlKUNZqBBxJq1sG_A8h36M15eUBO77QvMKOVN4GyjrOA3Y7QlUwJphpdaqzkFvFP3NdjVIaKrXSHmgCzvJrj1BCX3AJG3YG4MpZVseWfvPrG-V-MUmGrSv8luhf3WmC4ihz8U4fEkqrms9FM20H7LMDlQOO7eUPJskU0Y1kcqAnCJSV49QeTagCAu-Ew==&c=jglkBYTEQ1lSTgjHyO4YZ6vZ6JGHo2R8-bgae-nqo1VvATTVaxBv9g==&ch=Dr_xYErIcgDZhpVZEEilYtW68B0WXZF6xdeDC_mKQxBbG2nc_QB4KA==)
---|---

Thank You, Veterans!

To every veteran, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for the lifelong sacrifice, dedication, and commitment to our nation and the freedoms we all hold dear!

The 2nd Congressional District is home to nearly 30,000 veterans. Each one of them has risked everything for the freedoms we continue to enjoy. We, as American citizens, have the responsibility to not let them down, but to continue the fight for our freedoms against power-hungry leaders and unelected bureaucrats attempting to take them away.

Our nation needs to preserve a culture of respecting, thanking, and truly appreciating what our veterans have done for us! Unfortunately, the sacrifice is often taken for granted. This cannot continue.

On a day when our young people need to be encouraged to focus on the sacrifices that have preserved this great nation, Mark Pocan is prioritizing his own agenda. Today, he is praising the young people of Madison for attending a conference on climate change, where they will be discussing new ideas and ways to stamp out the national security of energy independence and put tyrannical regulations in place that will handicap our economy, farmers, businesses, neighbors, and families.

Instead, we should be exploring new ways to thank our veterans! Ideas such as:

* Equipping our vets to engage in the workforce and community after service by expanding the transfer of applicable military experience and training as college course credits
* Protecting our vets' 2nd Amendment rights, giving them the confidence to seek help for PTSD, depression, and other war-associated mental health without fear of discrimination
* Improving our VA system to put easy access to necessary specialized treatment, accurate diagnoses, and shortened wait times for care within reach of every veteran

These are just a few examples of ways that I will be prioritizing our veterans from the halls of Congress.

I look forward to being able to serve our vets and each one of the constituents of the 2nd Congressional!

Thank you!

Charity Barry

P.S. Don't forget to follow the campaign on social media!

Instead, we should be exploring new ways to thank our veterans! Ideas such as: Equipping our vets to engage in the workforce and community after service by expanding the transfer of applicable military experience and training as college course credits Protecting our vets' 2nd Amendment rights, giving them the confidence to seek help for PTSD, depression, and other war-associated mental health without fear of discrimination * Improving our VA system to put easy access to necessary specialized treatment, accurate diagnoses, and shortened wait times for care within reach of every veteran These are just a few examples of ways that I will be prioritizing our veterans from the halls of Congress. I look forward to being able to serve our vets and each one of the constituents of the 2nd Congressional! Thank you! Charity Barry P.S. Don't forget to follow the campaign on social media! | | == | | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | PO Box 267, Mineral Point, WI 53565 | | Sent by mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com powered by

subject: Your chance to ask Beto a question

body:
Beto is taking questions — this is your chance to ask yours!
#
Hey,
Like our name suggests, Powered by People is committed to building the largest people-powered movement in Texas.
We want to make sure we are focused on the issues that matter most to the people of Texas — **so we're coming _directly_ to you to ask what questions and comments you have for Beto.**
If you have a question to ask, this is your chance! You can send your question along to Beto here:
**[ASK BETO](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/ask-beto/?source=ema20231111-234731&t=1&akid=234731%2E444211%2EQCiE8j)**
Are you curious about the latest policy fights in Texas? Want to learn more about what Powered by People is working on? Or maybe you want to know how you can get plugged into Beto’s effort to register and mobilize Democratic voters across Texas?
No matter the question, we want to hear it! **Just keep in mind that the deadline to submit questions for this first round ends at 11:59 PM on Saturday, November 18th.**
Make sure to get your question for Beto in before then!
Looking forward to it,
Powered by People

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: This Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
This Veterans Day, please join me in recognizing and thanking my fellow veterans for their many sacrifices, made to protect our freedoms and defend our great nation.

As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, I am honored to continue to fight for the benefits our servicemembers and veterans deserve, including increasing access to VA healthcare and affordable housing.

There is no greater sacrifice than serving one’s country and our nation would not be the same without the dedication and service of these brave men and women. Thank you for taking a moment today to recognize and thank them.

Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
PO Box 1290, Santa Barbara, CA 93102
info@saludcarbajal.com; www.saludcarbajal.com

Alongside me in Congress are brave Democrats calling for a ceasefire. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvXPSklDbH5W-JQaJMJUJl_3rGcdW4rOGc65EoB0bxerUtSxmsfUxp1dy6XFYbuvepy9Mc4btFPUvQO5FSBReApur_38THSfjNC9kEcRq_hak6iwm8RHMm5deCaRk3-V8N/417/3Gpawxb2QwKq8k-SjJ-xSA/h0/hYg4TVAoqL1havvi1SVeG7Tq6TfoCc3F4EtysTCqDT0)

Friend, This week, I met with veterans calling for a ceasefire. They spoke about what they saw serving in Afghanistan and Iraq. With tears and outrage, they’re coming together to say “Enough!” and calling for an end to the violence. **Our movement for a ceasefire is growing every single day.** Alongside me are morally courageous Democrats leading the ceasefire movement in Congress, who are aligned with the vast majority of Americans. At a time when most of our colleagues want to send $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund the Israeli military’s massacres of Palestinians, our voices are desperately needed. [**Please split a donation today to support me and brave leaders in Congress calling for a ceasefire: Reps. Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and Delia Ramirez.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO7yAgfeUtvDXop4iLuyn-yr7id1GFPBWJ-Qk5-iAMQ6EKQlPeDAj8TcgNFk7kX9PXhyY73H61PBuE1BOiWjCEIal6nqsnq2DxjurLG95a8dEg7TLI3aDDxrwRccF1acLUFLtYtYVV88qt_tmUvt2DhW6DE7CAoLhBZAD_lFlXtkMLyayHr-kyozV4FvnrrW0vmCExEgJmfFhglF4JdvlJyIKaiacOAJoFgw5E5U9X-x2xRt3MY2gJYTShS0mdSPkViYEWCyjF3d7hoD-Z_2uj1Yo/417/3Gpawxb2QwKq8k-SjJ-xSA/h1/pPp0vM1jRwJ8-WR5Xk5_EiX4_B8VTmW8R9PcDcbe37Q) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO7yAgfeUtvDXop4iLuyn-yr7id1GFPBWJ-Qk5-iAMQ6EKv7Oic5ZDzLCq_Ssnlc71ZEt3Qp_CB7kHYUBDPbzdNXarzjKs9PQEZIHPJ_rY1-BfEkR7kU9q-nJV3gTnL-tgXmIO7WldPifQooqPeIvgapBLaQVam6klZ4oslL57doJYq5r-5z0Kwd0EEFt6hqkmJaQx5ybcbTDMJcB3nERFtBBLuwN5s9ho_jg9S6o3b7qV3DbHfiorKLJD3gszGPDdBb72s_ANqL3Qp_7ep6ugOS4/417/3Gpawxb2QwKq8k-SjJ-xSA/h2/XBWlRGprP6z1-ama0TQpTsDAs4EDCN-uwMMikoXPlgA)

As we met with veterans yesterday, **Rep. Summer Lee** called out how 99% of the Palestinians killed by the Israeli military in the past month were civilians.
Even though anti-Palestinian AIPAC spent millions of dollars trying to defeat Summer in her first election to Congress last year, she will not be intimidated and keeps speaking up for Palestinians’ humanity.
First-term **Rep. Delia Ramirez** is also continuing to hold Israel’s government accountable despite the political risks, saying: _“I was sent here to fight for shared humanity. I was sent here to fight for peace and justice.”_
**Rep. Cori Bush** , who introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution, said: _“I was sent to Congress to save lives. I was not sent to Congress to have my constituents’ tax dollars buy bombs to kill thousands of innocent Palestinians.”_
We were all grassroots activists before running for Congress, and we’re still holding firm to our values—even when it makes us targets.
[**I’m proud to stand on the right side of history with Reps. Cori Bush, Delia Ramirez, and Summer Lee. name: [ ACTION REQUESTED ] via The Collective PAC
subject: your immediate response is needed [ SURVEY ENCLOSED ]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. Peter — we’re putting our heads down and gearing up for 2024.

Thanks to help from top supporters like you, we helped power so many candidates to victory up and down the ballot, and we’re ready to do it again come Election Day.

But first, we want to hear what’s most important to YOU in 2024. [Will you take our brief survey and share your top priorities with us ⇩⇩⇩ ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlfQqz93cdu8bk7lr1D-_pnARKk8fDPo92SlSphpogx8fPVycyAEmA4FjDeWFU9D7tmfTPkl7nX1jVbAtVZvacorAaQdCprK1I58i7OODR4o8uSyw-GhOf9QUOgFfT1P4AR6hrOjZUPyxVKsTpTcC-8EweEj3-7L9faM9NIgokRGiaU-wbpkgT5TURkEzckpOtYNoQGS6BgQSjUzBAwHxsVO5tCOAVk5wf_5J_HdFdPggYKuzwobYfKKZ-_BOMCFcKLHYft1f9R4wvcFQAwaDkvWXGtqGrT2DsH2OvduO93ur0pWyHYhiOBocv6fQAcVhasm8XNhGU_Fl9iczQLnNiY/417/KGr_DQekT7K25iJc_gGTFw/h2/no_txL7w6GnTdOY4LyS75fmIKOZb4U0xW5LW30OzEdE)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ecdb692a1a26/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12664045?e=91a702298f)
---

---
Friend,
I cannot thank our Veterans enough for their service and sacrifice for our country and in defense of our freedoms. Because of that, on behalf of our entire campaign, I am wishing a happy Veterans Day to all of those members and families of members of our Armed Forces.
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=c08e8b37de&e=91a702298f)
**For Our Troops,**_Fmr. Mayor John Jay Lee_

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan’s hypocrisy about antisemitism is outrageous
body:
Supporting Kanye West’s antisemitic rants should disqualify your point of view.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73203886/437728939/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFlZWI0MjQtYmM4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vsXxw4XMSUfRFsCqakIIZEsj-NVT_NJkxFdGVDqO8W8=)
---
Friend, Jim Jordan honestly might be more shameless than even Donald Trump. Fresh off his embarrassing and very public failure to claim the Speaker’s gavel, Jordan is back at his old antics as Chairman of the Judiciary Committee—this time holding a hearing about antisemitism on college campuses, as his Fox News handlers instructed him to do. This is a crucial time in American history. We must stand up, speak out, and shut down all antisemitism. **And again, my friend Eric Swalwell came ready to beat back Jordan’s hypocritical nonsense—and as usual, he brought receipts.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73203887/437728940/1649708063?refcode=swalwell-hearingNGP_image&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFlZWI0MjQtYmM4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vsXxw4XMSUfRFsCqakIIZEsj-NVT_NJkxFdGVDqO8W8=)
---
_(Left) Eric Swallwell displays a tweet sent out by the Chair of the House Judiciary Committee Congressman Jim Jordan endorsing Kanye West. (Right) One of Kanye West's egregious anti-semetic remarks threatening the Jewish community. _
---
Antisemitic violence has been steadily on the rise since Donald Trump came to power and gave white supremacists safe license to spread their hatred and violent agenda unchecked. It is completely unacceptable for someone in a position of authority like Jim Jordan to pretend to care about this issue while openly supporting the message of white supremacy and the divisive and racist ideology of MAGA. **That Jim Jordan is one of the worst hypocrites in American politics is nothing new, but the fact that we can unseat him this year is something I am proud to spearhead.** Im excited to flip the House and clean up Congress, but I can only get there with your support: [**Can you contribute $10 or more right now to help me give MAGA hypocrite Jim Jordan the boot this year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73203888/437728941/1649708063?refcode=swalwell-hearingNGP&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFlZWI0MjQtYmM4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vsXxw4XMSUfRFsCqakIIZEsj-NVT_NJkxFdGVDqO8W8=)
---

clean_body: Supporting Kanye West’s antisemitic rants should disqualify your point of view.| | | = Friend, Jim Jordan honestly might be more shameless than even Donald Trump. Fresh off his embarrassing and very public failure to claim the Speaker’s gavel, Jordan is back at his old antics as Chairman of the Judiciary Committee—this time holding a hearing about antisemitism on college campuses, as his Fox News handlers instructed him to do. This is a crucial time in American history. We must stand up, speak out, and shut down all antisemitism. And again, my friend Eric Swalwell came ready to beat back Jordan’s hypocritical nonsense—and as usual, he brought receipts. = (Left) Eric Swallwell displays a tweet sent out by the Chair of the House Judiciary Committee Congressman Jim Jordan endorsing Kanye West. (Right) One of Kanye West's egregious anti-semetic remarks threatening the Jewish community. Antisemitic violence has been steadily on the rise since Donald Trump came to power and gave white supremacists safe license to spread their hatred and violent agenda unchecked. It is completely unacceptable for someone in a position of authority like Jim Jordan to pretend to care about this issue while openly supporting the message of white supremacy and the divisive and racist ideology of MAGA. That Jim Jordan is one of the worst hypocrites in American politics is nothing new, but the fact that we can unseat him this year is something I am proud to spearhead. name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I’d never had thoughts like this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_t=T0OUauygFe_0XgcryFojQ6JhxNto9tA9jt0B3DsYBKh_qXQ4SbxpJx5Lchu_gU4OKSD01ZRnM1tovxDXeldPxOEWexV3reW9AnKBUX1b2nA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_t=T0OUauygFe_0XgcryFojQ6JhxNto9tA9jt0B3DsYBKh_qXQ4SbxpJx5Lchu_gU4OKSD01ZRnM1tovxDXeldPxOEWexV3reW9AnKBUX1b2nA%3D)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaCm7Nw3Ek64cvKxg8YSt7jtT2j2VEGihmADVlfMyyOzBD8OtOHVLXafx6gHWd1z6h2-kJxDm0PSpvDJ1Sr83hCIkGEfConT_CQwdFa2zyy6flpsKFFeeVbPYeDu3WR-Szpp_zgUVC0sBbCLA1Geb2xs%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaJhy5bmooNO37FPSnP4p2upxiqm-h8j2jCezMcLN_gDZL2O4dhCPYHzDwbCVG9BPXFDJs_9Yuq62l5F4C4p-FNx8VeddWElTC8eY91nJUo_aBK8wpw8_BVMJRFuja__JFM460TFxEC3vdSitQgDIcfM%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaOrWnG3cEMYa5tj_oT2JrVsVHLEUXNgkqiXH0_jQI1BGcQ1oK0tPLy29-1yeu0brgnzfvSpiV6ydVBnyL4zYFe0UUjDxCIFTMdXa_QvInH6x7mfVN-cHztAws1KeBJ_cEmXVsioUaNTZXad-GmgllLU%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. **But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaLLTLgl_y8xsY6Z5MngRc5v1fT0-FWsbyuGH7pIVTZRvV24yUJuhgbJeBGFHPDAuQ77oZXrWHFGtxwo7u8MIWk4kG_YhhH0mfno6qZlKe2NJS5Pc3Ev_Y-yos06NBHzRBKTjm5JD7vwQao8KKdRlKMc%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME WIN THIS RACE->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaKdNrIliRCXwjVQfdZxl5Te7Mrar6IaZwnfju_vqbH97YHYz4raLcFmEFwb299WpSkogFRoDxm54q06ruiekaT3B-OL3pYTlqlhzR3PSj_WAk4eEjKueB041vY1zHx8fJOKtQlZ85g5gaVBkl7yZM5w%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaEOwkpBSe-9Em9K6Qi-vIsZSWViXkcCOLQ8fN4itXRx9aXWtsrImiAFFNYrI60FeW7-tl_mZKbYjcb2EVxKvXRwJ-BakinqRQ77gFtoazeSkySUn43fhE0Nm6tFvOz5jI-ufZweqMDHCzwh1HQsU1Ng%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8a82ed950efa4436b126d8cbd29530e9&_e=aM69VR131PqRiRRgI8ALJ4i8UEZD7qEn5cvCEs_2GG9s6IBTCLdO4aWWnEqjUy9FjjBGpSvwLJvd4am6HHGC9bolWkGxPZr0nYLxd3czZjcR5e2ze6CDJ8BYFmb9wB1GeAlzf4TEBLc6SvmItEh80c88aSEuzdIWVvaVHH65XXn1oYMPWjCRj-Dflml2QEPHTSKKZ2SmtJeJNWbldKod8xwmZXgJK_yaK1topB6QqHoZ9r7oY4jRvWm6toTTqmOzC9POXZDQvdHDABzDcjzDaPbAxunXLtylaQtsI9C3j4BJamcEfibA-bKtTAadiNVKtzTcM4SLvowvoEQrujHUqR5GLsCn0cmdwcpYw728PLy8xFnDBextKXY1iYR4jxhW2b3J_J6a2CX74fCbEULkU6VnScID5LKXIddLFKtAsio%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT

clean_body: The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: today, I’m holding the memory of Jennifer Kepner close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
|
---
Happy Veterans Day, folks.

Friend, today is Veterans Day, and I want to take a moment to recognize the service of thousands of Americans in our armed forces, and their loved ones.

Protecting our country takes immense sacrifice and devotion to our nation, and I, along with so many others, are eternally grateful for that sacrifice.

On solemn days like today, I’m choosing to honor the memory of Air Force Medic Jennifer Kepner, who died of pancreatic cancer as a result of her exposure to toxic burn pits in Iraq.

Like many others like her, Jennifer was lied to about the true roots of her cancer, and was left to navigate her disease without the full weight and support of the government by her side.

**Quite frankly, the way veterans like Jennifer had been treated was horrifying.** They ran towards the call of duty, but were left to suffer when they returned.

**I gave her my word, before she died, that I would make it my mission in Congress to push the government to acknowledge the damage these toxic burn pits had caused, and make sure that Veterans like Jennifer and their families would have the support they deserved.**

It took years for that mission to be achieved. But thanks in no small part to the stories of Jennifer and other Veterans in the Coachella Valley, the PACT Act was signed into law last year allowing for crucial health care benefits and disability payments to help alleviate the suffering of heroes like Jennifer.

So today, I hope you will take a moment to honor Jennifer and other heroes like her. I’ll be keeping her children and her husband Ben in my thoughts today.

To our veterans in California and beyond — I deeply thank you for your service to our country. **And I’ll never stop fighting for you in the halls of Congress. No matter what.**

Thank you,

Dr. Raul Ruiz
| | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202
www.drraulruiz.com/

Republicans are already attacking me on TV—a full six months earlier than the last election. That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.

name: Gundry MD
subject: stop eating oatmeal and quinoa
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

You've been told over and over in
the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you,
and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't
realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that
can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways...

And as your favorite
Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can
avoid further harming your health and digestion with these
so-called "healthy" foods...

1. Oatmeal and Oat Milk

While oatmeal is touted as a
healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more
cons than pros with this food...

The first problem with oats is
that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid
(phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain
minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc.

So whenever you eat oats, the
phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important
minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too
frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals
like magnesium and zinc.

The second problem with oats is
that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of
the toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and
have been linked to other health problems like cancer, hormone
issues, and more.

The next major problem with oats
is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet,
which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut
problems, hormone problems and more.

Lastly, oats can also contain
high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to
health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your
body.

2. Quinoa

Quinoa is another food that is
pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this
is another example of a food that has more downsides than good
sides.

First off, quinoa is high in
compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies
to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut".

Another problematic compound in
quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can
damage the cells of your intestines, and contribute to several
gut disorders and immune system problems.

Many friends and colleagues of
mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa,
bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of
autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions.

Now that we've talked about why
we should avoid oatmeal and quinoa if we want to avoid many of
these health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL
your gut, get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose
fat easier...

Bananas vs oranges vs apples...
(the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat.

This fruit can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing
your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned
off" with normal diet and exercise.

Do you know the fruit I'm talking
about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it
is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

>> Bananas

>> Oranges

>> Apples

>> Grapes

The next major problem with oats is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet, which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut problems, hormone problems and more. Lastly, oats can also contain high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your body. 2. Quinoa Quinoa is another food that is pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this is another example of a food that has more downsides than good sides. First off, quinoa is high in compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut". Another problematic compound in quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can damage the cells of your intestines, and contribute to several gut disorders and immune system problems. Many friends and colleagues of mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa, bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions. Now that we've talked about why we should avoid oatmeal and quinoa if we want to avoid many of these health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL your gut, get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose fat easier... Bananas vs oranges vs apples... (the #1 WORST fruit for your gut & energy) According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one fruit people over 40 should never eat. This fruit can damage your gut and disrupt your hormones. Both sapping you of energy and forcing your body to create "sticky" fat cells that can NOT be "burned off" with normal diet and exercise. Do you know the fruit I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page: > Bananas > Oranges > Apples > Grapes DCDailyJournal.com 525-K East Market Street # 114 City: Leesburg State: Virginia Zip Code: 20176 © Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights Reserved. name: From The Desk of Bill Cassidy
subject: We owe them everything…
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
Friend,
Our brave Veterans have risked everything for our safety and security, and we owe them a great debt of gratitude – today and every day.
Even though we could never repay them for all that they’ve given to us, we can show them just how much they’re appreciated.
---
---
This Veterans Day, let’s unite to honor and support those who have served, and those who continue to serve our nation.
---
---
| |
---
Bill Cassidy, M.D.
United States Senator, Louisiana

---
---
---
---
From The Desk of Bill Cassidy
PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898

Cost of food and housing continue to skyrocket, and wealth inequality continues to explode thanks to billionaires and corporations rigging our political system.

We need more voices speaking up and fighting back - on the streets and in the halls of power. That’s why we’re organizing the progressive movement and electing progressive leaders coast to coast who will actually get to work for the American people instead of serving Big Pharma, Wall Street, defense contractors, and other special interests.

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: No sugar coating this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. | | |
---
Peter -- Absolutely no sugar coating it, this election is going to be close. Close enough that we need you to start thinking about what it would be like if Donald Trump or any of the other MAGA extremists running for president became the next president. We're sorry to put that thought into your head on a weekend, but it's true. That's why we're asking you to make a $25 contribution today. You're probably thinking, can a $25 donation really be that important to President Biden's chances? Yes. The answer is yes. Because by the time you get to this part of the email, lots of people have donated their $25. Now they're counting on you to do the same. And that's how we'll win this race -- like we won the last one: Together. [Can you please contribute $25 to Joe Biden's reelection campaign today? clean_body: Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. | | | Peter -- Absolutely no sugar coating it, this election is going to be close. Close enough that we need you to start thinking about what it would be like if Donald Trump or any of the other MAGA extremists running for president became the next president. We're sorry to put that thought into your head on a weekend, but it's true. That's why we're asking you to make a $25 contribution today. You're probably thinking, can a $25 donation really be that important to President Biden's chances? Yes. The answer is yes. Because by the time you get to this part of the email, lots of people have donated their $25. Now they're counting on you to do the same. And that's how we'll win this race -- like we won the last one: Together. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. November is always a tough fundraising month -- especially as we approach Thanksgiving. Your donation today gives us tremendous peace of mind that we'll have the resources to win. \-- Team Biden-Harris | |

subject: Kamala Harris had a dire warning for you

body:
She hit the nail on the head
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20401%2E4449941%2EsMgGqA)
---
| **Kamala Harris warned you about the Electoral College:** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33427?t=7&akid=20401%2E4449941%2EsMgGqA) Political experts predict that Trump could lose the popular vote and still win the presidency because of the Electoral College...just like in 2016. _NO!!!_ | [**Look, that’s why it’s crucial that we raise the final $7,500 to fully fund our Electoral College ads and support our work before midnight on Monday. Please, chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33427?t=8&akid=20401%2E4449941%2EsMgGqA) | [Chip in $7 now to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33427?t=9&akid=20401%2E4449941%2EsMgGqA)
---
Listen, Kamala Harris was 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_Republicans have only won the popular vote**ONCE** since 1988._

**_Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College._**

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_
[**Please, Trump has never won the popular vote. If the Electoral College is abolished, his chances will evaporate in an INSTANT. Chip in $7 now to help fund our ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33427?t=10&akid=20401%2E4449941%2EsMgGqA)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Katie Porter
subject: Matching our gratitude with action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m proud to support our veterans through real legislation.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32864%2E3422442%2EYTBVwJ)
Derek,
Today is Veterans Day, and today and everyday, it isn’t enough to thank veterans for their service; we must match our gratitude with action. In my few years in Congress, I’ve been proud to help support our country’s veterans by:
* Helping pass a law that’s making it easier for veterans exposed to toxic substances during service to file disability claims and get the medical care they need.
* Pushing the CDC to re-investigate the drinking water at Fort Ord, a former U.S. Army base on Monterey Bay, after hundreds of veterans and civilians stationed there developed rare blood cancers and other diseases that may be linked to pollution at the base.
* Successfully pushing for more funding for the Veterans Crisis Line.
* Spearheading efforts in Congress to protect veterans from scams. I have a bipartisan bill that would crack down on fraudulent organizations that have stolen millions from veterans by posing as charities.

Our country’s veterans from all generations deserve the best, and I’ll be a champion for them in the U.S. Senate.
Thanks for reading,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_VET_20231111_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32864_3422442_YTBVwJ&akid=32864%2E3422442%2EYTBVwJ)**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Happy Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
On Veterans Day, we honor those who have served our nation in the Armed Forces.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73205914/437736697/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNThjOWQ4Yi1jMzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4UUWz4p36f1t_CXoDGl0eQhw_i6zbtfcObwUQtqM0w=&emci=e4e7f977-d07f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d58c9d8b-c380-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | On Veterans Day, we honor those who have served our nation in the Armed Forces, including the over 250,000 veterans who call Oregon home. Under circumstances many of us will never fully comprehend, they have fought for and defended the rights and freedoms we have as Americans. Regardless of background, all our veterans share a commitment to our democracy and its ideals, and they all deserve full recognition of the sacrifices they make for stepping up to protect it. **So I want to say thank you to all of our veterans. Your willingness to serve and sacrifice for the United States represents the very best that our country has to offer. Thank you for your service and for protecting us.** And we need to do more than just say thank you. We need to honor the commitments we have made to our veterans and ensure their sacrifices are not forgotten. Too many veterans come home to limited opportunities, end up unhoused and living on the streets, find it impossible to access care at the VA , or feel forgotten. **That is why we need to also show our gratitude through our actions.** **Our veterans stood up for us overseas, and we need to stand up for them here at home****.** I am committed to ensuring veterans have access to their VA benefits, fighting to end the housing crisis so those who are unhoused can have a place to call home, and providing the support veterans need as they transition out of the Armed Forces. Our grassroots movement is standing up for veterans every day and fighting to create an America where they can prosper in the country they selflessly served. **So, say thank you to our veterans today and join us as we thank our veterans with our actions.** Happy Veterans Day, and thank you for your service. Onward! _Jeff_

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73206158/437737629/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjM4YmY4MS1jNDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tl14irj0-SD3N8S1ogAv6evwaFIsmbx9qZYbF5T7V0Q=&emci=6fcda825-2e7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5638bf81-c480-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)
---

| | This Veterans Day is a chance to say thank you to America's veterans for their bravery and sacrifice on behalf of our country. Our veterans are an example to all of us of what it means to selflessly serve — and we must celebrate that service by ensuring they receive the medical treatment and benefits they deserve. Throughout my career in public service, I have sought to enhance hiring for veterans, fix the problems at the VA, give veterans access to greater health care choices, and make sure that mental health services are made readily available to those returning from combat. We must never cease in any of this work, and today, we recommit to honoring the covenant our country has with its veterans. I feel duty-bound to keep this covenant, and I will always stand for dignity, care, and recognition when it comes to those who have worn the uniform to defend the values that define America. Happy Veterans Day. _Ron_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | This Veterans Day is a chance to say thank you to America's veterans for their bravery and sacrifice on behalf of our country. Our veterans are an example to all of us of what it means to selflessly serve — and we must celebrate that service by ensuring they receive the medical treatment and benefits they deserve. Throughout my career in public service, I have sought to enhance hiring for veterans, fix the problems at the VA, give veterans access to greater health care choices, and make sure that mental health services are made readily available to those returning from combat. We must never cease in any of this work, and today, we recommit to honoring the covenant our country has with its veterans. I feel duty-bound to keep this covenant, and I will always stand for dignity, care, and recognition when it comes to those who have worn the uniform to defend the values that define America. Happy Veterans Day. Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Happy Veterans Day, friends.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, On Veterans Day, we acknowledge the sacrifices of our soldiers and veterans. To those of you who have served, are currently serving, or have a family member or loved one in the armed forces, I want to take a moment to say**thank you.** As the granddaughter of two World War II veterans and a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am personally committed to ensuring veterans have access to the benefits they’ve earned after putting their lives on the line for our country. From introducing legislation to help veterans overcome financial obstacles and find good-paying jobs in STEM fields, to supporting female veterans who experience unique challenges after returning home — I’m working day in and day out in Congress to improve the lives of the dedicated people who have served our country. **[I hope you’ll join me in honoring veterans today and every day by signing on to show your support for my work to build a future where those who have served receive the critical care, support, and resources they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73206179/437737710/-972212288?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmNhNjk5ZS1jNDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5T0rRWRX9DEU3J2uJQo7S0PPIPxpFYTifO6CWDtIo30=&emci=f0ca699e-c480-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f2ca699e-c480-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** | [SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73206180/437737711/1208961780?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231111_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmNhNjk5ZS1jNDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5T0rRWRX9DEU3J2uJQo7S0PPIPxpFYTifO6CWDtIo30=&emci=f0ca699e-c480-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f2ca699e-c480-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)

clean_body: There has never been a more important time to accept. | | | Dear Friend, We are now less than 1 year out from what could end up being the LAST ELECTION our country ever has. There has never been a better moment than right now to accept your Founding Membership within THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST. The witch hunts are accelerating like never before, and I need to know that my most trusted supporters like YOU have my back during these sad times in our nation’s history. When millions and millions of Americans are celebrating our triumph over tyranny on November 5, 2024, Founding Members of THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST can confidently know that they played an extra special role in our victory as they peacefully defended our movement from the never-ending witch hunts. Now, of course, let me say that if you have not accepted your Founding Membership within THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST because times are tough for you in Biden’s America, then I fully understand. But, if prior invitations have gotten lost or you’ve just postponed, then I’d highly encourage you to join this inner circle of trusted patriots at this pivotal moment in the 2024 election. | | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST Invitation for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Founding Member Acceptance: PENDING | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: John Padora
subject: 🇺🇸 Thank a vet today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Hey there, I’m writing to you to wish you a happy Veterans Day! I hope you’ll join me today and every day in recognizing and honoring the many Veterans from Colorado and across the United States who gave so much in service to our nation. I know the pride that veterans take in serving their country, and today is our day to salute them for their service.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=fc7d28d6935b4e748f926463df2917ed&_e=Am5zwFCd7QFkHo4beeq-lb2TXq68zrS9LOXtkhkZqHA3X_t9WvWnraP9kTvLuuN9QLq984i4vneYZenfIfpzwptDzrHMDa85USwbVMZjt6RZx0ILPE1l1v8_Cy0dEtYiJ4x9zPG5URPQiA0WRE2gmFeQG0D6JPLFejFYLLXQh4eprhWxbvpURQb08PZN-bP-Q9wH_cKdpdyxZSC3U-9kxw%3D%3D) Hey there, I’m writing to you to wish you a happy Veterans Day! I hope you’ll join me today and every day in recognizing and honoring the many Veterans from Colorado and across the United States who gave so much in service to our nation. I know the pride that veterans take in serving their country, and today is our day to salute them for their service. I’m proud to be an American, and I stand with and support all those who have stood on the front lines to protect the freedoms, universal rights, and ideals of our great democracy. We are forever grateful for their sacrifices in keeping our country safe at home and abroad. Thank you, and Happy Veterans Day! Best, John Padora Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Mark Takano
subject: Standing up for veterans today and everyday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73206951/437740933/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGVmYWYwYS1jNzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-DhIKJxJXz_GjE-FG1UvxSB5J_KRPZ6GDd0aR5Yj2A=)
---
Peter, today is Veterans Day — a time to honor U.S. military veterans for everything they have sacrificed to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests at home and around the world.

As such, our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

As chairman of the Veterans Affairs Committee in the U.S. House, I am proud to honor the work of our veterans and make sure that we keep our promises.

I’m elated to have authored and helped pass legislation like the PACT Act and VALOR Act —**bills that greatly increase veteran access to critically needed healthcare and benefits.**

But the fight never stops. I will keep working to ensure veterans have access to healthcare, housing, and education opportunities, and so much more.

Today and always I am committed to supporting our veterans. I hope you’ll join me on this national holiday in paying respect to our brave veterans.

Sincerely,

Mark Takano | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73206953/437740934/236453838?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=MTFC_20231111_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGVmYWYwYS1jNzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g-DhIKJxJXz_GjE-FG1UvxSB5J_KRPZ6GDd0aR5Yj2A=)

clean_body: | = Peter, today is Veterans Day — a time to honor U.S. military veterans for everything they have sacrificed to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests at home and around the world. As such, our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve. As chairman of the Veterans Affairs Committee in the U.S. House, I am proud to honor the work of our veterans and make sure that we keep our promises. I’m elated to have authored and helped pass legislation like the PACT Act and VALOR Act —bills that greatly increase veteran access to critically needed healthcare and benefits. But the fight never stops. I will keep working to ensure veterans have access to healthcare, housing, and education opportunities, and so much more. Today and always I am committed to supporting our veterans. I hope you’ll join me on this national holiday in paying respect to our brave veterans. Sincerely, Mark Takano | = | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. A key carveout in President Joe Biden’s signature climate bill is
allowing companies to take advantage of federal tax credits to lease
foreign-made electric vehicles (EVs). The Inflation Reduction Act
(IRA) features a $7,500 tax credit to incentivize Americans to
purchase EVs that meet certain “made in America” sourcing and
manufacturing standards, but the tax credit is still available to some
foreign-made EVs

name: Jerry Evans
subject: Supporting our Veterans
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
Today and every day we thank and support our men and women who have served our great country. Without their service and sacrifice we would not be allowed to enjoy the freedoms that we experience every day in America. My family and I are forever grateful. Please keep these patriots in your prayers.
For the cause, Jerry Evans

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Thankful for our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
It’s Veterans Day, and I want to express my deep gratitude for the generations of men and women who have served and sacrificed for the United States of America.
As I reflect on those that have given themselves to something bigger than any one person, I am reminded of a quote by Abraham Lincoln that states, _”Any nation that does not honor its heroes will not long endure.”_
To honor our veterans’ service and sacrifice is to ensure that our troops are never unnecessarily put into harm’s way, and for those that are serving or have served, we must keep our national promise to fulfill our sacred obligations to support and take care of them. **
** **Nobody in America, especially our veterans, should be without housing and healthcare.****In Congress, I will work to expand housing and supportive services for veteran families.**
I will support legislation that would fully fund and modernize the VA, eliminate the VA benefits backlog, expand mental health and long term care programs, and ensure that ALL veterans, regardless of their gender, race, sexual orientation or gender identity have equal access to health care services, including abortion care and gender-affirming surgeries.
I will support any legislation that ends the deportation of non-resident service members and would work to enact laws that would end systems of discrimination, racism, and homophobia in our armed forces and VA programs.
All of our Veterans deserve our lasting gratitude, our respect and freedom from discrimination.
"As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter words, but to live by them." —John Fitzgerald Kennedy
Thank you. -Derek Marshall
