clean_body: | | | It’s Veterans Day, and I want to express my deep gratitude for the generations of men and women who have served and sacrificed for the United States of America. As I reflect on those that have given themselves to something bigger than any one person, I am reminded of a quote by Abraham Lincoln that states, ”Any nation that does not honor its heroes will not long endure.” To honor our veterans’ service and sacrifice is to ensure that our troops are never unnecessarily put into harm’s way, and for those that are serving or have served, we must keep our national promise to fulfill our sacred obligations to support and take care of them. Nobody in America, especially our veterans, should be without housing and healthcare.In Congress, I will work to expand housing and supportive services for veteran families. I will support legislation that would fully fund and modernize the VA, eliminate the VA benefits backlog, expand mental health and long term care programs, and ensure that ALL veterans, regardless of their gender, race, sexual orientation or gender identity have equal access to health care services, including abortion care and gender-affirming surgeries. I will support any legislation that ends the deportation of non-resident service members and would work to enact laws that would end systems of discrimination, racism, and homophobia in our armed forces and VA programs. All of our Veterans deserve our lasting gratitude, our respect and freedom from discrimination. "As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter words, but to live by them." —John Fitzgerald Kennedy Thank you. -Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. | Happy Veterans Day!
---
|
---
| Friends,
Freedom isn't free. Today, Nov. 11, is Veterans Day.
Major hostilities of World War I were formally ended at the 11th hour of the 11th day of the 11th month of 1918 when the Armistice with Germany went into effect.
We wouldn't have a Country without our Men and Women in our Military.
We celebrated Veterans Day with my fellow Veteran Brothers and Sisters at Monument Terrace in Lynchburg, Virginia. Thank you for your service. Thank you for your sacrifice. Thank you for loving our Country. Happy Veterans Day!
---
|
---
| John Birch, World War II Veteran, 98 years young, fought in the Battle of the Buldge and was a key speaker. Our World War II Veterans saved the world. These days we are fortunate to have any WWII Veteran in our presence. I could have listened to his stories all day. Thank you for your service Sir!
---
|
---
| Dr. Rich Diddams, Lt.Col is the current Vice Provost and Dean of the School of Business at Liberty University. He did a remarkable job reminding us that freedom doesn't come from Politicians, Protesters, Pastor's, etc. Freedom comes from the Men and Women who risk their lives and/or give their lives for us. Thank you for your inspirational words and your service Sir!
---
|
---
| David Stokes, our Master of Ceremonies, President Vietnam Veterans of America Chapter 196 and Member of the Lynchburg Area Veterans Council (LAVC).
---
|
---
| Steve Bozeman, Vietnam Veteran and Member of the Lynchburg Area Veterans Council (LAVC).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| The Rejoice Children's Choir of Heritage Baptist Church of Lynchburg did a wonderful job playing patriotic music.
---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for your dedication to honoring those who fought, sacrificed, and/or died that we might live as a free nation under God. Take care and I cannot wait to see you around the district!

These days we are fortunate to have any WWII Veteran in our presence. I could have listened to his stories all day. Thank you for your service Sir! | | Dr. Rich Diddams, Lt.Col is the current Vice Provost and Dean of the School of Business at Liberty University. He did a remarkable job reminding us that freedom doesn't come from Politicians, Protesters, Pastor's, etc. Freedom comes from the Men and Women who risk their lives and/or give their lives for us. Thank you for your inspirational words and your service Sir! | | David Stokes, our Master of Ceremonies, President Vietnam Veterans of America Chapter 196 and Member of the Lynchburg Area Veterans Council (LAVC). | | Steve Bozeman, Vietnam Veteran and Member of the Lynchburg Area Veterans Council (LAVC). | | | | The Rejoice Children's Choir of Heritage Baptist Church of Lynchburg did a wonderful job playing patriotic music. | | | Thank you for your dedication to honoring those who fought, sacrificed, and/or died that we might live as a free nation under God. Take care and I cannot wait to see you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | == | | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

| This year alone, a major corporate polluter, Dominion Energy spent over $7.5 Million on Virginia's State Assembly races in an effort to buy their way out of accountability in the state. Despite Dominion's best efforts, Virginia now has a pro-climate majority in the State Assembly, thanks to grassroots supporters and volunteers coming together. This confirms what we have seen time and again: when enough people come together to stand up for what is right they can beat any odds. In 2024, we know that corporate polluters will continue to spend millions on elections, but together, we can defeat them. I would never ask you for $7.5 Million, but if you can spare $5 today to support our work electing climate champions, I promise you it will go a long way.

$5 may not seem like a lot of money compared to the millions spent by the fossil fuel industry _**every year**_ to line the pockets of their political allies to turn a blind eye as they exploit our natural resources and destroy our planet.

But when we combine our grassroots strength to power the climate movement, your $5 investment makes a big difference.

body:
This is my first newsletter, and I can't wait to let you know what I've been up to!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=1410a63fb9804645b95f66598eadbb68&_e=4XY2dP0CuMYLkj2zN7zAZbFJq0-sEek5_ugGrIHIpcVM2ej3-ca_YTAEmOf0YBqTxP5U-13h_2Y_jkmTpkrQJYf-_yG7lAfZr-Olhclgey8relzZXAqVzvHjsv7gxVLQtbAoSJRQ8t51qM-a5UO6HxtfDZIY22nA55md-GiIwH1_ou81b4K7_FdNZY6-0y44U107AmA6SGoaah_zBYAEnA0gTe2aaCINIuVXkKxYVsqlp71Dw_7O65-BTbVccCqzvPNIaVzZNAOh6TcHXFgWNg%3D%3D)
---
Welcome to the first edition of my weekly newsletter! Thank you for being in my corner as we fight for Truth, but I also want you to know that I'm in YOUR corner. I'm listening to voters like you, and unlike Trump, you know I'll only tell you the Truth. This newsletter is my way of showing you the progress we are making as more voters wake up and see that I am the only candidate in this race who is qualified to lead our nation. I'm not playing games and I'm not playing politics. And, unlike Trump, I'm not playing YOU. Welcome to my corner, now let's get to work!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=1410a63fb9804645b95f66598eadbb68&_e=4XY2dP0CuMYLkj2zN7zAZbFJq0-sEek5_ugGrIHIpcVM2ej3-ca_YTAEmOf0YBqTxP5U-13h_2Y_jkmTpkrQJYf-_yG7lAfZr-Olhclgey8relzZXAqVzvHjsv7gxVLQlNKiiMp3qsv_5uCr4UCLnE6AR3fZbb3YepJaB_qxaQK1f-bxDZ-4O0sPolLiFb7NTQXetRVxb5r3ZYyCgdM5rvdI_Rm63ic4Q7plUZSHCwgI1mB391V9ntrtFInNdgTRu2RDx48tSjVPq6PZPzOuHQ%3D%3D)
---
**Chris Christie**
---
SPECIAL UPDATE
---
This Sunday, November 12th, Chris Christie will become the first presidential candidate to visit Israel since the October 7th attacks carried out by Hamas terrorists. Chis' tour of Israel will take him to Tel Aviv, Gaza, and Jerusalem to meet with Israeli officials and with families whose loved ones were kidnapped by Hamas.
Watch your inbox for more updates on Chris Christie's unprecedented trip to Israel in the midst of their war for survival.
---

Thank you for being in my corner as we fight for Truth, but I also want you to know that I'm in YOUR corner. I'm listening to voters like you, and unlike Trump, you know I'll only tell you the Truth. This newsletter is my way of showing you the progress we are making as more voters wake up and see that I am the only candidate in this race who is qualified to lead our nation. I'm not playing games and I'm not playing politics. And, unlike Trump, I'm not playing YOU. Welcome to my corner, now let's get to work! Chris Christie SPECIAL UPDATE This Sunday, November 12th, Chris Christie will become the first presidential candidate to visit Israel since the October 7th attacks carried out by Hamas terrorists. Chis' tour of Israel will take him to Tel Aviv, Gaza, and Jerusalem to meet with Israeli officials and with families whose loved ones were kidnapped by Hamas. Watch your inbox for more updates on Chris Christie's unprecedented trip to Israel in the midst of their war for survival. | | | You may remember from the last debate, I called out Donald Duck for not showing up. Well, once again he was nowhere to be found... But I am not the only one who thinks he should be on that stage defending his actions. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware, Inc
body:
| Neighbors, I wanted to share a quick note on Veterans Day. **Today, I’m giving thanks to those who’ve served our country. Those who have put their lives on the line and their families on hold to serve the country they love.** Though we honor their service today, we have to make that daily commitment — we have to honor their service by building strong communities. Communities with support and opportunity. Healthcare. Housing. Mental health services. Good jobs with good wages. **We can best honor veterans — every single day — by working toward policies that will support their return home.** Yours,
Sarah
---

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The veterans who inspired me to join the U.S. Marine Corps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Hi Peter, it’s
Lucas Kunce.

Instead of sending you an email about my campaign today, I wanted to share
something I recently published on Substack about the veterans who inspired
me to join the U.S. Marine Corps.

You can find the full text below — and if you’d like to read more, please
click the button to subscribe and find all my posts.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1001&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]SUBSCRIBE ON SUBSTACK

More from me soon,

— Lucas

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Service Means Sacrifice

Pleus Hall was one of those typical church meeting halls you find all
across Missouri. A large room, usually full of tables, with a kitchen on
one end. At Immaculate Conception parish — IC for short — the hall was
used for all sorts of gatherings, both on Sunday and throughout the week.
It probably still is.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1002&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Pleus Hall
Pleus Hall

For a stretch of time, before my littlest sister was born, it was used for
something quite special to our family. My parents and several of their
friends had been deeply involved in running twice-a-month dinners there
for anyone who wanted to come. The idea was that people who were
struggling to feed themselves and their families would have a reliable
place to go a couple times a month. They believed it was a good Christian
way to serve the community and made sure us kids were a part of it.

We enjoyed it quite a bit. In nice weather we could even walk, since the
hall was only about a third of a mile from our house.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1003&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Lucas at a church gathering
Lucas at a church gathering

The guy who oversaw the parish kitchen, A.G., made things fun and
interesting for all the kids whose parents brought them to help out.
First, we would set the tables, and then we could sign up for our nightly
duties. Things like helping clean up, gathering trash, re-setting the
tables, greeting people, or whatever else needed doing.

When A.G. would ask us what chores we wanted to do, my sister, who was a
year younger than me, and I would shoot up our hands.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1004&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Lucas during the time of the dinners
Lucas during the time of the dinners

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1005&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Lucas first communion, IC
Lucas' first communion, IC

“Ooh, ooh, ooh! We want to do the dishes! We want to do the dishes!” We
would yell.

He thought we were nuts. I mean, what kid wants to do the dishes? But he
let us roll with it.

As for me and my sister, we thought A.G. was the one who was crazy. You
see, at home, doing the dishes was quite the ordeal. You had to clear them
from the table, stack them all up, fill the tubs with water, scrub the
dishes clean, rinse them, set them on the counter, and then towel them dry
before putting them away. And I can tell you right now, when the person
cooking isn’t the same one cleaning, there always seems to be a lot more
to scrub!

The parish, on the other hand, had dishwasher machines, so doing the
dishes there was no more than waiting for someone to bring them in from
the tables, tossing them into the machine, and pressing a button. We felt
like we were totally scamming old A.G. by calling that a chore!

I’m not sure when it happened, he never let on to us kids, but at some
point he figured out why we thought doing the dishes was such a good deal.
Eventually, for reasons unknown to me, the dinners ended and we didn’t see
A.G. as much anymore.

Then, one day, his big blue pickup truck rumbled up in front of our house
and parked. He came up to the house and talked to my mom for a minute and
then we all walked out to his truck. He climbed up and pointed to
something in the bed, smiling. It was a dishwasher.

A.G. hadn’t forgotten our unexpected enthusiasm in doing the dishes back
during those dinners and, when he later remodeled the kitchen in his
house, he saved his old dishwasher, loaded it up on his truck, and brought
it by our house. A friend of his installed it for us.

A common characteristic of people who strengthen their communities is that
they understand that service often means sacrifice. I was surrounded by it
growing up. People taking care of others when it won’t bring them any
glory or benefit, often despite the fact that it’s extra work for them
with no reward beyond helping their fellow man. In fact, if someone were
to look at what people here in the heartland do for one another with a
cold and calculating eye, they could easily conclude that individually it
doesn’t make any sense. But we help each other anyway. Because it’s how we
survive as a whole.

Many years later, I reconnected with A.G. when I was trying to figure out
how I could best pay back my community for everything they had done for me
and my family over the years. A.G., a Marine Vietnam veteran, took me down
to the Marine Corps League in Apache Flats, Missouri, far out on the west
side of town.

There I met a crew of Americans who did what their country asked of them,
and who had never asked for anything in return. I listened to their
stories. Of a war their politicians had sent them to, most of whom were
drafted, and what it was like coming home. After watching their best
friends bleed out in front of them thousands of miles from home.

One old Marine, R., a Jeff City High School grad just like me, pulled out
his guitar and sang some songs for us. About answering the call for your
country. About how their fathers had fought in the second world war and
come home heroes. How they thought it would be the same for them, and how
very, very, different it ended up being for them during and after Vietnam.

He gave me a CD, called [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39149?t=1006&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]The Young and the Brave, that was full of his
songs. I listened to it on loop for weeks and I still have it. These were
the guys I looked up to growing up. Our Vietnam vets might not have come
home heroes, but they were my heroes. For the selfless service they gave
their country and continued to give to their communities, despite what
they had gone through.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1007&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]The Young and The Brave Album Cover
The Young and The Brave Album Cover

They inspired me to follow in their footsteps and become a US Marine. And
so I did, and before I knew it I was overseas just like them.

I led a police training team of twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman in
Iraq. I occasionally thought of those old timers when planning our
missions outside the wire and making sure the Marines in my charge, the
young and the brave, came home safely. I thought about them again when I
came home from Iraq, and both times I came home from Afghanistan. Because
unlike them, each time I returned to American soil, I was thanked for my
service and treated with the utmost respect.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1008&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Lucas leading a mission outside the wire in Iraq — Use of military
rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by
the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense
Lucas leading a mission outside the wire in Iraq — Use of military rank, job
titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of
the Navy or the Department of Defense

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39141?t=1009&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP ]Lucas at a local police outpost in rural Afghanistan — Use of military
rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by
the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense
Lucas at a local police outpost in rural Afghanistan — Use of military rank, job
titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of
the Navy or the Department of Defense

My generation of veterans would have never received that welcome if not
for the suffering that our Vietnam vet brothers and sisters went through.

And when people ask me why I joined the Marine Corps, instead of some
other service, I think about A.G. and I tell them, “You never forget the
man who saved you 45 minutes of hard labor at the sink every night.”

###

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1010&akid=4169%2E614464%2Et06QaP

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

There I met a crew of Americans who did what their country asked of them, and who had never asked for anything in return. I listened to their stories. Of a war their politicians had sent them to, most of whom were drafted, and what it was like coming home. After watching their best friends bleed out in front of them thousands of miles from home. One old Marine, R., a Jeff City High School grad just like me, pulled out his guitar and sang some songs for us. About answering the call for your country. About how their fathers had fought in the second world war and come home heroes. How they thought it would be the same for them, and how very, very, different it ended up being for them during and after Vietnam. He gave me a CD, called [ ]The Young and the Brave, that was full of his songs. I listened to it on loop for weeks and I still have it. These were the guys I looked up to growing up. Our Vietnam vets might not have come home heroes, but they were my heroes. For the selfless service they gave their country and continued to give to their communities, despite what they had gone through. [ ]The Young and The Brave Album Cover The Young and The Brave Album Cover They inspired me to follow in their footsteps and become a US Marine. And so I did, and before I knew it I was overseas just like them. I led a police training team of twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman in Iraq. I occasionally thought of those old timers when planning our missions outside the wire and making sure the Marines in my charge, the young and the brave, came home safely. I thought about them again when I came home from Iraq, and both times I came home from Afghanistan. Because unlike them, each time I returned to American soil, I was thanked for my service and treated with the utmost respect. [ ]Lucas leading a mission outside the wire in Iraq — Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense Lucas leading a mission outside the wire in Iraq — Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense [ ]Lucas at a local police outpost in rural Afghanistan — Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense Lucas at a local police outpost in rural Afghanistan — Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense My generation of veterans would have never received that welcome if not for the suffering that our Vietnam vet brothers and sisters went through. And when people ask me why I joined the Marine Corps, instead of some other service, I think about A.G. and I tell them, “You never forget the man who saved you 45 minutes of hard labor at the sink every night.”

And Congress has been forced to take notice. **At least 26 members of Congress have now joined the call for a ceasefire, and the pressure is growing every day. Fellow American -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=de50f7e6979b487c9b451f797516fa49&_e=MwMYC3bNlWN1sbEEuo6AzF8kZJpdReKJ9eL_jzoPjQTdRFV59IaRhEs1K36HmnJ01t9uPmkNfp5h78SqirKfhw4SPlG0iSEDUFYQU5YtSmrFHwRhkwCjeTVS9zqhQZsGDRMTw108FCRUQN7o4cG3mlzpR1tb2y32ajtyZ3XBunYTqMStmaBlGTEH3E_mDO7bGDictz9trL1Nh8s3cdWCnX_fR9VKQIDdkB6AF0fH3rXIDCIneRCFZWDUcEDKDjeO2Y_F5UXUs7uXsxNsSSf1251j2672ah_OM9cz7xf2ai_z1ahCcbGrPGaoCVPb2ruKPmwr-B3n-G6NcQtgLw8S652O1_d17C7ykBtrQJjvqJxOhPdGCESiLLzuA73Al3F9m15dcU4eXbudtzptsH_a_abni5Mqxt-lhqU1gatZiyY%3D)

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=de50f7e6979b487c9b451f797516fa49&_e=MwMYC3bNlWN1sbEEuo6AzF8kZJpdReKJ9eL_jzoPjQTdRFV59IaRhEs1K36HmnJ01t9uPmkNfp5h78SqirKfhw4SPlG0iSEDUFYQU5YtSmrFHwRhkwCjeTVS9zqhQZsGDRMTw108FCRUQN7o4cG3mlzpR1tb2y32ajtyZ3XBunYTqMStmaBlGTEH3E_mDO7bGDictz9trL1Nh8s3cdWCnX_fR9VKQIDdkB6AF0fH3rXIDCIneRCFZWDUcEDKDjeO2Y_F5UXUs7uXsxNsSSf124ePhifmUxZOLKbC9-7xkAsLfgU5AOPglCwi8aME0FJwQiygVrUI_NZzUNtvZlQShDV0QjSBZJBUYkdyZL1hxOBn6en5T__kbZHbiLvo9XPWfSiXXWohJnoYiLdM4TBZe26OdK5fLFE3LASiM19DqGI%3D)

clean_body: Saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most. | | Fellow American - I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day. It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America. I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on. Why I need your help: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon. Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to "re-engineer" – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on. The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country. Their actions speak louder than their words, As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington. I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left. It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

We owe our veterans and their families a huge debt of gratitude for protecting the freedoms and values that we cherish. I was thrilled to show a small token of appreciation with dinner last night. [_**Will you take a moment and sign your name alongside mine with this special Veterans Day Card?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73208331/437746151/-1850854602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDIwMTk0My1jZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0VcOZh-aVSs24w85NuSEqKPuAjtMUSi41-fwKX869Q=&emci=e3bda918-647e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4201943-cf80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73208332/437746152/-2037737158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDIwMTk0My1jZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0VcOZh-aVSs24w85NuSEqKPuAjtMUSi41-fwKX869Q=&emci=e3bda918-647e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4201943-cf80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) | [Sign the Card >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73208333/437746153/-1850854602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDIwMTk0My1jZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0VcOZh-aVSs24w85NuSEqKPuAjtMUSi41-fwKX869Q=&emci=e3bda918-647e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4201943-cf80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160)

Over 145 people joined myself and Congressman Jeff Jackson (NC-14), who courageously served in Afghanistan with the Army.
Being in the presence of so many brave men and women, made me think of my own dad. He was a Navy Quartermaster and I’m proud to honor his memory and thousands of other Marylanders with events like these as well as with my service on the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs.
[_**In honor of our veterans, will you sign this card to thank them for their service and actions taken to make our country safer?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73208334/437746154/-1850854602?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDIwMTk0My1jZjgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0VcOZh-aVSs24w85NuSEqKPuAjtMUSi41-fwKX869Q=&emci=e3bda918-647e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4201943-cf80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: An important day for our nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231102-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231102-email]Hi Peter – I wanted to make sure you were up-to-date on what’s going on in DC.
Republicans may have chosen a Speaker, but we still haven’t funded our government with a shutdown looming in fifteen days.
As the majority party, the GOP could fund the government if they tried to pass a continuing resolution that provides aid for Ukraine and Israel, funds social services, and allows the IRS to crack down on tax cheats.
But the GOP would rather hold that aid hostage and tie it to defunding the IRS. They want to withhold important funds for one of our closest allies because they want their wealthy friends to be able to avoid paying their taxes.
This is a gross political game that House Republicans are playing, but it’s nothing they haven’t shown us before. I remain committed to funding our government, providing assistance to our allies, and funding Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. I remain committed to ensuring that billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.
I’ll continue fighting to fund our government in its entirety here in Washington, and I’ll continue to keep you updated along the way.
Thanks for standing with me,
Wiley

---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Big Cruise is polluting our oceans with TOXIC waste. [Will you help by speaking up against the cruise ship industry? Act Now >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **Friend, did you know cruise ships release massive amounts of toxic waste into our oceans?** That same waste pollutes marine ecosystems that our beloved orcas inhabit and can contaminate the shorelines of coastal communities. The toxins released by these huge vessels can turn blue, vibrant waters into a **murky, sludge-contaminated mess.** _**Could you imagine having to swim in waters polluted with toxic sludge, Friend?**_ Neither can we. And for endangered Southern Resident orcas, the reality of the cruise industry’s harmful ocean pollution is _**threatening their survival.**_ We cannot let Big Cruise’s careless practices and corporate greed continue to _**disrupt our delicate oceanic ecosystems, threaten endangered orcas, and put people’s health at risk.**_ _**That’s why we’re demanding that the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) rein in greedy cruise corporations before more damage is done to our precious planet, and we URGENTLY need your help to apply strong public pressure:**_ **[Will you be a true Friend of our Earth today and sign our petition before the deadline at 11:59 P.M. Friend? Add your name now>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Damaging the marine food supply, contaminated water, and excessive noise pollution?** That is only a small portion of the harm caused by Big Cruise.
Meanwhile, Southern Resident orcas are already on _**BRINK OF EXTINCTION**_ \-- and cruise industry pollution could be what pushes these iconic marine mammals _**over the edge.**_ The disturbances and pollution from cruise ships can _impair a whale’s echolocation abilities,_ which are needed for navigation and communication. And their massive vessels can even _drive away Chinook salmon,_ an essential orca food source, leading to orcas _**DYING OF STARVATION OR MALNUTRITION.**_
_**There are only 75 Southern Resident orcas remaining in the wild.**_ **Time is running out to restore and save the dwindling population of this beloved sea mammal.** **[Don’t wait to speak up, Friend \-- every moment of inaction gives Big Cruise the upper hand. Take action now to protect our oceans, orcas, and planet from the cruise industry’s corporate pollution >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2113699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being an advocate for our oceans and our planet,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: The tide is turning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Content Warning: This email discusses death.

Peter,

It’s been over one month since Hamas’ attack on Israel and Israel’s
non-stop military aggression against Gaza began. Instead of demanding a
ceasefire and return of all hostages, the Democratic establishment gave
Israel $14 billion worth of bombs and weapons to continue their genocide
against the Palestinian people.

At this point, more than 10,000 Palestinian lives have been lost,
including at least 4,000 children. It didn’t have to be this way, and it
doesn’t have to continue.

Justice Democrats incumbents Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee, Jamaal
Bowman, Ilhan Omar, AOC, Ayanna Pressley, and Greg Casar continue to be
some of the few members of Congress calling for a ceasefire, while many of
their colleagues either remain silent or callously add fuel to the flames
of war and hatred.

But the tide is turning. Public opinion is with us on the right side of
history, with 66% of voters and more than 80% of Democratic voters
supporting a ceasefire. On this day last week in Washington, D.C., we saw
the largest pro-Palestinian protest in U.S. history, with hundreds of
thousands of people flooding the streets here and in similar marches all
over the world.

Over 100 congressional staffers walked out in support of a ceasefire as
they continue to receive thousands of calls from people like you urging
their members of Congress to summon the courage to join us and use their
power to end the ethnic cleansing we are witnessing in real-time.

Each day that passes without a ceasefire, more innocent lives are lost.
That’s why we can’t give up — we must keep up the momentum for peace.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140231?source=jd-em20231111-31781&t=1001&akid=31781%2E1203867%2EIK8Zmj ]Please join us in keeping up the fight by calling and leaving a
voicemail for your senators and member of Congress demanding a ceasefire
NOW. Let’s show them we won’t let up until they do the right thing to save
Palestinian and Israeli lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140231?source=jd-em20231111-31781&t=1002&akid=31781%2E1203867%2EIK8Zmj ]CALL NOW

Thank you for everything you’ve done — from making calls to signing
petitions to marching to donating — to stand up for human rights in this
historic moment.

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231111-31781-footer&t=1003&refcode2=31781_1203867_IK8Zmj&akid=31781%2E1203867%2EIK8Zmj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=31781%2E1203867%2EIK8Zmj

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
| Here are three things you need to know about the state of our race:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1490%2E35263%2EIAZqI9)
Peter — here are three things you need to know about the state of our race to reelect Tammy Baldwin. 1️⃣: _CNN_ and _The Hill_ both ranked Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat as one of the most likely to flip next year. 2️⃣: Mitch McConnell has hand-picked two megamillionaire opponents to defeat Tammy, including anti-abortion extremist Eric Hovde. 3️⃣: Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive elections in the country — last year’s Senate race here was decided by less than 1 percent of the entire vote! **This could be Tammy’s most competitive reelection yet. All of the progress Tammy has led on — from abortion rights to affordable health care and so much more — is on the line. So we’re asking:** **[Will you rush a contribution today to help us keep Wisconsin and our Senate Majority blue? subject: Sen. Manchin isn't running (this changes everything)

We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=oNwHzKssuSv473iOwZzgnjyQlleDMeETRiRNd2mPJdaqk%2F%2BqSPICVSGLYSNV52qVwa3NuSzXDnlamG9HS%2BUuglzFZXbz7H55a5Py%2FcLHLfl57lCP2%2FUc3WetjVm6e0F67eZYhG0XGvoSP%2B%2F0yUIfRaS37VaAj67TCeSVAH5AecSGQ1RQ60L%2F93HfX1K9DYIA4u5wT%2F%2F9AkcDKp2wQK3RlePhLTnGcihAxSRrJVGmetX2f35VHizrhD6V6dQ92bJM14W6B5Qlj7kIaFbtb6NgVfgyf4PQeMzE5kbxKWPVNnqv8DbgJWZSKNTLN2R2NJzr7Br8nboGn%2FP%2FHoyAUAKX7jWXwzZbIABJJV1Pe8Hu4E1oI7OOwysyfAksUs%2Blx0R1m2PqdxqwKVz9VL6Qx0tYzgJKZGaQ1qBrNuIM2MaZCIil3pls36ba2cV64y7r2Pe%2F .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Peter, I don’t know if you heard, but Sen. Joe Manchin just announced that he will not seek reelection in 2024.
Now that Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip West Virginia red, we absolutely need Florida to defend our Senate majority. Plain and simple.
Peter, there's absolutely no denying it — the path to defending the Senate runs right through Florida.
We've got to step up to the plate — so I’ve launched a $50,000 Emergency Goal, and I need your help to hit it. Will you split $15 or more between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez to make sure that we can flip Florida and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
This changes everything. Without a Democratic incumbent running, we have almost no chance of holding West Virginia. Donald Trump won the state by almost 40 points.
Florida is a different story. Experts are already calling this one of the most competitive races in the nation — and last time Rick Scott only won his seat by 0.12%!
The path to the Senate runs DIRECTLY through Florida. I know it, you know it, Rick Scott knows it, and Mitch McConnell knows it. That means Rick Scott won’t be alone with his millions in this — the GOP will be spending more than ever to keep this seat red and defeat my campaign.
This race is in a statistical tie right now. But if we're outspent over these next few weeks, Rick Scott will retake the lead — and we may never catch back up.
This race in Florida is Democrats' BEST chance to save our Senate majority — and I'm counting on your help to win. Will you split $15 before 11:59 p.m. to flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority? We HAVE to win this race, Peter. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Thank you. This makes this race harder, but I know with this team we will win.
— Debbie
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

name: Bob Casey
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1111%2E552475%2E8tLM-s)
Happy Veterans Day, Peter.
Today and every day, we honor and thank the brave men and women who have served on behalf of this great Nation.
While we will never be able to fully repay the debt we owe our service members and their families, it's important we remember that serving our veterans requires action, not just words.
Last year, I worked with my colleagues in the Senate to pass the bipartisan PACT Act, the largest expansion of veteran health care benefits in decades. This was a historic win for veterans and our country, but it doesn’t end there.
There’s more work to be done to ensure our veterans and their families have access to the health care, education and opportunity they deserve – and I will continue fighting for our service members in the United States Senate for years to come.
Thank you for your service, and happy Veterans Day.
Bob Casey

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231111-1?refcode=em20231111-1&refcode2=1111_552475_8tLM-s&akid=1111%2E552475%2E8tLM-s)**

| | Peter, In many ways, I no longer recognize the Virginia I grew up in.

Career politicians like Tim Kaine have turned our Commonwealth into a paradise for political insiders while leaving everyday citizens behind.

_I know I’m not alone in that feeling, and that’s why I’m running for Senate to replace him._

I spent 25 years in the U.S. Navy fighting for what’s right. And just because _I’ve hung up my uniform doesn’t mean my fight is over._

**Peter, I’m not in this for myself. I’m in it for my country, my Commonwealth, and for patriots like you.**

I hope you can stand with me in this fight today.

Trust me, asking for money is my least favorite part of the job. But I can’t keep this campaign going without you. Any contribution makes a BIG difference. **[W](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=19b7e7b10cc94d069af24d74b0345732&_e=_D8-fxRyI8UdJckpJh90PiS40sn7J6-dbRIvqECBc-un6erZ1QovOCOsL5CGk4TuYNEKp-wzeVUkfrEaNVdffQIzppkPoQR8I9ZMdk12MuZyQ-JNUDhwtbOUdPiIlqv0BE3UHTY8Uj5hfBCUgJx4DgWwqh4pXN1XQLI6O04aYzPvUUky0MbsYMhZksuXrt6efVs6gB6vO3KVUtWpgKpsBXDH4U743xi_aqDTxgSRU_MvXp3AmA6cFZoNtyKAxL06XWp6uT6uqjPd4vkAWDO2Vt6Z3enRnGibq55yFxN_aQ9WJTE5GZFs-P7_3j0vXcbaWiiytdUxyiMgZMuMYiXTmdEfcdN2avRMFc9ApLV67lg02o8RtqdqgmEZTb2tfFXsmeZzEt-0AFrtx_5eZxyOAA%3D%3D)[e can win next November if you stand by my side right now. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, In many ways, I no longer recognize the Virginia I grew up in. Career politicians like Tim Kaine have turned our Commonwealth into a paradise for political insiders while leaving everyday citizens behind. I know I’m not alone in that feeling, and that’s why I’m running for Senate to replace him. I spent 25 years in the U.S. Navy fighting for what’s right. And just because I’ve hung up my uniform doesn’t mean my fight is over. Peter, I’m not in this for myself. I’m in it for my country, my Commonwealth, and for patriots like you. I hope you can stand with me in this fight today. Trust me, asking for money is my least favorite part of the job. But I can’t keep this campaign going without you. Any contribution makes a BIG difference. It’s not just our futures that depend on what happens during and after this election - it’s our children’s futures, and that’s not something I’m willing to risk. Together, we can build a movement that will FIRE Tim Kaine and take back our Senate majority, but ONLY together. Thank you again for your support. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Becca Balint
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
War leaves veterans with scars — both visible and invisible.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73210404/437753529/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzE5OTNjMi1lMzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hyBFLHZ2eD3HSWdBsJN55z12iqwFWddoj6W8QIX2D6g=&emci=6169c7d7-467f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=631993c2-e380-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Hi Peter, Today, we honor the brave Americans who have stepped up to serve our nation in the armed forces in defense of our country’s most sacred principles: Freedom, unity, democracy, and liberty and justice for all. **While we honor and thank our veterans today, there is so much more that must be done to support those returning home from service.** War leaves veterans with scars – both visible and invisible. The difficulty of transitioning back into civilian life means that a high number of our service members grapple with mental health issues, substance use disorders, homelessness, and high rates of suicide – often without the support they need to navigate these challenges. I want you to know that I’m not just committed to thanking those who’ve served: I’m committed to fighting for bills to expand mental health care, help veterans re-enter the workforce, invest in the VA, and fight the stigma of homelessness and substance use disorders that harms veterans in their re-entry to civilian life. They deserve nothing less than all of this – and then some. Every day, but especially today, I sincerely thank all military members and their families for their service and sacrifice – for Vermont and for our country. And if you or someone you know is struggling or could use support, I urge you to call the Veterans Crisis Line at 988, then press 1. Thank you, Becca Balint
---

* * *

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: Celebrating our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today, we come together to honor the tremendous courage and sacrifice of our veterans and their families. It’s time to remember their courage and reinforce our dedication to their work.
Taking inspiration from Congressman Ruben Gallego, a Marine veteran who tirelessly advocates for veterans' rights, I’m writing to share my commitment to our veterans and their families.
If I have the honor of being your next congresswoman, I’m committed to ensuring that the concerns of our veterans are at the forefront of the decisions we make.
Thank you for your service, your strength, and your sacrifice.
Raquel Terán

Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111123_sub]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311
United States
Paid for by Terán for Congress

subject: re: The REAL loyalty pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
This is President Trump’s promise to YOU... | | | Patriot,

---
The disloyal RINOS, who happily __attack__ President Trump instead of going after Crooked Joe Biden (the most corrupt and incompetent president in our nation’s history), love to talk about their so-called “loyalty” pledges.
---
But there’s only one _**REAL**_ loyalty pledge – a pledge to voters like _**YOU**_.
---

clean_body: This is President Trump’s promise to YOU... | | | Patriot, The disloyal RINOS, who happily attack President Trump instead of going after Crooked Joe Biden (the most corrupt and incompetent president in our nation’s history), love to talk about their so-called “loyalty” pledges. But there’s only one REAL loyalty pledge – a pledge to voters like YOU. And President Trump is the ONLY candidate taking that pledge... And in turn, with just two months to go until the FIRST contest of the primary, the President is asking that you consider contributing any amount – even just $1 – to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP. Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Fri, November 10, 2023 Subject: A REAL loyalty pledge To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, It’s always laughable to see the disloyal RINOs who were on the debate stage this week talk about their signing of a “loyalty” pledge. Let me be as clear as day: their pledges are MEANINGLESS! Because every minute our special interest “Republican” opponents waste attacking yours truly instead of the Crook currently occupying the White House, is another minute they are being DISLOYAL to YOU – the more than 74 MILLION voters who make up our incredible movement! The longer they refuse to accept the reality that we are the UNDISPUTED FRONTRUNNER (leading by 50 and even 60 points!) and the ONLY candidate crushing Crooked Joe by double digits, the more they HELP salvage Biden’s failing campaign. But they don’t care about loyalty to you, Patriot, or saving our country from Marxist tyranny for that matter... The only thing they care about is furthering their own political ambitions. Which is exactly why on the very same day that I was forced to testify in the SHAM TRIAL in New York, one of our RINO opponents chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. The only fatal mistake is these disloyal RINOs playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands! And that’s why I’m making a REALloyalty pledge – a pledge to the PEOPLE: Patriot, I pledge to OFFICIALLY WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible, so that we can shift all our time, energy, and resources to the one and only REAL mission of FIRING Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! And in turn, with just two months to go until the FIRST contest of the primary, I ask that you consider contributing even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP. But of course, if you’re struggling right now because of Crooked Joe and his RINO enablers, then please don’t even think about donating. Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come ROARING BACK! Don’t you worry. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Team DMP
subject: Hi there , this might come as a surprise:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Hi there, this might come as a surprise: Did you know that you're in the top 10% of active Democrats in FL? [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
You're one of the MOST engaged members of this team — and truthfully, Debbie needs strong Democrats like you to have her back now more than ever.
Recent polling data has shown that this race is a STATISTICAL TIE, with Debbie polling just 1 point ahead. That's why election experts at CNN say that this is one of the top 10 most likely seats to flip in 2024.
But Republican Rick Scott has seen these numbers, too, and he's scheming to retake the lead. He just endorsed Donald Trump's campaign, hoping to rally a surge of MAGA extremists to support his own campaign. And he's already spent a massive $3 MILLION airing attack ads against Democrats like Debbie.
Listen, this is just the beginning: Rick Scott has a fortune worth up to a quarter-of-a-billion dollars that he can dip into at any moment to destroy Debbie's campaign.
So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you donate before 11:59 p.m. tonight to make sure that Rick Scott can't buy this seat again? Debbie will only be able to fight back and maintain her lead in the polls if Democrats like you stand with her. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr?refcode=jtk293-fr-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr?refcode=jtk293-fr-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr?amounts=5,25,50,100,25025]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr?refcode=jtk293-fr-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,25050]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mw_dmp_2023_email_fr?refcode=jtk293-fr-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw_dmp_2023_email_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=oDQ5%2B%2BF9J2XXpd3azjG76JuvcYMeCOe7c%2BDVKPAuVIMDqZM02onxIcuTxQ7w8B5853v8YsMuTneJAG7iTv24YjLQ7%2BEihOLKHDiL24AmCkPhQf6zXVnSaGWN%2BInfy8Hi1JfxLFgmER1W6U7Gfy1Kohk6DpJsxEglFMebk%2Be4Fy7%2FRxeeTka5OAHIyLEP3LTrBNP0i3WgTadgnZ5WAeJXXUowa9JfqNoimf%2FjabU4TlGtjSDtHzVd0l42JBbBINrsSL%2F2XGRALiM8C%2Fmw6CiPw195SkI0EBQnDZJzyU1%2BuGPpMslb%2BQTYPJNFNnGiGi2%2F7ioQyCetX5ifxqtncvrdKRESKDwcsWYfRVXDXLIqirmflpr%2Bxp8JDLP5%2FRoVFJfzkjdrE7JLYpYY%2F%2FF7BqKamubC9%2BzA3muC7u16FeiNj5IO5%2FeMJt3xnq4O3XkK1Uyg from Debbie's email list.
Paid for by Debbie for Florida.Debbie for Florida

South Miami, FL 33243
